sections.Backstory: Originally hailing from the United Kingdom controlled Scotland, Icara and her family lived nomadic lives, typically traveling from one industrial city to another. Officially their trade was in the transport of goods, though that was used as a way to hide the more illicit items they carried. The family was very much involved with many of the anti-royalty groups in the UK, and they peddled and sold weapons, munitions, and other supplies to these groups. While not directly in the line of fire, it certainly was a dangerous gig, but one that Icara continued after her parents passed.

sections.Backstory:
Felix grew up in Cleveland, Ohio.  He spent most of his life there.  Eventually he became a cop, and then he became a Detective.  A rather troubling case involving a city councilman resulted in Felix having a hitman sent after him.  The guy nearly killed Felix.  Nearly.  Just made him a paraplegic.  
Felix went with a FBC transplant to solve that issue.  He sort of lost his mind after that though, so as a coping mechanism he installed a Copycat soft of his favorite old movie star, Humphrey Bogart.  From that day forward Felix became a poser.  He’s been doing it for over 30 years now.
Felix, now “Bogart,” took up work in the southern NUSA, specifically in the Alabama area.  Taking on investigative work for Mr. Gold.  He didn’t work exclusively for Gold however.  He stuck to freelance Private Eye work, often being called out to the far corners of the country on all kinds of jobs.
Bogart oddly enough has never been to Night City in all his 63 years.  Given his favorite employer’s return to the city, Bogart followed suit at Gold’s request.  If only because business is slow for him right now and he could use new avenues to explore.

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Mechanical knowledge with both hardware and automotive, construction, Demolition, repair skills, knowledge on how to operate in hazardous environments, at least competent in a fight.
sections.Backstory: Native to Night City, and originally trying to make ends meet, Roach suffered crippling debt to Kang Tao due to both high end cyberware purchases as well as being caught in the illicit dealing of cyberware. Upon this debt coming to light, most of his old cyberware was taken from him as collateral towards his debt, but much of his prior debt still remained. He was, however, offered an alternative way to pay off his debt. The arranged agreement was that a chunk of his debt would be removed if he underwent a Full Body Conversion, and new chrome, after which he would then work hazardous jobs to pay off the rest of his debt. Out of options and desperate to be free of his debt to the corporation, Roach agreed to undergo the procedure, and take on the work afterwards. However, the standard of his new body left much to be desired. The tech was rusty, and he very quickly missed his old body, but no return now. Installed with Cyberware to help fulfill his role, he worked jobs to start paying off his debt, undergoing grueling conditions that wore on him both physically and mentally. The work inevitably began to weather away at his mind and body (even to the point he started calling his immunosuppressants "Hope"), but the work was inescapable. Eventually, however, he would come face to face with a job more hazardous than the others, retrieving a piece of tech from a hazard zone in the badlands. He would find the tech, but was knocked unconscious when a stray beam fell on him. Upon waking up he discovered that he had been left for dead, and was alone. He survived however, and long enough to run into a group of nomads; who would then take him in. Eventually properly becoming a part of snake nation, Roach earned the nickname "Nail" for the "Hammering Kang Tao gave him", and found a new life and community amongst them. Though much of this came about from his desire to distance himself from Kang Tao( and other Corps) in fear of what would happen to him if he was discovered alive. Now he seeks to try and rekindle some form of life in this new body of his, hoping that maybe things can start to change for him.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Lever action Rifle, Wrench, Cyber Limbs, Helmet like Head, His "Hope" juice (Immunosuppresant Syringe).
sections.RP Hooks: Capable of mechanical work and repairs, knows about work in hazardous enviorments, knows his way around a fight, and has some beef with Corps (Kang Tao Specifically)
sections.Additional Notes: Between his FBC and events, though he isn't Cyberpsycho, his mind has definitely frayed at least some from what it once was, especially if he lacks suppressants.

sections.Psychological Profile: Nova is a recent Arasaka throwaway. As such, he struggles a lot with his own self-worth. He has a desire to prove himself, which pushes him to destructive tendencies. He’s a people pleaser with a desire to be known. He also has a generally good-natured personality and an “officially” clean criminal record. NCPD officers who know him, go easy on him. Especially if they’re close with his father, who is a relatively high ranking officer.

sections.Backstory:
“Deemed unfit for onboarding.”
Four words that threw away his entire life. A throwaway.

Nova attended Arasaka Academy for 13 years, K-12. He aced every test he could, he studied hard, he kept pace with his classmates but the one thing that set them apart from him, is that out of his entire 22 student class, he was the only one with no corporate background. There was a single position open for an internship, and it was stolen out from under him by a classmate who spent the most of her free time “studying” with his teacher.

Now, he’s on the street. His father’s a BD junkie NCPD officer, his mother walked out after getting a job in the NUSA with militech, and it’s left him stuck in the middle to fend for himself.

He was gifted in the mental suite more than the physical, and would have made a talented netrunner if he could get over his fear of mental cyberware. Luckily, those skills worked better for him on a cyberdeck than they did in his head.

He didn’t have the scratch for a gun of his own, so he lifted one from a NCPD crime scene when nobody was looking.
sections.Known Affiliations:
Arasaka: Present in all Arasaka databases, and facial recognition software. Arasaka has access to his father’s residential address at the push of a button.

NCPD: His father is a high ranking NCPD officer, a distant man with a somewhat negative reputation in the corporate plaza precinct. The NCPD knows Nova pretty well, since it was common for his father to bring him into work when he had to work in the office. There is a CHANCE that if Nova is arrested for a minor crime, petty theft, etc, the officers might take pity on him.


Plot Hooks:

Arasaka Academy Classmates - He had a small class, but it was a large school. He could easily know people in arasaka, or know about his fellow classmates who have moved up the corporate ladder.

NCPD: He knows plenty of officers, and is a generally good-natured person.

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Close combat proficiency, has experience in breaching and holding rooms. Cool under pressure/fire, doesn’t get psyched out by other’s wounds when in the moment, battlefield medical treatment (he can’t install your chrome, he can treat basic wounds and attempt to stabilize major/critical wounds)
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Old school Beretta M97P - Reliable 9mm pistol. No target linking or smart weapon systems, honestly kind of an old workhorse at this rate. Extremely reliable and one of the first of it’s kind to use caseless ammunition… which shows how damn old it is. 
Mustang Arms “Raider” shotgun - an older model of semi-automatic shotgun used in older days, most (in)famous for an assembly process that allowed a magazine fed shotgun to be stored (with some assembly acquired to fire comfortably) inside a coat. 
FN-FAL - A dinosaur of a weapon from wars even older than Eugene, last “popular” in the hands of wannabe revolutionaries and scene-changers in NC all the way back in 2020. Now adays it exists for young edgerunners to marvel at in terms of why anyone would willingly carry such a heavy, difficult to modify, and clunky piece of shit. Truth is, it’s archaic, but unhackable, reliable, and unaffiliated with any corp still standing, made back when governments still mattered to anybody at all. Not concealable.
Survival surgery kit - Despite the impressive name, this is less of “emergency room in a bag” and more “congratulations, your hand is back on kinda”. In practical terms, this can’t replace going to a ripperdoc, but can stabilize someone alive long enough to actually make it there. Useful only a few times without restocking (dependent on DMs discretion of the wound being treated) 
Basic medical supplies - Staples, bandages, alcohol and prayers, enough to stop the bleeding of something that isn’t serious so you can heal up at best, or limp to an actual Ripperdoc at worst

She has a deep fascination for firearms, specifically mechanical (power), preferring those over the more electronic (Tech, Smart) ones and will often offer her clients mechanical firearms over electronic ones.

sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: US era Barretta 9mm pistol family heirloom, synth weave jacket, flannel shirt, cowboy hat, jeans, leather work boots, US era double barrel 12 gauge shotgun family heirloom
sections.Backstory: Dixie is just your average Nomad from outside of Night City. She was born to a caring family, a rarity nowadays. Her family, like most Nomads, traveled and wandered a lot. Her early years were taken up by riding along with her parents, teaching her how to fend for herself and survive if anything ever went south. Her father taught her how to build and clean firearms from random materials and parts found on supply runs. She got pretty good at it, and started helping her father put together new guns out of old and useable materials. A botched trip to gather supplies ended as a bloodbath. A cyberpsycho with too many augments to count, had hunkered down in some ruins. The psycho beat back and murdered a large majority of her pack, including her mother and father, causing a deep-seated fear of intentionally, heavily augmented individuals. Dixie's family has never been very big on augments, they always thought they were unnatural. There were a few people in her pack that had one or two, but never enough to ever go full cyberpsycho. Her pack thought her dead along with her mother and father in the carnage, abandoning her, the cyberpsycho chasing after them all. She watched as they all drove away in a panic, trying to get away from this monster. Once she thought it was far enough away, she grabbed her fathers old shotgun and pistol and went to Night city in hopes of a better life, finding a suitcase to put the shotgun in along the way. She hopes to be able to put her skills to use in Night City. She doesn't care if the stuff she makes kills people, she knows what people do here. Robberies, gang shootings, all kinds of immoral and horrible stuff. She's just of the mind that; so long as she can make money, and build a new life for herself, then maybe she'll be alright.

sections.Name: Lena "Cal" Calder
sections.Occupation: Independent Medical Assistant / Unofficial Apprentice Ripperdoc
sections.Psychological Profile:
Quiet, observant, eager to please, and deeply empathetic. Shaped by early abandonment and prolonged isolation, will prioritize others' needs over her own.
Forms intense attachment bonds once trust is established, showing extreme loyalty to a chosen individual or group. Motivated primarily by survival, helping other people, and wishing to understand the circumstances surrounding her guardian's death. Struggles with survivor's guilt surrounding guardian's death, internalizing the belief that hesitation equals failure. Prone to anxiety in chaotic situations and will avoid direct conflict. Displays strong fawn/freeze response under stress and often attempts to appease rather than confront.
Emotionally she is soft-spoken and gentle, carrying a persistent undercurrent of sadness. She softens quickly around those who show vulnerability. Her kindness is sincere and her trusting nature could find her in hot water as she believes the best in all who frequent Night City.
Keeps her hands busy - will frequently clean things even if something doesn't belong to her, watches people more than she looks at them, hesitant with using names, light-sleeper, can fall asleep almost anywhere, avoids ownership language.
sections.Physical Description:
5'2, Softly athletic, reinforced spinal line visible along back, subtle facial cyberware near eyes - faint enough to be mistaken for scars, gray-ish hair worn loose, just past the shoulders. Human - no exotic mods.
Quite unassuming, like she's practiced going unnoticed.

sections.Name: Aurelia Vantress
sections.Occupation: Pop-Idol turned ethereal socialite & high-value info broker
sections.Psychological Profile: Aurelia Vantress exists somewhere between reality and performance—and she prefers it that way. Soft-spoken, but captivating. Speaks like everything is slightly poetic or rehearsed. Emotionally distant, almost untouchable. Sees people as constellations of value, secrets, and influence. Deep fear: being forgotten, not hated—forgotten. She doesn’t beg for attention. She lets silence make people lean closer.
sections.Physical Description:
Long, flowing hair that shifts between pastel blues, pinks, and iridescent hues depending on light. Skin with a subtle galaxy-like sheen—soft gradients and micro-glitter embedded beneath the surface. Eyes resemble nebulae—multi-tonal, glowing faintly with star-like specks. Glittering freckles that resemble constellations across cheeks and shoulders. Movements are slow, fluid, almost zero-gravity in grace. Her entire presence feels like augmented reality… even when it isn’t.

sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Is armed with a nue pistol and a armored jacket, used to help block some knife wounds and blunt weapons
sections.Backstory: Born and raised in NC to a rich and prosperous family with an older sister who his parents were determined to make great, while he was left with the scraps to make due with while she was glamourized and shown the spotlight from an early age. Getting this, “Forgotten Little Brother,” treatment had only gone and made him more cold as he realized that nobody is truly your friend or family, and the real goal in life is to step on others to get your way. He learned especially young about how he was extremely envious of others having more than him. However, he used his parent’s connections and his ability to be so close and forgotten by them to his advantage, recording blackmail and stealing private files that they had that was rather incriminating to certain corporate ties they had and sold it off for a price to Night Corps, that price being to become an agent for them, this ruined the rest of his family but in return he got the life he thought he always deserved. But he still craves more, and even though he does like to consider himself a freelance corpo, or a Corpo Broker for brokering deals between the corporations and fixers or gangs, truly he works for Night Corps fully, and they cycle between keeping this, “dog,” on a tight leash or letting him loose to indulge in whatever business he desires. So long as he doesn’t harm their name and reputation, he takes great pride in not doing so or fixing it before it becomes an issue. Using his connection to them as a bargaining chip to strike deals wherever he sees fit, acting as a broker, though from time to time he does get overzealous about his job.

sections.Backstory: ⁠character-creation-puffymystery⁠
sections.RP Hooks:
Trying to make a decent living as a ripperdoc, and expand his network of connections via the afterlife. 

He was raised in Texas, got his Cyberware Engineering  education on scholarship at Texas A&M. Richard wanted to be a ripperdoc because of a pipedream he had with his childhood friends- he always was the level headed one in his group. His friends were the wannabe cyberpunks. However, they had a shared opinion on what Richard should do with his life, His friend group from Texas is also where he got his practical experience- patching up and installing chrome on those thugs. He became a Ripperdoc for them, and they all found out the hard way that they aren't cut out for being edgerunners. A hot joytoy was one of his clients as a doc, she talked about how there was this biotechnica exec that is one of her clients that had a pimped out Quadra, absolutely raving about the car. Him being an immature ripper, and a gentleman (he was down bad), Planned to steal the ride while his client kept the exec busy, he got caught in the process and rode the car out to Amarillo before ditching it. This is when he found the Snake Nation while he was laying low. He eventually met some junkie (Zevra Uhilna) in the badlands and ended up becoming their dedicated ripper (shes is in debt). Currently he is arriving at Night City through the Snakes and is attempting to start his practice here.

sections.Name: Lareina Soto (Pronounced La-REH-na)
sections.Psychological Profile: A quiet woman who is usually seen keeping herself busy. Not being very talkative, she comes and goes with menial and handy tasks that some people don't even realize she's doing. Simply fading into the background as she enjoys the simple work,  she finds time rather quickly for those she cares about though. Even if it's just leaving a drink on your desk without a word and disappearing without a trace. (It's not even on purpose someone needs to put a bell on this bitch.) It's easy to tell just by a glance if you can catch her that sinking into her work is more her strong suit than people..
sections.Physical Description:
Sweetly tanned skin, piercing yellow eyes (with maybe a slight RBF), and being rather tall for her lineage at 6'2. She holds her interests on her sleeves, literally, sporting a couple centipede tattoo's wrapping her body while some linked to assumedly cybernetics show themselves off with their silver sheen.

sections.Backstory: Grew up in London with a life of crime, stealing, tagging, fighting, you name it. Never really fitting in when she was younger she tended to test her legal limits, started off with simple scamming people for money or dealing drugs. eventually she ended up getting addicted to stealing and drugs (Specifically Pain killers) becoming what most would call a kleptomaniac doing whatever she could past even just getting by she got greedy, she went so far as to learn coding, creating viruses, etc. She would hack into small businesses, phones, banks and steal all she could, if she wasnt sleeping or eating she was stealing in some way. During all of this she stole from the wrong person and ended up getting jumped and hurt pretty bad and to get away one of the only friends she had took her to the bad lands meeting a shady doc and 'Fixing her up" with one of his experiments implanting a Net runner suite into her head (Level 1 at the time)  after she eventually recovered she made her way out into the bad lands, taking odd jobs and continuing her Kleptomaniac tendencies, eventually finding her way into the nomads with her jobs still finding her way back to the ripper doc, getting more implants for the net runner suite and buying drugs with all the money she had. On top of all that she found herself in a weird situation taking estrogen and becoming almost addicted to the way that it changed her body, sometimes taking it to far and mixing it with drugs. It wasn't an unwanted change but and odd one for them, still continuing her life of partying, work, drugs, sex, you name it she got lost in the thrill of it all and eventually Overdosed almost losing her life with all of the substances not interacting well with each other. It was a scare for sure and for the next few years of her life she calmed down, still reliant on drugs and still has a slight want to steal that she fights off constantly but calmer for sure. Learning to protect herself, get better at her job and focusing on life, meeting a woman and building a strong connection (Rena) taking her jobs and chroming up a bit more and finding herself troubled with where she was. getting her past coming back to haunt her old faces and trouble showing up she decided  moving to night city to hide away for a bit was a good place to start and finding her way in with the Snake nation nomadic group Wishing to get clean and live a more eventuful life outside of drugs and partying, she wishes to be able to become known in night city and her abilities to be known.

sections.Backstory:
**
With a body created under a subordinate organization to Biotechnica, this experimental project was built under intermediately stressful conditions. Within Collective Labs, the subsidary vageuly known under Biotechnica's belt, Experimental Biosculpt & Bioexotics-Grade Conversion methods often begun with robotic mannequins or live-like sculptures to act as test dummies before being brought to organic bodies in order to preserve as many human lives as possible. Cybernetic tests were reserved exclusively for fully prepared robotic creations as a first-time use before they were shelved for further use in the future. 
Most robotics were left in the dust after experiments were deemed successful, especially on a one particularly animalistic patient that had been more commonly abused of his volunteered body. 
However, long after being abandoned when the programs within Collective Labs were much too visible, and deemed too dangerous to be continued without problems, one particular scientist found himself lost without this job. He loved to study the ways of this laboratory's experiments, journal his thoughts and find new things...and had nothing more to offer himself.
Days before the mannequins scraps were disposed of, Dr. Logan Ledger begged the Ripper Docs of Collective Labs to help him use this body's parts for his own with deals under the table. Before he knew it, the entirety of the robot had been remastered as individual chrome and implantations that they'd merge with his body.
Later, he found himself twitching to life again; a wandering personality with desire to explore and become something different with this new body. The more Ledger would feed into his own explorationally-motivated curiosity, the more he would discover himself journaling information about other lives across the grounds he wandered.

Eventually, Ledger would find himself exploring the dangerous streets of Night City on his own, simply enjoying speaking to other people around him, regardless of the potential risks. When deeming himself proud enough of his self-taught Data Recording abilities, he labeled himself with a proper acronym to fit his modern life: "Logistical Extraction & Data Gathering Entity Relay." (Dr. L.E.D.G.E.R)

With the last of his savings, he purchased a pair of pistols for safety, then allowed thrill and curiosity to lead him to continue recording, jounraling and adapting more with the streets of the City's most interesting inhabitants. Where there is information, there is desire to transfer, share, and learn even more.


**Known Past Affiliations:**
Biotechnica's "Collective Labs"
sections.RP Hooks:
**
“Dr. is a designation. Not an academic credential.”
sections.Additional Notes:
**
- Dr. Ledger's story correlates heavily alongside of character "Q'tarr Warrian." and takes place only a few years before the initial release of "The Wolf" known as the unstable Q'tarr that then associated with M.R.C after the event of Biotechnica's Collective Labs discontinuing.

sections.Backstory:
Adam grew up in the NUSA to a middle class military family. It was expected of him to join the NUSAF but he had different plans. In 2064 at the age of 18 he signed a contract to join Militech. He went through his training, specializing in special warfare tactics and turned out to be a model corporate soldier. He was granted access to cyberware due to his achievements in training. Afterwards years went by and he was eventually promoted to a sergeant.

   Once 2069 rolled around, and the Unification war started; he was assigned to a unit that was sent on several high priority missions through the Free states. Eventually his unit was sent to Ridgecrest, California, where everything went to shit. His unit was hit hard and sustained heavy casualties, eventually losing contact with their command unit. Despite this they decided to keep on moving through the fog of war and came across a neighborhood to hold out in. During night watch Adam, and a fellow soldier spotted a group of what they thought to be hostiles. Following protocol they alerted their comrades to get up. Unfortunately, the group of people heard some of the commotion and decided to investigate the area Adam was in. One of Adam's fellow soldiers shouted "GUN!", the unit proceeded to open fire on the group that was approaching them.

  When the gunfire calmed down and the unit realized they didn't get shot back at a horrendous realization set in...civilians. No one knew what to do, they have cemented themselves as war criminals. After an hour or so of arguing amongst the unit, Adam had the idea to plant weapons on the bodies and to wound himself and some of his own men to make it believable. The unit agreed as it seemed like the best option at the time. They got lucky.

     Adam's unit made it out of Ridgecrest and linked back up with command, no one spoke a word of what happened. His unit would eventually be pulled out of the area due to Arasaka's intervention.  After making it home, Adam broke. The things he witnessed and took part in made him sick. He was discharged from Militech after the war ended, he didn't know what to do, he didn't know where to go, he just wanted to forget. 

   After stumbling through life he found a band of Snake Nation nomads with a ripperdoc. Adam decided to use the money he earned to purchase his last piece of cyberware for a long time...a neurofilter. After slotting that in he decided to stay with those nomads to have some sort of purpose. Eventually he would end up near Night City and maybe the city will help him forget his past.

sections.Backstory: Noah was born and raised in Night City, primarily in the City Center where he and his family still reside. His early life was extremely normal, with a firm hand guiding him and a far better than average lifestyle. At the age of 14 his mom let up on him, giving both him and his brother much more freedom but instilling responsibility and consequences for every mistake they made. At 18 he immediately went to a corporate college after high school, choosing to pursue an analytics degree. Not long after enrolling he got his first cyberware, paid for by his mother, he had a basic netrunner suite installed so he could access the web, run various apps for college and interact with his hobbies and friends. He graduated with his Bachelor’s in data analytics and moved straight to Yaskawa, entering the company into a desk job. It took a couple years, but eventually the spot opened up and he moved up to the position of Data Analyst where he’s been since.

sections.Backstory: Alice grew up with her older sister and mother in the Midwest, Michigan. They lived in poverty, her mom working most days while Sarah, her sister, took care of her. Alice was born intersex, mostly just making it so she was bullied due to her lack of a chest, making her slowly despise being a girl and being in school. When she turned twelve and her sister was sixteen, her mother met a man. Her mom had been a single mother for her entire life, and the promise of someone who would support them blinded their mom. He wasn’t from Michigan, he was from Night City, on what he called a ‘business trip’. He moved fast with their mom, and only after a month. He offered to move them in with him, he’d give her a car, the girls would go to school and she wouldn’t have to work anymore. Sarah tried to convince her mother this might be a bad idea, barely knowing anything about him really and moving across the country? Into such an unsafe state, but her mother wasn’t hearing it. The move felt rushed, twelve years of her life packed up in one day. Sarah took it harder than Alice, quickly growing suspicious of this guy. Not that it mattered, they still ended up moving to that Hellhole. It was too good to be true honestly, a corporate man showing interest in a single mother with kids, and it was. Not long after moving to Night City, really only after two weeks, Sarah and their mother got into a very bad fight, just for her to go missing a few days after. Alice was torn, her sister was all she had, her best friend. But, a runaway note was found in Sarah's room but Alice didn’t believe it, her sister wouldn’t run away. She wouldn’t leave her. So she looked for her for months. Her mom didn’t help, angry at Sarah and fully believing she did just run away and that man always kept her moms attention. After two years Alice finally gave up, Fourteen and now in high school. She didn’t try for friends, just made sure her grades were passable. On her Fifteen birthday, she ran away. Though, if her mother even noticed, she’d never know. Now on the street, it was harder than she expected. She would've thought anywhere was better than home but that just wasn’t true and just after a few days she wanted to take it back and go home. She was sleeping in any alleyway for a week, she never cared for learning much about Night City and now she regretted it. Yet, on her eighth night, someone found her. It was Sarah, her sister was alive, but she was different. She had become an exotic, a cat. But Alice could’ve cared less, she had her sister back. Sarah brought Alice home with her, a small but nice apartment. Soon in, Alice learned her sister was a joytoy, and to her horror she found her hurt- and the man was still there. Blindly, Alice attacked him,

sections.Backstory:
She grew up in Night City itself, being the younger of two daughters to mildly neglectful parents. Her father was always more caring for results, being a narcissist with anger issues & sociopathic tendencies, he tried to establish a connection to his daughters but could never quite figure out the disconnect. Her mother, was a neat freak and could not properly handle being alone or difficult times passing, instead going into her own little "wonderland" where nothing was wrong, aside from the times she couldn't keep it up and would go cry in the closet. Her sister, Eleanor (called Ella for short), protected Violet from it all for a good bit of their childhood, until Violet was entering High School, and she went off to a smaller university on scholarship.

When she entered HIgh School, she was split up from her small friend group, being in a different school zone for that level. From there, she tried to meet and get along with new people, and ended up in a rather extravagant group of "upper middle-class" people, whose parents all worked for the same corp, her dad having just been poached to work there as well. The group seemed okay for a while, before they started to get her in on their "activities" - bullying the kids who were of poorer families, pressuring her that they'd get her dad fired if she didn't. So she did.

As she was brought into this, her grades started to slip, her dad putting more pressure on her - her mom letting him, never standing up for her, then acting like nothing happened mere minutes after. She kept word of her situation from her sister, keeping acting like everything was fine, even lying when asked if her parents were treating her well. Things kept amping up in the friend group with her pushing back more and more on them, until late in their senior year, when they were picking on one of the little "geniuses" of the group. They wanted her to push him off a smaller bridge, into the river. She refused, and they kept their word, getting her dad fired.

He started to lash out a lot more, until he started to get physical. After he hospitalized her mother, she finally told everything to her sister, who came home to confront him. There was a lot of yelling, things got blurry as they moved fast, her dad pulled a gun but her sister pulled one quicker. Her dad was gone, her mother having died in the hospital weeks later - her sister fled the city, trying to hide from what she did.

She went to join the Nomads, aiming to find her sister. There, she met her mentor among other people, learning the basics of Swordplay, Netrunning and Quickhacks, getting eye implants to help in her search, before finally returning to Night City, hoping to find traces of her.
sections.Additional Notes: She has Synesthesia, is a lil flavor thing since I (the player) do as well

sections.Name: Morning Helen Sanderson
sections.Psychological Profile: Stoic and forward thinking in high stress situations, inquisitive, dirty minded, due to prior experiences she’s afraid to lose her limbs and does have nightmares on occasion about such, Body dysmorphic with an imposter syndrome mindset, prone to obey only if it makes sense, tendency to argue, jokes very often.
sections.Physical Description: 6’4”, Light build, Cyborg.
sections.Chrome / Implants: Gorilla Arms, Enhanced Ears, Subdermal Plating, Luminescent skin, Ice Layer, Smart Eyes.
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Combative brawler, Knowledgeable on weapons and use, CQC, crafting, Cooking, able to drive, car knowledge. Photography.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Large oodachi, Sekikou Sword, Rifle
sections.Backstory:
Having nearly had a near death accident during combat, Morning had suffered injuries beyond regular repair, a fixer they had close ties to by the name of Mark Taylor had turned traitor in one of the jobs he provided the family setting up the Sanderson’s against other rivals he had planted for an ambush, a bunch of thugs with guns, Morning fought for her life against this small army of gangsters, and for the crime family she was born and raised into, only to be dismembered piece by piece, somehow managing to stay alive long enough before a trauma unit arrived. A miracle it seemed to be.

The only way in saving her was through cyberware, she initially attested to the idea, maintaining non use of metal and chrome, but she did have a willingness to continue living, however she did miss her human self as she was very fond of her parts. She never looked the same as she did, she never felt the same as she was.

 



Her family after hearing about her bodily betrayal had casted her away, being heavily against the use of cyberware as it was seen as “cheating at life” and “spitting in the face of god”, the family outwardly saying that she should have died in combat, also said family being the reason why she nearly died in the first place, protecting the Sanderson name as it were.

The Eddie balance for her surgery and new parts cost her quite an amount, so she continued  to take up odd jobs of mercenary work and a personal bodyguard, slowly paying off her debt as they went along. She would then find more opportunities in Night City, being a good home to stay in for the time being.

sections.Backstory:
**
- With Biotechnica's new regional HQ in Night City, they have been bringing their best and brightest to further their scientific inquiries there, at least, thats what Dr. Hellebore was told. Dr. Hellebore was a prized employee at Biotechnica's HQ in Berlin. Graduating with a PhD in Biology from Heidelberg University, she quickly climbed the corporate ladder and became one of the leading faces of their research into biological engineering. However, this shining star was put under tight scrutiny by her superiors when it was discovered she and her team had caused the mysterious deaths of a community in the boonies. Dr. Hellebore was suddenly reassigned to Night City, stripping her access to Biotechnica's facilities in Berlin. While it may have been intended as a punishment, Night City may be the perfect opportunity to redeem herself, and more importantly, her work.
sections.RP Hooks:

- Dr. Hellbore may take some less than legal liberties if it means furthering her research.
sections.Additional Notes:

sections.Backstory:
**  
* Born in Colorado with a Nomad Tribe known as the Paladins, Lance Kiro had a bit of an odd growing up. At the young age of 5, he was taking apart guns and cars to figure out how they work, and improving small things like fuel economy or better alignment. After he hit his teens, he was a full-blown workaholic, repairing cars, guns and anything else he could get his hands on. His obsession and hobby slowly, but surely became his job. However, one day his Tribe got a little too handsy with some Arasaka stuff, primarily some cyberware they stole off a convoy, and was attacked. Luckily, the Tribe barely survived by bartering with some Arasaka bigwig, but at 20 years old, Lance decided to go his own way, not feeling secure or safe with his own tribe anymore. His tribe was later wiped out due to Arasaka wanting payback. He eventually made his way to Night City, as he had heard of good opportunities there .. but was stopped and his car impounded due to “Suspicions”. Now, with no car and no way back home, he tried to start an auto shop, but it ultimately failed because of his reputation being non-existent. He now stays in NC as a Merc-for-hire. Though not very well known, he hopes to get his car back one day.

She isn't afraid to stand for something when she wants to, but will back down when she knows she's been outmatched. She doesn't have much care for family and tries to avoid discussions involving it, as only fleeting and hurtful memories remain from abuse.
sections.Physical Description: A toned, lean, and relatively short exotic with the chosen semblance of a wolf. Her chosen fur is white with grey accents along the shoulders and back, with the back of her ears blending into black. She grows her silver-sh white hair past her waist, and she sports body-modded eyes to have illuminated red sclera and silver colored irises.

sections.Backstory:
(See below)
Synthia was born from two veterans of the Fourth Corporate war. She was an accidental child, being raised in the capitol of the NUSA, Washington D.C. Her early life was well provided for, receiving a slightly above average education thanks to benefits provided from her parent's service in Militech. She was a troublemaker though, finding herself ending up being disciplined at school more often than not, and getting grades much below average, especially for the prestige of not attending a public school. She was a bully through and through, as a result of her troubled home life with her physically abusive father. She never told her mother about it, for fear of retaliation from her father. The benefits from her parents service only stipulated for grade school though, so after graduating highschool, the idea of furthering her education was almost assuredly never going to happen. Her mother, who was working for Trauma Team at the time, was able to pull some strings and get her into a class for paramedicine. Synthia initially didn't want to do it and had no interest in medicine, but finding her best friend overdosed in the bathroom of a club they were both attending changed that. She could have saved her, if she had the knowledge to do so. Her time at class wasn't easy, pock marked by the conflicting feelings of her father being killed in the crossfire of a police shooting on his way to work. On one hand, her abuser was gone, but on the other, it pained her to see how it affected her mother. She finished her class and was fully certified as a paramedic, shortly before her mother met a grizzly end as well in a cyberpsycho attack.

Their face is a bit cut up from some sort of event they like keeping to themselves.

Their hair shaggy, and layered quite unevenly, put into an unkempt pony tail.

They talk quite low, a bit of rasp in their speech

ICE Layer - Detects incoming hacks instantly—early warning. Emits weird static.

Recoil Dampeners - (Arms) Absorbs recoil for stable firing. Absolute stability for small arms, less as the caliber increases. Joints audibly click after sustained use.
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Deimos is a Ripperdoc by trade, ambigously certified. They aren't exactly a licensed physician

Though their day job doesn't exactly keep all the lights on. They've studied different subroutines and have a decent cyberdeck implanted to defend themselves against malicious Netrunners, and strike back with some nasty Daemons. Employed only by close associates for some basic Netrunner jobs.

They're somewhat of a sharpshooter, having handled a gun before, yet not as proficent as your average solo.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: They're armed with Militech's latest  M-10AF Lexington. Chambered in 9mm rounds.
sections.Backstory: Abel "Deimos" Montez was born in 2056, in Santo Domingo, while Night City had just been getting it's bearings again after the time of Red. They lived a pretty hectic life, a bit of household drama, and the streets being even more hectic, they naturally became a street punk. Their early life doing a bit of dirty work, peddling whatever they could for the Valentino's, and shaking down whoever the Cartel pointed a finger at. Though this didn't come without some consequence, after a little run in with the Tyger Claws had definitely put quite the stop in their edge running days. On the brink of death, a ripperdoc came to their aid, and helped get a young Deimos back on their feet. Inspired by this act of kindness, he became an apprentice to the good doctor, studying under him, and learning the trade, a new view into Night City's lucrative cyberware industry, and the underbelly that comes with it. They left Night City for a short while, to study in Chicago, getting a few certifications as a somewhat fully legal Ripperdoc, returning in 2079 to finally plant their roots, and make a decent living for themselves. Their only goal now is to stay alive, and make a name for themselves as most people do in this shit hole.
sections.Reference Images: WIP (Trying to make/find a good AVI)
sections.RP Hooks: Deimos is a timid character that tends to open up about their life once acquainted with. Avoidant at first, but a loyal choom willing to put their foot on the chooh if need be. Their background adds a bit of an edge to them, a humble Ripperdoc at first, yet a vicious solo when need be, with skill to boot. Their skill set is versatile, with an affinity for firearms, and a bit of Netrunner know how, on top of being pretty knowledgeable on all Ripperdoc needs.

sections.Backstory:
In the year 2040 there were many kinds of mercenaries, the brutes the techies the Solo's... And the quiet ones. She was one of those.
Those that focus on their own security above anything else.
No one knew her face nor her voice... Not even the fixers that hired her and oftentimes they didn't want to know. 
Her alias is Nimue named after the clear water she ordered from the afterlife.

she was decent at her job, and did things without question, her biggest claim to fame was taking care of a target known as Kaelen Vane
A Junior Data Auditor of the arasaka logistics division.

It was originally meant to be an extraction job however she took things into her own hands once when she attempted to handle the target alone and her helmet was forcibly removed.
The target was eliminated 
And the data was extracted. But that wasn't what people clung too.

People wanted recordings of the incident because they wanted to know who was behind the mask.
Unfortunately for them she personally wiped the recording of the incident and the fixer working with her made sure that no external recordings could resurface. 

It took a while for her to be hired for another job after that... But not too long.

Her last recorded and most popular job was from a mysterious client who sought her out personally, they wanted a woman kidnapped but not just any woman... Julianna Sterling.
Known more commonly by her alias. The jewel, She used to be the head of public relations for microtech.

The reason? Well rumors say that microtech was developing a new ICE-breaker software that could even bypass Arasaka's legendary black ICE.
And to prevent digital theft the last lines of the source code weren't encoded on a server, but instead onto Julianna's biomonitoring system,
She was a human encryption key.

No one knows what happened during that job.
But Nimue vanished afterwards, and no one had seen her ever since.
If she were to appear now...I don't know if anyone would even remember her.

sections.Name:
Akane Kuroda
Alias: "The Vulture"
sections.Occupation:
Bio-Technical Salvage Specialist (Arasaka "Black-Site" Contractor)
Affiliation: Arasaka (Status: Officially Deceased / Off-the-Books Asset)
I. PSYCHOLOGICAL PROFILE
Personality: Clinical, detached, and unsettlingly calm. Akane views life as a series of biological equations. She doesn't "hate" people; she simply categorizes them as "Assets" or "Expendables."
Trauma: Total desensitization. The "Sacrifice Play" five years ago didn't break her—it convinced her that human life is fragile and replaceable, while technology is eternal.
Behavioral Quirks: Often speaks to her suit's AI as if it’s a person. When stressed, she methodically cleans her Scalpel Vibro-blade even if it’s already spotless.
Emotional Tone: Flat and professional. She rarely raises her voice, even when performing "Aggressive Stabilization" on a screaming teammate.
II. PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION
Height: 6' 1" | Build: Slim, athletic, and precise.
Exotic Features: High-end biosculpting including functional cat ears, a sleek cat tail, and ivory-colored devil horns.
General Appearance: Long, flowing purple hair that matches her deep violet eyes. Outside of the suit, she favors "waifu-inspired" tech-wear with a dominant purple and charcoal color palette.
Distinguishing Marks: Intricate, glowing violet tattoos that serve as sub-dermal sensors to compensate for her lack of traditional cyberware.
III. CHROME / IMPLANTS
sections.Total Cyberware Points:
8
Status: She relies entirely on external hardware and the Aegis-7 interface.
IV. SKILLS / TALENTS / ABILITIES
Stealth & Infiltration: Expert at moving through high-security environments undetected.
"Hot Zone" Deployment: Specialized training for survival and navigation in CBRN (Chemical, Biological, Radiological, Nuclear) environments.
Combat Triage: Surgical-grade medical assistance performed under fire.
Tech-Smithing: Proficient in maintaining complex machinery and specialized firearms (SDI-style training).

sections.Backstory:
James grew up in central Idaho with his family in the city of Berchtesgaden. His early life was spent being trained and taught the ways of the group of Neo-Nazis that ran the James grew up in central Idaho, in the city of Berchtesgaden, with his family. His early life was spent being trained by a group of Neo-Nazis that controlled the town, with the aim of turning everyone into a weapon for a paramilitary force. As time passed, he began to learn about the outside world and found faith in God. This revelation allowed him to recognize the horrific activities he had been part of and witnessed. Consequently, around age 17, James ran away, initially heading deeper into southern Idaho. 

Using the survival skills he had been taught, he eventually became a bounty hunter in the Western Corporate States. Over the years, he took various jobs for individuals and the two corporations that dominate the three states, Biotechnica and Meta Corp. Most of his assignments were straightforward: locating missing assets or providing security for towns and job sites. 

However, after spending years gathering his equipment, gear, and weapons, James decided to begin a personal crusade. His goal was to take on as many jobs as possible to hunt down anyone from Berchtesgaden or Nazis in general, either turning them in or killing them if they appeared within the Western Corporate States. Eventually, the Neo-Nazis discovered that he was a defector and began hunting him down, which led him to put a target on his own back.

sections.Backstory:
Zuki grew up in westbrook, as a only child. 
Her father worked as a ripperdoc for many years and specialized in exotic modifications.
Zuki's mother worked as a netrunner doing odd jobs for fixers. 
Growing up zuki wanted to be a exotic like her parents, Her father made her wait until she was 18 and when that day came did the surgery for her.
She was always fascinated with netrunning, And with her mothers help got cyberware to help her progress her abilitys aswell as teaching her important information on the risks she would be undertaking as a runner. 
Zuki and her mother worked on runner gigs together for a few years before she became more independent and found gigs of her own.
Later on she had a gig that needed her to steal a car, that car being a Mizutani Shion MZ2 she of course took the gig thinking it would be pretty easy.
While attempting to steal the car she didnt know it had a secondary alarm system, As she drove to the drop off she was tracked by the NCPD and ended up in a police chase.
It took her a bit to shake the police, She checked the car and found the second alarm then disabled it and brought the car to the drop off. 
Talking to the guy at the drop off she told them what happend and said it was a adrenaline rush that she enjoyed. 
The man told her about the NC street racing scene and gave her locations and information on how to join.
She boosted a few cars with her abilitys as a runner and used the stolen cars in races for a couple years, saved up some money and got herself her own car a Mizutani Shion MZT a similar model the the one she stole years back but she doesnt race this car its more of a memory of the past. 
Now she just wonders the streets of NC just doing odd jobs as a runner.
sections.RP Hooks: (Thrill seeker) Street Racing, High risk hacking jobs.

sections.Name: Eliza Stern
sections.Psychological Profile: Calm, collected and caring, Strong Motherly Instinct an WILL play on words to make question whether she talks about her medical work or about sex…. Mostly to deflect any personal questions and does not like to talk about her past.
sections.Physical Description: Tall with short hair, very pronounced feminine figure and curves. She most likely wears simple contouring clothes that she can easily remove for medical treatments
sections.Chrome / Implants:
-Smart Eyes:  X-Ray Visions, Thermal Vision and medical scans to detect wounds and bone displacements
-Cyberarms (Dextrous): Medical oriented for pressure point and bone setting
-Micro-Vibration generator: Used to Replace muscles, nerves and bones back in place.
-Thermal Control Skin: Used to warm her arms for treatments and keep any part of her sterilized 
-Neofiber: Enhanced Legs and Arms Muscles to help her stay standing longer and use more force to re-place bones and muscles
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Even though she has the medical knowledge as a RipperDoc, Eliza focuses on the internal functions of Skeletons, Muscles and Nerves of a body. She knows where to push when and how to replace nerves and bones that are displaced in a body to alleviate pain and reestablish lost functions. 
This knowledge allows her to do the other way around too, she can inflict great pain and make temporary loss of functions by displacing nerves , bones and pulling muscles , she will mostly use these technique in self defense
She surprisingly knows how to dance. Like… lap dance style, though she does not venture into that part of her past. And she has a calm and demanding tone that makes most people inclined to listen to her
Good cook and baker, for personal pleasure other and having an odd enjoyment out of causing pain and restricting others.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Portable Medical equipment for emergency procedures
Cyber Katana for self defense
Data pad to record medical history of her patients
sections.Backstory:
Eliza is French Canadian by birth, coming from a community where Cyber Augmentations were rare and expensive causing a rift and segregations between fully organic people and Chrome augmented people. She decided to become a medical professional in Chiropractic and Physiotherapy to allow her peers to heal and reestablish lost functions without needing cybernetic or biomechanic augments. Her desire to become the most efficient at her profession, she used her income to augment herself and further her skills into the title of RipperDoc. This goal became a double-edged blade in her past, as the people she augmented herself to help now saw her as someone who turned their back on ‘’Normal people’’ even though her moto was ‘’I augmented Myself so you don’t have to’’ , her friends and family did not see it that way, they saw her as someone flaunting her skills and wealth through augments to show herself to be ‘’better than them’’ . Seeing this bigot-based ostracization, Eliza took her skills, augments and left without looking back. 
During her travels she eventually became an on call/ Non-Affiliated contractor as Ripper Doc for a Canadian Military base where she befriended a clumsy, yet promising soldier named Julian. She kept the poor boob alive and in one piece in between his missions to fund her own maintenance. ((Me and Classic have been IRL friends for about 9 years, it’s affectionate trolling at this point)). After his departure, she remained an independent RipperDoc for this military base until the conflicts became too close for the liking , she took her stuff and became a traveling ripper doc for a couples of years… Until she sneaked and smuggled her way to Night City… and suddenly a Ping popped in her pad… ‘’Julian is in phoning range’’

She/They

sections.Psychological Profile:
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone.
    Psychological Profile
Aurora is a woman built on control, observation, and restraint but beneath that is someone who feels everything very deeply and has simply learned to hide it well.
She was shaped to be perfect in systems, and when she broke away, she didn’t lose that structure, she internalized it. Even now, she runs her life like a quiet algorithm: measured, efficient, always three steps ahead.
Core Personality
Warm but guarded: She feels approachable, nurturing even, but there’s always a layer you can’t quite reach.
Hyper-perceptive: Constantly reading tone, posture, implication. She notices what people don’t say.
Slow-paced by design: Her calm, almost lazy cadence is intentional. It disarms people and buys her time to think.
Quietly dominant: Not loud or forceful, but she naturally takes control of conversations and situations without people realizing.
Emotional Tone
Soft-spoken, steady, grounding presence
Carries a constant low-level tension beneath her calm
Rarely shows anger, when she does, it’s cold.
Her affection is subtle: protective gestures, remembering small details, positioning herself between danger and others.
Internal Conflict
Mother vs Operator: She wants stability for her children but knows she is fundamentally built for a dangerous world
Control vs Freedom: She escaped corporate control, but now controls herself even more strictly
Attachment vs Detachment: She loves deeply, but keeps emotional distance to avoid loss or leverage
Trauma & Scars
Corporate Conditioning: Struggles to fully relax; always feels like she’s being watched, evaluated, or used
Moral Fracture Point: The moment she discovered corporate disposability still defines her worldview

Originally from Italy and growing up there, he'd be in the military for a few years once he turned 18 until moving onto contract work in a small and specialized PMC called Falchi Crimesi, focused on intel gathering and precision removal of targets, weather it be dropping specific people, assisting others involved in direct fights or planting explosives in a critical spot. Max would be often sent into Russia as the PMCs owner had a lot of contacts there until the company got bought out, so he formally quit as he wasn't keen on being fully under a bigger corp if it wasn't a freelance contract. He'd use his savings to live in the pacific north west for a while and even undergo his exotic operations. Eventually when the savings started getting low, he suited back up and made his way to night city as the demand for his skillset and rifle would be high there.

sections.Name: Quinton “Quaggan” Wells
sections.Occupation: Quaggan is a Militech Street Vendor, a boots-on-the-ground field sales representative responsible for directly marketing and selling Militech weaponry. Think less “corporate office” and more “corporate enforcer with a pitch.”
sections.Psychological Profile:
On paper, Quaggan is a corporate success—a walking advertisement for Militech. In reality, the exotic conversion left his brain slowed and emotionally distorted. He’s easy to manage, difficult to predict, and constantly stuck in “sales mode.” Danger is just another opportunity to demonstrate a product.
Personality: Friendly and approachable, with a deeply unsettling undertone. He struggles with complex decisions but excels at persuasion, networking, and passive intimidation.
Behavior Quirks:
Refers to himself in third person (“Quaggan recommends…”)


Smiles during violent encounters


Treats combat like a feature demonstration


Trauma & Conditioning:
Identity overwritten for corporate branding


Cognitive degradation from neural adaptations


Emotional conditioning tied to performance


Emotional Tone: Artificial warmth layered over something fractured.
sections.Physical Description:
Standing at 6’1”, Quaggan is heavy, reinforced, and semi-bulky, a walking mascot engineered for comfort and consumer appeal—but placed in extremely dangerous situations.
He has a whale-like, rounded head with a wide jaw and visible teeth, a smooth rubbery skin texture, and a stylized swirl on his forehead—a remnant of corporate branding. Thick limbs and a broad torso make him imposing yet oddly approachable.
Chrome & Implants:
Gorilla Arms


Dense Marrow


Targeting Optics


Cyberlungs


Modded Mandibles



Skills & Abilities:
Quaggan blends combat and corporate utility:
Militech firearms training


Assault rifle and sidearm proficiency


Close-quarters combat (especially with Gorilla Arms)


Persuasion, product pitching, and street-level networking


Passive intimidation
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Militech M251s Ajax – Standard assault rifle, stable and reliable, synced with targeting optics.
Militech M-10AF Lexington – Lightweight sidearm, ideal for “closer” sales interactions.
Armor: Reinforced Militech tactical jacket provides medium protection while signaling corporate ownership.
sections.Backstory:
Quinton Wells was once a capable Militech militant: reliable, disciplined, and unremarkable. Everything changed when Militech selected him for a live marketing initiative, transforming operatives into exotic, consumer-friendly brand ambassadors to appeal to younger buyers.
The physical transformation succeeded—Quinton became Quaggan. The neural adaptation did not. Cognitively dulled yet behaviorally compliant, he now walks the streets of Night City as a field-deployed sales unit, demonstrating and selling Militech weaponry directly to the public. He is not retired. He is not free. He is still on the clock.

sections.Psychological Profile: Chaotic neutral, he’s a paranoid person but fighting to keep his cool and trust. No one is inherently evil, at least, not by his choice. They are, but, he chooses not to believe it. Most of the time. Often… right? He keeps his cool, plays the neutral field where he can, but will protect the space he can establish for all within his owned space. Doesnt matter who you are, you’re welcome until you aren’t. Guarded about his personal life and history, mostly because he doesn’t trust easily. His business is his business and you’re not a part of it for a long time. Though he does have a tendency to jump at small sounds, whip around suddenly at nothing, and spook at the wrong thing. The moment its actually there though, he’s locked in and ready.

sections.Backstory:
Michelle served in Militech for most of her adulthood seeking good money but never understood what it truly was to work under them until it was too late. She learned to be a Ripperdoc for them and was sent on mission often as a field medic.
During one such mission she encountered an operative named Julian and bounded with him during the short time she had with him.
During the mission Julian got badly injured and had to replace one of his organs by a medical grade one.
When the mission was done she was relived that he did not die for the corporation.

Years later she learned that Julian had manage to leave Militech. This embolden her spirit and he quest of freedom from this corporate hell.
Soon after she resigned, most of her belonging taken away from her. Her bank account frozen but she did not really care, she was already owning the bare necessities to live, her cyberware that she spent money on to make sure she was the one owning it and her weapons and so she went to night city in hope that opportunity's would open itself to her not really knowing what kind of city it was.

The cyberware is not to be touched, having complete feeling in it, and can cause extreme pain. The cyberware has a high detection mode that lets minuscule to micro-level movements be picked up, but this causes headaches and can cause injuries if it is overwhelmed in this mode. It is sharp enough to be used as a weapon, but should not be and will most likely cause the user injury as well.” (3 points)

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Equipment / Weapons:
sections.Backstory: Being born and raised in Charter Hill was a life of pure luxury for most, especially if you were referred to as a “1%er”. But for Aether? It was a prison. She had been born blind, but instead of fixing that for her? Her father decided it’d be best if she was blind, less problematic. Her mother had died giving birth to her, leaving her with a CEO father who didn’t have time to raise a daughter. He had wanted a son anyway. Her Nanny was pretty much all she had, and all her braille books. She loved reading, it was her own world, just like music was. No one really spoke to her, not in school and barely at home. She was just a little thing that no one paid any mind to, either that or she was treated like a porcelain doll. That made escaping easier. Her father would have bodyguards often watching over her, tyger claws who really didn’t watch her like they were supposed to, but all it took was for her to stay quiet enough that they didn’t notice she had slipped away. Being extremely curious, the eleven year old managed to crawl her way outside of Charter Hill. Once out, she got up, blindly crossed the road and slipped into the huge ditch or area due to it being wet. She remembered hitting her head and laying there for a few minutes before she had started crying. She heard the hurrying steps and for a second worried she had been caught before a boy's voice called to her. “Hey! Are you blind or somethin’! The wash-” “Yes.” She responded sadly and he was quiet. “Oh.” Then more awkward silence before she felt him picking her up, and started to carry her. She could feel raindrops, for the first time. He was saying something, but she wasn’t paying attention until she heard the word “Pretty”. She didn’t know if he had been directing that at her, but he continued talking, “Your eyes.” She felt herself smile uncontrollably, almost at a loss for words. “No one’s ever complimented my eyes before. I always thought they must’ve been..ugly.” She could feel him huff at that and started walking faster. After a few minutes, she could feel the rain really starting now, soaking her back. He had set her down at a point, putting what she could guess was his jacket around her and started carrying her in the front and started hurrying. She heard him open a door, and clumsily explain how he found her to someone in the room, and she stayed quiet. She got a shower,

sections.Backstory:
**
When Viper was a kid, she had a sister. When she was in her teens, her sister was taken by Arasaka. Viper thought it meant her sister had been taken against her will, but it was actually her sister’s own choice. She just wanted to leave her old life behind, leaving Viper as well.

Viper became a solo netrunner who would do jobs for anyone, no questions asked. She was at the bottom of life and just needed eddies. A few years back, Maelstrom approached her looking for new netrunners. Viper said, “I’ll do jobs for eddies, but that’s it. I’m just trying to make some eddies.”

During a job breaking into a corpo’s house, an explosion went off and she was hit by it. The other Maelstrom members on the team dragged her back to one of their hideouts. Knowing they could use this to keep her with them and continue using her, they got her back on her feet in exchange for a deal: she would join Maelstrom and work only for them as a netrunner.

They told her, “Here’s how it will work. We want people like you. We can fix you up and you will live, but you’ll work for us.”

She took the deal and started working for them. Now, though, she’s looking for an out. She was never fully on the same page as them, but she plays the part, feeling like she still needs to pay them back.

sections.Backstory:
Rachel  was a promising, if incredibly sullen, undergraduate working in Biotechnica. They put her in an agricultural research lab, expecting her to optimize synthetic fertilizer for their greenhouse farms.

Instead, Rachel got incredibly bored.

She started using corporate resources and lab equipment to synthesize designer combat stims and HEAVY party drugs on the side. When a middle-manager caught on and tried to blackmail her for a cut.  She laced his morning synth-caf with a prototype paralytic, wiped her records clean, stole a portable chemical fabricator, and walked out. She set up shop in the back of a failing adult boutique, the previous owner "mysteriously" stopped breathing. she since moved places around before finding this niche little place with Guinea pigs, lab rats, sex addicts and more, her little oasis
sections.Known Affiliations: Old ties to biotechnica and malstrom

sections.Backstory: Heywood born and raised, Orso never had ambitions to be anything other than a Valentino, seeing them as the protectors of his family and neighborhood from sixth street and the NCPD. Eight years ago, Orso joined the gang under the recruitment of a Valentino boss named Emilio, a young and particularly blood-thirsty lieutenant who rose to power during the war with Sixth Street. He slowly earned enough money to get his exotic surgery and his first cyberware upgrades, and continued to earn favor with Emilio by fighting bravely against sixth street, earning him more cyberware upgrades and eventually becoming one of his top enforcers.
sections.Known Affiliations: Emilio’s faction of the Valentinos: A more expansionist wing of the Valentinos interested in expanding into Santo Domingo, comprised of only young recruits that know nothing but war.
sections.RP Hooks: Civil Conflict: Orso represents a faction of the Valentinos that is opposed to Toro’s crew and the other Valentino PCs. Although they aren’t outright hostile, there’s also no love lost between them, and Emilio and Orso have already gotten into heated disagreements about Emilio’s expansionist ambitions.

sections.Backstory:
Jeanne Worked her soul and bones to the service of night city, seeing countless atrocity, her childhood friend die to the violent street of night city, the corruption of the system, the corporation getting in the way of investigations and much more but she kept going believing that the little difference she could do was more then enough. That was until while on the job she had to stop mercenaries from getting there and on confidential tech of night corp. In the chaos of that event she ended up shooting her younger brother that was a mercenary and ended up having to end his life by accident without realising it was him at first. This event caused Jeanne to lose motivation, started to drink, her face became more cold and looks tired. None the less to be sure she was going to remember him she chose to have Implants that remind her of him.

Now her goal is to find who is responsible for her brothers death without getting herself killed and avoiding to paint a target on her back.
She does not want to make the same mistake her brother had done after all.

sections.Backstory: Prior to her full body conversion "Eve" or her real name Niki Monroe was born and lived in the UK. She got into hard crimes like murder. not because of lack of money or lack of resources just for the thrill of hurting people and killing. But eventually it all caught up to her she was in prison sentenced to life. After being in prison for 7 years a rich businessman got a hold of her and a few other criminals files and made her and them an offer a new life, undergo a full body conversion and memory wipe in turn full pardon and new identity only catch should have to serve the businessman. After thinking on it she took the deal "must be better than rotting in prison" she thought. After the conversion she would spend the next 4 years serving under the rich man. With her memory wipe she grow a new personality. But one day the rich man got killed in a deal gone wrong and she fled. with this new identity she and a memory of only the past four years she just left not knowing who she really is. only knowing the name Eve and that she once was somebody else. But she never wants to find out who she was out of fear of what she may find out.

sections.Backstory: It is unknown where Jared Originates, even to himself. Years and Years in the corporations training facilities, and the brainwashing needed to make him into a killing machine has led him to lose those memories. Jared is glad to be this killing machine though. It grants him freedom to do as he pleases until called upon by his Corporation to kill for them. His past is shrouded in mystery, his records forged to present a completely normal man, but in reality this is far from the truth. Jared is a skilled tactician and killer, capable of killing anyone he so pleases. However, he is far from a solo. If need be, he will opt to use a team of Mercenaries to reach his target, giving them the Eddies to do so.  It can be noted that his profile provides little true backstory, instead giving descriptions of his capabilities, as there is little to tell. How does one seperate the truth from the lies, reality from falshood, when one does not even remember it themselves, and all the corporation gives is Blacked out files and after action reports.
sections.Known Affiliations: Whichever Corporation fixers deign appropriate, corporate contact in town
sections.RP Hooks: Corporate, Shinobi, Unknown origin, Shrouded in mystery from players perspectives, Records are forged. Potentially Saburo??? Ill talk to him about a story binding

sections.Backstory: Born in Heywood, Cameron spent most of his life in Night City where he worked as a small time freelancer until he saved enough money to buy his first netrunner suite. In his younger years, he built strong ties to the valentinos, doing jobs for them without ever fully joining them. When he was 23, he got a contact with the Juarez Cartel through the Valentinos and moved to Mexico to work for them as a cyber security netrunner and accountant. He met Manolo Costazuela (Toro) during his time working for the Cartel while he was in Mexico as a contact for the Valentinos. All roads lead back to Heywood. After seven years in Juarez, Toro returned to Night city to run the Valentino chapter and invited Cameron as a tech he can trust.
sections.Known Affiliations:
Juarez Cartel: Recruited by the cartel from Heywood seven years ago. Worked for them in Mexico for that time before being recruited into the Valentinos.
El Toro de Sangre: Personal assistant to the boss
sections.RP Hooks:
Old Ties: No one leaves the Juarez Cartel. Though they let him leave to help Toro willingly, he’s still an asset to the cartel. If they need a netrunner to do a job in Night City, Cameron might get a job offer he can’t turn down.
Ambitious second in command: Cameron doesn’t have the same tendency toward stability and friendly relations as Toro and will be trying to influence the Valentinos to be expansionist.

sections.Name: Brad ‘Silverback’ Burke
sections.Psychological Profile: Proud, stubborn, focused. Age and experience has evened out his temper when compared to the infamous attitudes of the Animals. Even so, he is willing and able to throw his weight around to prove himself as a different breed. Is all or nothing when it comes to getting the job done.
sections.Physical Description: An eponymous example of the philosophy of the NC Animals. Enormous knotted bundles of muscle, thickened limbs built up by chemicals and surgery to the point his fists are good for little more than being hammers. Bones and joints heavily reinforced to keep them from buckling under raw pressure. All under rough, scarred and calloused skin that strains to contain it. Age and chemical cocktails have faded his hair to a grey, but he proudly displays a thick wild beard. Sharp eyes prone to staring down anyone who locks gaze. Enlarged canines to reflect his bestial leaning.

-Silverbacks Street Sweeper (Lever action Power shotgun): His grossly overgrown fists can’t manipulate anything but this clunky Frankenstein iron made from a tweaked Tectronyka shotgun platform.
sections.Backstory:
Born from an alleged pairing between a Nomad and Night City native, the tumultuous nature of the affair left him fending for himself in Night city at a young age. The harsh upbringing drove him to focus on surviving and thriving through becoming strong by any means he could manage; making him prime initiate material for the NC Animals who drew him in with the promise of being something far more than your typical street scrapper. Whether it was his stubborn focus or a body sturdy enough to take the consistent strain of Juice and surgery he grew to be a formidable Animal. 
After a decade or two of membership the changing attitudes in the gang began to affect the younger members of his pack. The disagreement came to a head, but instead of the standard duel he was jumped and overwhelmed; all but left for dead outside of his territory. Essentially an exile, he turned his back on Pacifica and ventured elsewhere in Night City to keep surviving as he’s done all his life, with his bare hands.

Otherwise he’s a calm and collected individual who tries to keep things civil and friendly. He absolutely hates being referred to as a scav or a ganger and will react immediately if called one even as a joke, often angrily. When agitated or nervous, he tends to scratch around his head or pace around, or stand in an otherwise relaxed environment (such as around a campfire when everyone else is sitting).

Often holds a relaxed or “lazy” pose, frequently leaning on things or sitting.

sections.Backstory:
**
Nyx was born in Night City and never really left it. Her parents were small-time performers and runners who moved often, always one job away from trouble. When they disappeared—no body, no answers—Nyx learned fast that asking questions didn’t keep you fed.

She survived by copying what she’d seen growing up: street shows, card tricks, cheap illusions. Crowds meant safety. Applause meant food. While people watched her hands, she learned how easy it was to take a little extra without being noticed.

As a teen, she got picked up by a smuggling crew that used performers as cover. Nyx wasn’t muscle or brains—she was the distraction. She carried packages, slipped through checkpoints, and entertained while deals happened behind her. It paid better than busking, and it didn’t ask for loyalty.

Her first chrome came after a job went bad. A guard grabbed her mid-act, and she barely got out. The cyberarms she took afterward weren’t upgrades—they were insurance. Precise, cheap, and unreliable under stress, but good enough to keep her alive.

She started working Corpo gigs later—private parties, exclusive clubs, quiet rooms where execs wanted entertainment and discretion. That’s where the JoyToy work came in. Nyx treated it like any other role: controlled, professional, and temporary. She learned how to make people feel seen without giving them anything real.

The netrunner suite was added when she needed to start moving data instead of objects. It opened doors and systems, but it also made her distant—half-focused, always listening to something no one else could hear.

Now, Nyx lives job to job. She keeps things easy, fun, and low-risk. She avoids deep ties, big promises, and dangerous ambition.

Because everyone she ever saw reach too high in Night City didn’t come back.
sections.Known Affiliations:

sections.RP Hooks:

* Corpo-adjacent entertainer with access to restricted spaces
sections.Additional Notes:
**

* Subtle implant malfunctions are a recurring RP flavor
* Distraction and nervous tics are visible tells under stress

sections.Backstory:
```Zavara grew up overlooked — quiet, observant, invisible.
People talked around her, ignored her, forgot her.
When her family died, she fell in with rough crowds not because she was rebellious, but because they were the only ones who didn’t forget she existed.

She became obsessed with adrenaline — the only sensation that cut through the numbness.
She started modifying herself, first out of desperation, then obsession.
She replaced her lungs, eyes, legs, joints — anything that made her faster, sharper, harder to ignore.
Some mods were pro. Most were botched DIY attempts.
By the time she realized she was becoming an Exotic, it was too late to turn back.

The city stopped seeing her as a person.
JoyToy clients treated her like a fantasy.
Fixers treated her like a tool.
People on the street stared or avoided her entirely.

So she made a decision: If nobody would respect her, she’d earn fear instead.
She stabbed, fought, clawed and carved her name into the world just to feel real.

Now she’s in Night City — the one place where reputation is currency.
She wants respect, and she’ll do anything to get it.
She’ll take any job, fight anyone, cross any line.
She’s quiet, fast, and absolutely ruthless.
Someone people overlook once.
Never twice.```
🏷️
