sections.Name: Reiga
sections.Occupation:
Mercenary (Solo)
Personality: Protective, loyal, and caring. Reiga is a heroic individual. If someone is in danger and needs help, she’s the first to rush over to help. “Why should you care?” people ask her. She says that “This world of ours is based on people taking advantage of kindness. Nonetheless I want to make the world kinder so I’ll happily put the work in to help make that happen despite the consequences for myself. A kinder world equals a kinder future for all.” Is what she believes in.
sections.Physical Description:
Reiga is a 6 '11 exotic, her body completely modified to look like an anthropomorphic hyena. Her body is covered in the modification markings. Her fur color is a dark cyan blue while her hair’s tips glow bright blue, her eyes a blue with a green tint. She wears a simple shirt and shorts casually but when in combat or out and about she wears a combat jacket and combat pants with a cute top.

Her casual shirt and combat jacket has the mox logo on them, she is a big fan and wants to eventually join and help with their efforts.

  Chrome / Implants (Weakness are italicized)
Gorilla Arms - 2 points
Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical Domination. +50% strength
Always looks bulky or a bit too heavy, no fine tactile sense, doesn’t enhance stamina. 

Midnight Lady - 1 point
Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules
Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if over used.

Neo Fiber - 3 points
Synthetic muscle fibers for increased strength. 30% strength gain.
Occasionally muscle stiffness and unnatural posture.

CyberLeg - 2 points
Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast.
Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn’t enhance stamina.

Scent Scanner - 1 Point
Track people or chemicals by smell. Smell blood, oil, etc.
Overwhelmed in clubs, alleys, combat. Sometimes gags from sensory overload.

Total points = 9

sections.Occupation:

sections.Physical Description:

She wears purple shades to mask her eyes at times. She’s a 5’10 human with minimal visible cyberwear with her face being slightly changed. 

  Chrome / Implants

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Stealth, On the move network dismantling, parkour, biker!
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Militech pistol; 9mm. Advanced Crossbow w/ Dense armor piercing steel bolts.
sections.Backstory:
Quinn was born into a corpo connected family with militech. Her father was a branch supervisor within the Marketing wing. Her expenses were paid when she went to Night City’s Academy, scoring marks in Network Establishment and Creation. She was on a straight shot to earning a somewhat normal quiet life until a rival company had sent a merc to her family, it was a very quiet job, all it took was a couple hours for her to come back home to see her father, fatally shot in the chest. Taking matters into her own hands, she swears that before the city swallows her whole, she uses her learned skills to dismantle and destroy any network until she finds the killer responsible for her fathers death. The mother is currently missing as well, ever since the night.

Okay a few questions

Why would a rival corp kill a marketing supervisor? Why would they care?
What happened to their mother?
Does she have any leads?
Does quinn have any hopes and dreams outside finding her fathers killer?
What is she gonna do if she finds his killer?
Do you have any idea who is actually going to be the killer? Any plans with other players by chance?
When did the death of her father happen? How many years has it been?
 
<@266134413153140737> | Quinn
Chromia | Quinn

 — 3/4/2026 6:07 AM
Oki! I’ll try to answer these questions as best as possible.

Marketing supervisors tend to be the face of a lot of sales trades and even on media, if militech was selling millions of eddies worth of product one way to significantly stain an image is to show fragility, hence the assassination put the father on a fast path to being zero’d
The mother is currently off grid even to Quinn’s knowledge. I haven’t really made up my mind as to where but I’d like for the RP to develop it naturally where I could potentially interlink it with another persons backstory or have a fixer make a point around it. Very up in the air but the one solid bit of evidence is that the mother is still alive, no body found.
Her only lead as of the moment is that arasaka could be involved in the decision but don’t have solid evidence to back it up. The only thing she got from the scene was the caliber round that did the job, and it was highly distributed between gangs.
Her hopes and desires are to try to get some semblance of normalcy after her job is done, and have hopefully enough eddies to live a quiet life she really wants. But more than anything she doesn’t want to die alone.
She.. actually doesn’t know. I know she’d go for the kill obviously but realistically if she actually caught him she’d freeze up, and it would have to be decided through her connection of friends she would make to help her along.
I haven’t made plans as to who the killer is, I’m probably gonna talk to a fixer about that or collab with another PC to determine it. Alike to what one of my other answers are, it’s very open ended.
5 years ago!

sections.Backstory:
Early life brought Lycoris to the city trying to make it big, jobs ranging from fast food sign twirling to small commercial spots positioned her to "make it big" in media by working with NCPD as a living character model.

Due to a lawsuit targeting NCPD over intellectual property and expenses exceeding allowable measures the program was discontinued forcing her to move into private employment or head into JoyToy territory. An accident on-set caused the at the time canid to lose a large portion of their facial chrome and embrace a “Skull Dog” appearance. Lives in a small apartment in (B)eastside near  the bridge  at south Kabuki.
sections.Known Affiliations: Previously employed by the NCPD using a modeling program to gain access to exotic implants. Debt collectors receive regular payments.
sections.RP Hooks: Might be recognized as an NCPD PR story from a few years back, now modeling and paying off exotic enhancements to a small-yet-dedicated independent media following.
sections.Additional Notes: Characters' goals are to move away from living hand-to-mouth with large amounts of debt, to climbing the social ladder. Inspiration for this character was taken from Gigolo Joe from the movie A.I. Artificial Intelligence aimed towards being a support for other characters. Despite the inspirational character she has entirely human/organic origins and is actually phobic of Artificial Intelligence refusing to use the Delemain cab system or automated driving systems.

Siren is known to Carry small pouches of Powdered Scopolamine (Angel Dust)  In her lip that she can release as a last ditch effort to disable attackers or lull targets into a state of disasociative disagreement. The drug is blown on targets as a pink powder. Because of how small the dose is, and her over-exposure to it, Siren feels no ill effects 
other than a headache the next day.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: advanced lockpick set. Prosthetic tail can be used as a mass trauma blunt weapon if needed.
sections.Backstory:
Siren is a new implant to Night city, originally from the northern section of America.  While siren was American born, she was abandoned in Columbia by her birth parents around age 17. She became very familiar to the brothel houses and redlight districts; many ladies of the night saw her as a little sister figure, they taught her how to manage on her own - eventually picking up her "Angel Dust" trick that leaves targets stunned and in a tranced state of complacency. Siren managed to make her way back to the US after she turned 26, and a year long  journey north to try and reconnect with her family where she was born, she found naught but an abandoned house. She realized that, having no skills that apply to that region of the country, she was better suited to city life, so off to Night City she went, having heard the litany of rumors about it from dozens of people while on her journey. 

Taking advantage of the 0 affiliations and nothing following her from her upbringing, Siren hopes to have an open ear into all of the Cities juiciest details and rumors. Taking on a Shark exotic frame shortly after ariving, realizing just how much allure a slick skinned woman is to the city. Not afraid to use her attractions to get herself into places and near very influenial people - Passing rumors and information that could very well end a life, demolish a gang, or rebuild an entire sector of night city.

Siren is very friendly, charming, and very smooth with her words. Always happy to have a new conversation, and eager to make new connections.

sections.Backstory:
Sienna was born in LA to her fathers gang, a mid level gang built from strife and survival that LA causes. Around her late teens and early 20s she meets a girl named Katherine while on an assignment. The two spent some time together Katherine revealed she was more or less on her own and had a gift for tech and cybernetics. So Siennas father brought her into the gang and their ripperdoc, giving her a workplace/ lab to tend to the members of the gang that had cyber enhancements. About a year later sienna and Katherine got married. About 9 years after that one man changed everything, Spade, he had snuck into their hideout to find Katherine and was laying In wait. Sienna came home to find the hideout not empty but quiet, quieter than usual. Fast forward about an hour and she’s being held at gunpoint in a hostage situation by spade infront of Katherine. One moment they’re standing there the next the lab has been blown up, all three are injured but alive, spade standing over Katherine talking with her. After sometime recovering from their injuries they find themselves following spade to night city, why? Sienna doesn’t know but she assumes for a fresh start. To this day she has no idea why or who blew up her home. 

For further clarification Amdigrego, Bellsheeo and I have our characters intertwined by lore, so it’s all generally the same night for all three of them

sections.Name: Mellow Ainsley
sections.Occupation:
High-End Casino Host / Dice Runner at Ace Casino

---

Psychological Profile
Mellow is composed to the point of being unsettling. She rarely raises her voice. When others escalate, she slows down. When someone rages, she softens.

That calm is not entirely natural.

Years of corporate behavioral conditioning shaped her into a stabilization asset. She instinctively de-escalates conflict and absorbs tension in a room. However, prolonged emotional suppression has left her somewhat detached from her own feelings. She struggles with intense emotional attachment and often processes danger intellectually before emotionally.

She avoids violence whenever possible. If tension rises, she redirects it. If someone becomes aggressive, she stabilizes the room rather than overpowering it.

Her greatest fear is losing autonomy and being reclaimed as corporate property.

---

Physical Description
Height: 5’9”
Build: Lean, athletic
Exotic Type: Bio-sculpted human (Monarch aesthetic)

Mellow is biologically human but underwent full-body cosmetic gene tailoring and dermal restructuring. Her skin carries subtle purple undertones with warmer gradients across her torso and limbs. Bioluminescent patterning across her back and shoulders resembles monarch markings when activated, though it is purely integumentary.

When her system activates, small bioluminescent micro-drones deploy from concealed dermal housings, hovering near her body in the shape of drifting butterflies.

Her presence feels warm, controlled, and strangely grounding in low light.

---

Chrome / Implants
Integumentary System:
• Bio-Sculpted Exotic Frame

Full-body cosmetic modification and dermal restructuring.
Includes bioluminescent monarch patterning.
Tradeoff: High maintenance costs, immune flare-ups without regular treatment.

• Monarch Swarm Micro-Emitter (Custom – Approval Required)

Deploys micro-drones disguised as bioluminescent butterflies.
Emits localized short-range signal interference.
Causes temporary instability in unshielded personal cyberware within close proximity.
Disrupts illegal cheatware, probability analyzers, and certain targeting optics.
Does not permanently disable implants.
Limited radius and duration.
Tradeoff: Significant neural strain, migraines, nausea, sensory dulling after extended use.

sections.Name: Baross "Iron Jaw" Mundy
sections.Occupation: Bouncer/Muscle for Hire/Professional Street Fighter and Enforcer
sections.Psychological Profile:
Baross is a guarded man, intimidating in stature and frightening in his quiet demeanor, juxtaposed by outbursts of violence. He's level headed enough to know when to stay calm, but angry enough to be able to crush a mans skull with his fingers alone. Could this be from mild cyberpsychosis, too many brain injuries, or both, who knows?

He struggles deeply with issues of abandonment and loss, having had to fight for everything he has ever had, and losing it often throughout his life. Continuing down this path for violence feels like his only way forward, and frankly, he is addicted to it, he craves the rush of a fight and the cheering of people betting on his win, but deep down he knows that someday, it will destroy him, chew him up and spit him out like so many before. Deep down, he is scared.

Despite all this, if you're truly friends with him he can be very amicable and caring, he'll buy you a beer as quickly as he'll beat a man half to death for mugging you.

sections.Backstory:
Lena worked as a bouncer for The Mox at Lizzie's Bar for three years. She handled debt collection, provided extra security, and kept trouble out of the club.
Over time, the constant violence and chaos became too much. Causing loss of focus and a car accident, making her cover her scars with chrome.
One night she finished her shift, deleted her contacts, and walked away. She completely cut ties with the Mox—no explanation, no goodbye.
Now she keeps a low profile in Night City, trying to earn back her keep.
sections.Additional Notes:
Tyger Claw grudge — One of the gangers she roughed up (or helped flatline) during Mox days survived and wants payback. They start small—harassment, tagging her squat—but it forces her to take merc jobs to afford better guns.
Toxic Contact — At some point during her time as a Mox, she had a run in with some Maelstrom gangsters. That small interaction gave her a questionable contact for emergencies, and a target on her back.

sections.Backstory: Tali was born in the lower tiers of Heywood. Her mother worked maintenance contracts for Corps, patching systems, she only got wages that barely fed them. Her father was never present, a common story in NC. While other kids chased cheap thrills and gang affiliations, Tali hunted for rare gleams and dismantled broken devices scavenged from alley dumpsters. Old optics. Damaged neural ports. Fried circuit boards. She wasn’t just curious she had an instinctive understanding of systems, patterns, and weaknesses. As an adult Tali is a curious thief drifting through Night City’s underbelly, a stealthy feline thief driven not by wealth or status but by an irresistible instinct to collect anything that shines. Rather than chasing eddies or power, she is drawn to polished chrome, rare jewelry, glowing data shards, and objects that shimmer beneath neon lights, moving with fluid, silent precision that feels more predatory than practiced. Those who cross her path rarely understand her motives, as stolen items almost never surface on the black market, giving rise to rumors of hidden caches where her treasures are meticulously arranged like prized trophies. Playful yet unsettling, harmless yet deeply frustrating to her victims, Tali is a collector who prowls the urban sprawl simply because to her the city is an endless playground of beautiful, glittering things too perfect to resist.

Taking on any job that paid well enough to stay alive, he had to adapt and modify himself to be better, faster, and stronger just to keep them safe. After a job went wrong and he upset the wrong people, he came home to find his sister missing, tearing apart the city to find her, but it was too late. Seeing her broken and cold body, fracturing the last bit of humanity he had left. Years of changing and destroying his body, he couldn't protect the only person he was doing it for. He moves to Night City after her death, haunted by her ghost and the need to remove himself from all the places that remind him of her. Joined up with Ace because she reminds him of his sister

sections.Backstory:
Yuna doesn’t remember a single place they’d call *home*. They were born somewhere between dust-choked highways and half-dead rest stops, raised by a loose Nomad pack that never stayed long enough to grow roots. Their early life was defined by motion—convoys at dawn, engines humming through the night, and the quiet ritual of tearing apart broken tech to see what could still be saved. Yuna learned early that everything has value if you know how to strip it down.

They were never the loud kid. Never the reckless one, either. While others in the pack chased thrills or clung to old stories, Yuna watched. Listened. Took things apart with patient hands and put them back together just well enough to keep rolling. When they spoke, it was usually because it mattered.

The nickname “Trunk Monkey” came from those days. Yuna was the one you sent crawling into wrecked vehicles, sealed cargo pods, or collapsed engine compartments—silent, efficient, unfazed by tight spaces or sharp metal. If something was missing after a run, odds were it was already packed away in Yuna’s kit.

As the years passed, the Nomad life started to thin out. Fewer convoys. More raids. More corporate drones watching the highways. Yuna didn’t leave because of conflict or tragedy—they left because the road was dying. Night City, on the other hand, was rotting loudly. That meant opportunity.

Night City didn’t change Yuna; it simply gave them more to strip.

They settled into the margins—abandoned megabuildings, half-flooded underpasses, forgotten scav zones that even Scavs thought were too risky. Yuna made their living pulling chrome from corpses, peeling armor off burned-out combat drones, and trading parts through quiet fixers who didn’t ask questions. Their tech knowledge isn’t academic—it’s practical. Yuna knows what still works, what can be patched, and what will explode if you’re careless.

The chrome came gradually. Mantis Blades weren’t a statement; they were a tool. Defense first, intimidation second. Cyberlungs came after too many nights breathing chemical dust and smoke. Sub-dermal plating followed a job where a pistol round nearly ended everything. The tail mount? Practical. Extra balance, extra leverage, extra storage—Trevor never explains it, and nobody smart asks.

Psychologically, Yuna is… steady. No visible trauma. No rage. No fear. Violence is a calculation, not an emotion. They speak rarely, and when they do, it’s short, flat, and final. Most people assume something is broken inside them. They’re wrong. Trevor simply doesn’t waste energy.

After the events surrounding Dogtown and the collapse of several power structures, scav territory expanded. More dead zones. More wreckage. More ghosts. Trevor thrives in that silence, picking through the remains of other people’s ambitions.

They don’t dream of glory, fame, or climbing Night City’s ladder. Yuna’s goal is simpler:
Stay operational. Stay free. Keep moving.

One day, maybe, they’ll leave again—back to the road, back to the open spaces where the city’s glow can’t reach. Until then, Night City is just another machine to dismantle.

sections.Backstory: Luka Von Lucien was born to the wealthy Lucien family in Germany within the EEC. He was being set up to follow his father's career in politics when we decided to do something different. Luka joined up with the Bundeswehr, to protect the EEC like any good patriot, and served four years as an infantry man and another 4 as a designated marksman for the KSK. He expected to return home as a hero to his family. His father however locked him out at the door. No son of his would defy him. Luka, disheartened but pragmatic, packed up and left for "greener pastures" before finally settling on the NCPD.

sections.Name: Mars Logan
sections.Psychological Profile:
A consummate entertainer and showman, the public familiar with Mars sees a consummately flamboyant figure with an indomitable hunger for attention, action, and generally things that get the heart pumping. Those privy to his more vulnerable moments would see this picture to be true, but misleading; Mars is first and foremost image-conscious and ambitious, and desperately insecure in his self-image and his place in the world.

He believes, whether through money, fame, enhancement, or all of the above, that the recognition of others will solidify him–but fundamentally he is insecure in who he is.
sections.Physical Description: Standing at around 6’2”, Mars is an impeccably sculpted and exaggerated vulpine exotic with densely glittered, pink fur, purple eyes, and long, blue-dyed hair. He may typically be seen wearing all manners of cropped clothing, leather jackets, and denim–invariably in black with strong accents.

sections.Backstory:
Lena worked as a bouncer for The Mox at Lizzie's Bar for three years. She handled debt collection, provided extra security, and kept trouble out of the club.
Over time, the constant violence and chaos became too much. Causing loss of focus and a car accident, making her cover her scars with chrome.
One night she finished her shift, deleted her contacts, and walked away. She completely cut ties with the Mox—no explanation, no goodbye.
Now she keeps a low profile in Night City, trying to earn back her keep.

All but my granddaughter, Alice, they are the only family I have so I will protect them but ill keep a big smile to help those people who live in dark times, also I'm not fond of exotics. And my weapon to defend myself with is my trusty hammer I have during the old war. May be retired but only in the city to keep an eye on Alice just in case, and because being a war vet, no longer wants to use a gun because of ptsd, so Ill stick with his old hammer to defend with. When I was captured by the enemies along time ago they injured one of my eyes and injured my bod , i've been in that prison of 6 months but one night while in a scrap yard in the prison, I had the idea to make a weapon, a hammer, using this hammer I escaped from the villains and finding my way back to my fellow soldiers, and over the years I kept this hammer and my eye as a memory, upgrading the hammer over the years to keep it strong and worthy of battle just in case if I ever need to use it again.​

sections.Backstory:
**  
Rhys was your fairly standard street kid, born in Dogtown, mother and father raised him while working in an electronics store, one that specialised in repairing and retrofitting corporate tech, focusing mainly on Tech Weapons… so Rhys has always been around advanced tech, weird devices and data. He picked up the family trade rather quickly, and began to manage the front on the net side of things when it came to business… and as he got better at surfing the net, the more bold steps he took to ensure security and profit for his family. It was here that Barghest gained a 

Until one day he took a step too far, a fraud payment here, a misdirection there, and Rhys ended up ripping off a set of Scavs out of a deal for some Tech Weapons they desired. 4000 Eddies didn’t seem like much for a set of lives, but it seemed the Scavs took personal offense at what Rhys and their family had done. By the time Rhys had realised what had occurred on the night when they came for vengeance, his parents were already left… and soon he would have been too, if not for Barghest catching the Scavs dead in their tracks.

And after that day, Rhys had a new family…

Coming to the current time, Rhys has been serving in Barghest for about six years now, becoming a fairly decent netrunner for them. Since he was Dogtown born and raised, nobody outside of Barghest really knew about him… and that was perfect for what they needed him to do to prove himself next… venture beyond the walls… and be the Barghest’s ears within the greater Night City.
sections.RP Hooks:

* Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character? Generally I think this character is going to be the one instigating conversation, but perhaps people might be interested on why he’s so nosy at times… or the fact he seems to always be trying to place himself to hear the right things at the right time.

sections.Name: Falconi (The Rabbit)
sections.Psychological Profile:
Callous and borderline sociopathic with a distinct lack of empathy. Not because he IS a sociopath, but because life has taught him that empathy and compassion are characteristics of the weak to be exploited by the strong.
He has a distinct need for an emotional connection that he's been deprived of for his entire life, but this emotional starvation has caused him to forget what that connection feels like. Feel pain long enough and consistently enough, and it just becomes your new baseline.  That's where he is currently. Not because he chooses it or because he is incapable of anything else, but because he just doesn't know anything more.
sections.Physical Description:
Stands 4'7" (220cm) at the top of his head (5'10" with the ears)
110# (85kg)
Very muscular and lean but not like a body builder.
Soft, short, gray fur on most of his body with white palms, feet and tuxedo markings. Notable white 'freckles' on his back, shoulders and flank. His hair is styled and colored hit long front bangs but cut short in the back.
He has naturally hazel green eyes but his right eye is blue and clearly cybernetic (See Chrome below). He is missing his left leg from the knee down and the shin is cybernetic. His foot however is a prosthetic replica of his missing foot so that he looks completely intact when wearing pants. He has a thick, short, fluffy rabbit tail.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Enhanced Ear mods allow his incredible sensitive hearing but also noise suppression. His ears have clear trace lines and the openings are covered with an obvious speaker-like housing. (2)
Sub-Dermal plating. The plating does protrude thinly above the skin - more akin to regular dermal plating but without the armor protection - leaving islands of plating visible on his body. (2)
Smartlink (1)
Retinal Projector in the right eye (1). This eye is colored differently than his natural eye and has a curious CRT-like flicker to it.
Cybernetic left leg, but does not enhance any abilities. It's simply for mobility. The foot is a prosthetic replication of his natural feet allowing him to look normal while wearing long pants.
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Falconi is a schemer. He prides himself on his ability to cut a deal, negotiate with runners and think three steps ahead of anyone else. His intellect has been his key to survival since he really cannot
compete physically. He prefers subterfuge and misdirection when dealing with foes. He does not fight fair when confronted with a conflict and will use what ever means he can - underhanded or not - to win and survive.
He isn't overly technical and can't write code for example, but he understands it quite well and will often use the expertise of others when posed with a technical obstacle. 
He knows enough about a lot of topics to get into trouble so he avoids risking his own neck to solve problems. He prefers to use other people for more risky propositions.
He is naturally fit but not inhumanly so and suffers from typical human limitations. He can brawl and scrap but he isn't a technical fighter by any means. He's a decent shot, but again would rather leave the gunfights to the gunfighters.

sections.Name: Vianca "Taghmata" Locard
sections.Occupation: Mobile Ripperdoc & Signal Archivist operating between the Badlands and Night City outskirts.
sections.Psychological Profile:
Controlled, measured, rarely raises their voice. 
Believes machinery accumulates behavioral imprint patterns from long-term users. 

Speaks in systems terminology, or bursts of binary static. Most individuals with cybernetic eyes and translators would be able to translate it. 

Emotionally detached in crisis — almost eerily calm during surgery or firefights. 

Trauma: Survived a convoy wipe caused by corrupted navigation firmware. Since then, obsessed with signal logging and anomaly detection. 

Behavior Quirk: Records ambient audio constantly. 

Claims silence hides data. 

Emotional Tone: Quiet intensity. Analytical. Unsettling eye contact (optics rarely dim).
sections.Physical Description:
Vianca stands at 6'2, rather lean, long-limbed build under layered chrome plating. Wears a hooded, EMI-shielded longcoat with red interior lining. Plague-style respirator mask with integrated filtration and signal dampeners. Dual green optic lenses with constant low-light diagnostic glow. Rib-like chest harness (reinforced interface spine mount + subdermal armor frame). General vibe: desert techno-ascetic. Intimidating but composed.

Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):  Nokota D5 Sidewinder ( Assault Rifle ), Mechanic’s tool case (welding torch, portable power cell, diagnostic tablet), Reinforced Nomad riding jacket (light armor), Modified Thorton pickup truck (engine-tuned, hidden smuggling compartment, manual override ignition)

sections.Backstory:
Riven Knox grew up in the flooded outskirts of Jacksonville, Florida, learning to rebuild engines and repair failing tech before she ever trusted a corporation. She later moved to Night City and took a job with NightCorp as a maintenance technician, working on municipal systems, vehicle modification, and AV servicing after Arasaka’s decline. When irregularities began surfacing around one of her projects related to AV upkeep she found unimproved modifications to company AV that would have the company av fall out of the sky, when she brought it up to her management she received  internal scrutiny. She realized she could easily be made the scapegoat if something went wrong. Riven left before the blame had a chance to land on her, choosing the streets over becoming corporate collateral.
She resides currently in watson as a freelance repair technician

sections.Backstory:
There was a time when The Wanderer didn’t wander. When he was younger, he joined up with the FIA. They recruited him out of university and he accepted. He was young and it seemed like a good opportunity. At the time, he didn't have any strong feelings about the implications of what he'd be doing.

His days were structured, deliberate, and accounted for. He worked intelligence contracts tied to government interests... the quiet kind. Infiltration. Surveillance. False names and patient conversations in dim rooms. He wasn’t a frontline soldier; most of his work happened before a trigger was ever pulled. He learned how to blend in, how to read people, how to move information without leaving fingerprints. Combat training came with the territory, but it was a contingency, not the mission.

He didn’t leave because of some explosive betrayal or single disastrous op. It was slower than that. Assignment after assignment, he watched people get maneuvered like pieces on a board. Lives nudged off course for objectives that looked clean in reports. He followed orders. He did his job. And one day, after wrapping up a routine operation, he found himself staring out over the city and realizing he felt nothing about it. No pride, no anger, no justification. Just a bone-deep exhaustion. He was tired of being useful to something that never had to look at the aftermath.

So he stopped answering calls. No dramatic exit, no confession, no blaze of defiance. He let himself fade into the noise of Night City, downgraded his chrome, kept a pistol for insurance, and chose a quieter life. Now he drifts. Takes odd jobs. Fixes what’s broken. Talks to strangers like they’re people, not assets. If someone notices the way he scans a room or how tension sharpens his posture for a split second, he just smiles. “That was another life, man.” And he means it.

sections.Name: Min-jae [min-jeh]  "Mikey" Hyun [h-yoon]
sections.Psychological Profile:
Subject presents as observant and reserved, demonstrating heightened situational awareness consistent with prior professional conditioning. Their background as a former Trauma Team security specialist has instilled a persistent alertness, suggesting ingrained threat assessment habits and a comfort operating under pressure. Communication patterns are typically minimal and deliberate, favoring listening and environmental monitoring over active engagement.

Behavioral presentation varies significantly depending on neurofilter modulation. When regulated, the subject exhibits respectful and somewhat timid social conduct, indicating emotional dampening and impulse control that prioritize harmony and non-escalation. Without modulation, demeanor shifts notably toward extroversion — becoming outspoken, assertive, and socially forward. This contrast suggests underlying expressive tendencies that are normally suppressed rather than absent, pointing to adaptive behavioral masking rather than personality fragmentation.

Overall, the subject demonstrates dual-mode social functioning shaped by both cybernetic intervention and occupational conditioning. Baseline psychological stability appears intact, though identity expression and interpersonal dynamics are strongly influenced by technological mediation.
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone.

lived in Night city in the city center for most of their young life, raised by a single mom who was a member of trauma team then while on call she got killed by a cyberpsycho. After her death i moved in with my uncle who was also a trauma team member in the same squad as my mom. After a while, things were good, and I picked up on some tech-related and hacking skills quickly. My uncle also died on a call where he and his squad was trying to save a militech official who arasaka was trying to kill and he was caught in the crossfire. when my uncle died, i lived on the streets since he died and while living on the streets of night city i learned one thing....information is power....so i use my netrunning skills and other ways to gather intel and learn info i shouldnt know and sell to people who wants it using the helmet my uncle wore with some modifications, and i also repair any kind of tech weapon or gear given to me....doing my best to live in the city of legends

RP hook: Players can come to me for my usual netrunning and hacking services like intel acquisition, if someone needs a location, plans and layouts on a secret facility that no one is supposed to know or find leverage or blackmail on someone someone else doesn't like, they can come to me. And of course, the other usual netrunning stuff like decoding an encryption, sabotaging systems, and stealing sensitive data ill even take care of it in person if needed to or by request. I some anger towards arasaka cause of my uncle and my overall goal is to do my best to live in this city......and screw over arasaka where i can

sections.Psychological Profile:
Korra is calm, street-calculated, and rarely surprised. She reads rooms fast — posture, tone shifts, hesitation. She learned young that safety is conditional and usefulness keeps you alive. She jokes casually. Swears freely. Keeps things light until someone crosses a line. When that happens, her energy changes instantly, not louder, just colder. She doesn’t romanticize violence. To her, violence is maintenance. Correction. Boundary enforcement. She doesn’t care about softness, she cares about competence. If you’re trying and failing, she’ll help you up. If you’re coasting and putting the gang at risk, she will fix you. Loyal to Vinny because he proved himself. Respects Corpse’s efficiency but has little patience for emotional spirals mid-operation.

Core belief:

“If you’re here, you earn it.”

sections.Psychological Profile:
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone.

     What’s breaking in Bubbles:
1. She’s begun reusing lines, forgetting which ones worked on whom
2. She’s started luring people with lesser crimes to start feeling again
3. Occasionally, she hesitates not to spare them, but because she's unsure if the pull will be enough
4. She feels nothing during the kill anymore
The rush comes before, not after
5. She’s begun escalating the intimacy of the lure to feel something again
6. Sometimes she lets them talk too long.
7. Sometimes she starts to resent them for trusting her.
8. She tells herself it’s just business. It’s not.


Bubbles presents as gentle, warm, and disarmingly kind. Her affect is soft-spoken, patient, and reassuring engineered behavior reinforced by years of survival conditioning. She does not threaten, intimidate, or coerce. She selects. 
Her trauma stems from being raised as entertainment and weapon simultaneously. Affection, safety, and violence were always transactional. As a result, Bubbles equates intimacy with control and trust with vulnerability to be exploited.

Core Traits: Soft-spoken, disarmingly polite, hyper-observant, controlling through reassurance. 
Trauma: Circus-born conditioning; fear of abandonment; learned indispensability as survival. Groomed to soothe violence rather than stop it. 
Behavioral Quirks: Reuses comforting phrases; smiles under stress; avoids raising her voice; plans exits compulsively. Disappointment used instead of anger. 
Emotional Tone: Gentle warmth overlaying constant vigilance. Panic suppressed beneath practiced kindness. 
Pathology Notes: Co-dependent attachment (Bomb); control masked as care; empathy weaponized rather than absent.
Memorizing names, habits, and insecurities without conscious effort Repeating successful luring phrases when emotionally numb Hesitation driven not by empathy, but by fear that her influence is fading A growing resentment toward targets who trust her too easily Emotional tone is muted and hollow during violence; anticipation provides stimulation, not the act itself. She is aware something is breaking and weaponizes that awareness.

sections.Backstory:
The son of 2 Night Corp executives, and a Downtown Night City Native.  Travis is the poster child of a spoiled corpo trust fund baby.  Someone who’s never accomplished anything with his life and lives off his parents money.  Rather than follow his parents into the Corpo lifestyle, he chose to be a musician.  Ever since that moment he’s left a trail of single moms and kids in his wake of a reckless party boy, rockerboy lifestyle.  Using his status as a NC citizen as a means to avoid any sort of child support.
Travis isn’t a front man however.  He’s had success as a drummer mainly, playing for a wide variety of solo artists.  Touring on some occasions.  He has managed to gather something of a cult following.  Mostly thanks in part to maintaining his good looks, and mooching off groupies.  Known widely by his stage name, “Barrage” he maintains a modicum of success as a C-tier celebrity and rocker.
He has worked as a Merc in NC and other NUSA cities when needed.  Picking up combat related skills over the years from various girlfriends who also happened to be Mercs.  A dangerous play on his part, but hasn’t yet gotten him totally screwed.  He’s no A-tier legend, he prefers to take more grounded jobs with little risk.
Travis has been out of town for the past year, touring with the band “Bluff Lung,” after their drummer OD’ed in 2076.  With the tour’s conclusion, Barrage has been cut loose, and has returned to NC to sleep on his parent’s couch and hit his old stomping grounds.
sections.RP Hooks: Jaded ex-girlfriends, or his kids as NPC’s are more than welcome to be thrown his way by fixers looking to cause a scene.  This man is a piece of shit.

sections.Backstory:
Originally working as a freelance Netrunner, Michael found himself in-demand during 4th Corpo. Now a man's gotta make a living and some extra eddies on the side is never a bad thing. Taking contracts in secret from both Militech and Arasaka, Michael used his knowledge of Netrunning and business to attack the financial assets of both sides before laundering a few extra eddies into his own account. Problem is, when you jump the fence too many times, you're at some point gonna get snagged. Both Militech and Arasaka eventually caught on to his deception and forced him on the run. Gathering what he could, he made his escape, changing his face and name with an unscrupulous Ripper-Doc, to whom Michael owes his life to this very day.

Going on the run, Michael fell in with the Nomads. It was there he met the love of his life. For a time they were both happy but that was short-lived. Feeling slighted that he had played the game and was cheated out of his rewards by the Corpos, Michael left her behind one night, but kept a picture of her as a keepsake. Now returning to Night City, he seeks to reclaim what he has lost whilst also keeping his original identity a secret.
sections.RP Hooks: Always looking for the next job in the hopes of building himself back up, Michael is always on the look out for work. Having a former Corpo to hand is always a useful thing for a fixer or a band of Edgrerunners to have in their pocket. When opportunity arises, it's to be exploited, even at the expense of those around him, but only when their usefulness has dried up. Never break up a lucrative business opportunity.

sections.Backstory:
Alice was born and raised in Night City, growing up in a small apartment with her parents. When she was around 17–18, her parents were killed in a routine mugging, leaving her to finish school alone and inherit the apartment. The loss pushed her into early independence and left her emotionally numb, pragmatic, and impatient with systems that promised help but moved too slowly.

After graduating, she enrolled in a basic computer programming / IT program, relying on money her parents had saved without fully understanding how limited it was. She completed her first term successfully but ran out of funds soon after. Without corporate sponsorship, connections, or a safety net, she dropped out rather than take on long-term debt or beg for help. She left with real, practical tech skills, but no credentials to prove them.

Needing fast, flexible income to keep her apartment, Alice took work as a stripper. It wasn’t a dream job, but it paid quickly and let her stay independent. Later, she had an illegal, low-profile cyberarm modification installed for personal protection. The implant was poorly vetted and never fully diagnosed.

During a chaotic incident at a club, the weapon in her arm discharged and seriously injured a bouncer. The fallout was quiet but lasting: bans from multiple venues, medical debt, settlements, and whispers that followed her. She concealed the implant afterward and became paranoid about being caught unprepared again.

Eventually, she shifted into club security work—not as a bouncer, but as back-of-house security. She monitors cameras, works access panels, runs quiet sweeps through maintenance spaces, and handles situations before they escalate. Her size works in her favor, letting her move through vents, corridors, and under-stage areas others can’t.

Alice carries a small go-bag at all times—cash, phone, hacked laptop, basic first aid, and cheap food, because she learned the hard way how fast things can go wrong. She keeps to herself, appears fearless on the job, and can be unexpectedly violent under pressure, but is easily flustered by genuine kindness or attention.

In a city where real animals are nearly extinct, Alice is fixated on them, old footage, braindances, robo-pets, and rumors of illegal exotic trades. It’s one of the few things that still feels innocent to her, and it reflects a longing for something real in a synthetic world.

Her current goal is simple: rebuild stability. She wants to move up from her past, keep her apartment, pay off lingering debt, and prove she can survive Night City without falling through the cracks again.⁩

sections.Backstory: Sedna is the daughter of a CEO of a lesser known corporation which manufactured high quality weapons and ammo, which has long since been absorbed into Militech. She used to have a sister, Venera, who was kidnapped by Militech, to strongarm her father into selling the corporation. Instead of budging to the demands, he went after Mtech to try to save Venera, but the op went bad and they both died. Upon hearing this, Sedna swore vengeance. Sedna eventually did get it, after years of searching. Upon completion of her quest to avenge her family, she was lacking purpose, then after thinking for a while, she decided to hit the road once again. Thanks to her father taking her down to the shooting range since Sedna was little, she has good experience with guns, which she capitalizes on, offering her services as merc, though she also takes jobs such as rescues, asset retrieval, etc. Whatever brings in eddies. After hearing about Night City, and the opportunities that wait there, she decided to make her way there.

sections.Name:
* Cassian Knox
*Nickname:* Hadal
sections.Occupation: * Data & Tech Smuggler / Underwater Scavenger / Tech Salvager
sections.Psychological Profile:
* 
Upbeat, flirtatious, and casually funny in social settings; disarms people easily. The moment things turn serious, Cassian goes quiet. Breathing slows, body stills, eyes track everything. Under pressure, he becomes eerily focused and efficient, like his mind has shut down.

Weaknesses:
* Dry, enclosed spaces
* Loud chaotic crowds without visual exits
* Medical PTSD

Strengths:
* Thrives under physical and psychological pressure (slightly masochistic)
* Multitasker
* Rarely panics, even when he should

NOTE: Has attacked Medical Personal before that attempt to give him first aid without his consent.
* Triggers include restraints, surprise sedation, or multiple people touching him simultaneously.
sections.Physical Description:
* Partial Octopus Exotic. Dark purple skin with blue rings on shoulders, ears and cheeks. Orange cybernetic eyes. Four tentacles protruding from back.
Height: 1.82 Meters
Weight: 170-200 lbs

NOTE: Tentacles will occasionally move and spaz out without his control.
* Under stress or pain, tentacles may react defensively before conscious thought.

*Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):*
* Modular Salvage Harness - anchors, retractable cables, hardpoints
* Rebreather Mask - backup; usually ornamental
* Encrypted Data Caches - waterproof, pressure-sealed
* Compact Cutting Torch - locks, hulls, emergencies
* Tracking Tokens x4 - waterproof, used to mark larger underwater hauls or caches

*Chrome / Implants*
* Circulatory & Immune Systems: *Cyberlungs* - 3 CP - Breathe underwater, through smoke, gas, or vacuum. | Breathing is off–slow and mechanical. You fog up rooms unnaturally.
* Integumentary System: *Optical Camo* - 2 CP - Semi-Invisible when activated (50%)  | You still shimmer and aren't anywhere near fully invisible.
* Hands & Feet: *Subdermal Grip* - 1 CP - Lets you hold objects tighter than human limits—great for weapons or grappling. | Sometimes crushes fragile stuff by accident.
* Neural: *Netrunner Suite (Level 1)* - 1 CP - Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vechicles/etc. | You're always a little distracted--like you're only 95% in the room.
* Ocular System: *SmartEyes* - 2 CP - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. | Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously.
**Total Cyberware Points**:   9 CP

**Additional Information**
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
* 
* Advanced underwater navigation & salvage
* Data smuggling & encryption handling
* Hardware Engineering (Tinkerer)
* Silent takedowns & restraint using tentacles
* High-pressure endurance & breath control
* Double-Jointed
* Good with his hands (Lock Picking/Pickpocket)
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
*
* Diver Set - Armored Wet Suit, Bibbed Hood, Dive Gloves, Diver Mask
* Electro-Harpoon Rifle
* WASP Injection Knife
* Secondary Handgun (W.I.P.)
sections.Backstory:
*
Cassian grew up in Watson, near the water's edge and the Industrial line. Having witnessed corpos dump broken tech, bodies, and secrets into the bay like it was a forgetting machine, Cassian started to go diving for what he could scavenge and recover, but due to the toxicity of the water, he had to start swapping to chrome to function.

The octopus bio modifications was originally meant for industrial deep-sea labor, but Cassian stole the prototype during a salvage op gone wrong and never gave it back. Going to the black market, he had the exotic procedure done, resulting in some mental fracturing in his mind due to improper after treatment.
sections.Known Affiliations:
*
* Harbor gangs & dockside smugglers
* Quiet corporate interest (unconfirmed)

*RP Hooks?:*
* A data cache he recovered contains live intel
* Someone recognizes his exotic mods from a black-market operation
* Body Recovery (for PD or Scavs?)

sections.Name: Mara Vale
sections.Psychological Profile:
Mara Vale is emotionally disarming without trying to be. She listens with the kind of attention that feels like kindness. Often, it is. Patients trust her. Coworkers confide in her. Strangers tell her things they didn’t mean to say.
Empathy comes naturally to her and in Night City that is an expensive habit. She feels it when someone places their faith in her and suffers later for it; carries the weight of information learned “by accident,” knowledge that slips from conversation into consequence. She manipulates by being patient. By being kind. By being present. 
Panic rarely shows on her face but afterward it settles into her bones. She uses her influence on others sparingly and when she does, guilt follows close behind. Mara looks harmless and is often underestimated for it. They mistake her empathy for weakness. They neglect to realize that she knows far more than she lets on. She does not want to win at another’s expense. But she still does.
sections.Physical Description: Mara stands at 5'4" with a soft yet steady build shaped by long Trauma Team shifts rather than aesthetics. She looks like someone easy to talk to, nice to lay on, and difficult to read all at once.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Auditory System: Enhanced Ears: Higher chance to Hear whispers through walls, filter sound, pinpoint origin. (Overwhelmed in noisy spaces. Startles easily.)
Arms & Arm Attachments: Cyberarm (Dexterous): Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking. Weak to EMPs. Shakes when under pressure. Doesn't enhance Stamina.
Miscellaneous: Biomonitor: Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger. (Can trigger false alarms. You get “pinged” constantly when anxious.)
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Crisis communication
Trauma stabilization & triage
Defensive combat
Pattern recognition & Environmental awareness
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Cyberarm (Dexterous) with medports for specific medications and auto injection fingers. Performs dosage calculation and MAR cross referencing simultaneously. Indebted through Corpo contract.
Tech Suit that moves like fabric but behaves like light armor. Cut and puncture resistant but certainly not proof.
Eye Visor with vitals projection (self and patient). Often leaves it on while people watching.
Augmented Cyber Spine programmed for postural stabilization, load redistribution and micro-adjustments to reduce fatigue on long shifts. Indebted through Corpo contract.
Arcade token she keeps as a memento from her very first, very lonely night in Night City. When crowds get too loud or Night City feels too big, her fingers run the edge of it without thinking.
Medical Bag full of….medical stuff. Duh.

sections.Name: Angel “Glass” Marinov
sections.Occupation:
Netrunner, Info Courier for the Iron Hogs Nomad Clan
Former Arasaka Net Architecture Recovery Program Researcher and Fixer Informant
sections.Psychological Profile:
Angel “Glass” Marinov is a study in controlled chaos - detached, loyal, and haunted by the constant hum of circuitry that keeps him alive. The screwdriver wound that cracked his skull and forced a glass replacement didn’t just scar him physically; it scrambled his ability to process social rhythm.
He misses social cues - often speaking when he should listen and falling silent when words are expected. This leaves him awkward and quietly insecure around strangers, though he tries to compensate by mimicking others’ tone or humor. Around his nomad family and the few Night City friends he trusts, he’s relaxed, even energetic, regarding the topic or the job at hand.
In work mode, Glass becomes someone else - cold, hyper-focused, and frighteningly calm. In downtime, he’s more like a cat: curious, quiet, and often lost in his own thoughts or buried in tech. He struggles to express warmth directly, but his loyalty is unwavering.
Behavior Quirks:
• Hand Gestures - Moves his fingers in quick, precise patterns midair, as if sorting data or organizing memory blocks: a habit left over from constant mental coding.
• System Resets - Dazes off or freezes briefly when overstimulated: a subtle “system reboot” for his overloaded brain.
• Mismatched Laughter - Occasionally laughs at the wrong moments, a misfire from damaged social timing that he’s learned to cover with a smirk.

Emotional Tone:
Detached and logical under pressure, but quietly insecure and gently curious when safe.
sections.Physical Description:
Height: 185 cm (6'1")
Build: Strong but “mended” - muscle layered over scars and replacement work; built for survival, not aesthetics.
Hair: Bald from trauma and stress.
Eyes: Naturally blackish-brown, with ocular mods that change colour based on mood or neurological state.
Skin: Pale with visible seam scars from reconstruction and cybernetic integration.

Notable Features: Due to damage to the back half of his skull, he was fitted with a high-density polyglass cranial plate – transparent to the naked eye but reinforced with reactive lattice fibre. With a faint hum and pulses of lights emanating from the neural stabilizers beneath.
Vibe: Controlled energy - the kind of person who seems half in another world yet grounded by necessity. Curious about machines, confident under fire, and comfortable in discomfort.

sheet.preamble:
**Name**: Bayou
**Age**: 27
**Pronouns**: He/Him
**Occupation / Role in Night City**: Former Pornstar, Paranoid CyberSec Intern
**Psychological Profile**:
TImid and tense to outsiders, more open to acquaintances/friends. A bit on the paranoid side, moves are well calculated with a strong sense of situational awareness**

sections.Physical Description:
**
5’9”, slim fit, illuminated blue accents, exotic type, canine/hyaenidae.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
**
Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited:
Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2)
Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cyberfingers (1)
Neural: Spasm Drone Port (2)
Ocular System: SmartEyes (2)
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: High stealth during paranoia episodes, ethical and unethical hacking.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
**
(still discovering cyberpunk weapons, would like some help here), basic hacking equipment.
sections.Known Affiliations:
**
None at the moment of character creation.
sections.RP Hooks:
**
Attraction based on a former career in porn.
Friendly inviting appearance.

**Backstory**:
Bayou’s roots started at age 21 with a start of a career as a pornstar after being approached by a talent scout who worded it as “low-risk, high-pay work”. At the beginning Bayou treated it like acting, following scripts, orders, and requests while disassociating when necessary. His shy demeanor translated well into certain scenes that made him appear helpless, his agencies quickly picked up on the “vulnerable” look and pushed him into scenes that violated professional boundaries. Oftentimes with scenes of no clear consent. This led to the start of his trauma and paranoia. 

To make matters worse, after a scene was filmed in Bayou’s personal apartment an obsessive stalker traced his location to show up at his door step, after reporting this situation Bayou would get blown off with excuses. “This is just the cost of visibility” among other generic responses.

The trauma and paranoia got worse over time over little things, another actor touching him wrong, an awkward interaction at the bar, among other things.

Bayou began to run background checks on people he worked with. He would memorize camera placements. Learned to read tone shifts, pauses and inconsistencies. It got to the point where the industry threw him in the bin, getting blacklisted under the table after agencies claimed him to be too “difficult” and “mentally unstable”

These background checks led to his career in cybersecurity. Bayou started learning basic net skills to protect himself. Scrubbing leaked content, tracking doxxers,and monitoring forms for information about him. This eventually translated into a rather good resume for CyberSec contract work, keeping his work ethical for a while. From on the job training Bayou was able to further his CyberSec skills further, leading to under the table unethical work, primarily targeted at his previous agencies. 

Moving to Night City was a simple decision.

Night City lets Bayou disappear in plain sight. No one asks why you know how to ghost a system. No one blinks at an exotic with glowing implants and nervous energy. Night City’s underside gives him access to information, favors, and leverage against others.

He is a short statured Exotic with the appearance of a black Shiba Inu. He dosent have a tail or beans on his hands. He has heavy bags under his eyes
🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): He uses a pistol chambered in 45. (Exact model for vr is the H&K MK23 Socom)

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Hes a decent shot with his pistol. His main Talent is his efficiency when it comes to cleaning when hes doing a job for someone he makes sure to leave it like the person never existed at all. Resistant to alot of simple drugs due to high tolerance
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Latex Rubber gloves, Plate carrier, H&K MK23 Socom
sections.Backstory:
Kina was born into a rich corpo family in Japan. He never got the typical family experience. Instead he was groomed into success of taking over his familys corporation (Still working on the Corp). By age 8 he had taken his first life. He was handed a light caliber pistol and was told by his father. "In this life. There is no friends of family. Everyone will try to get one over on you. Like this man here. He tried to pull a fast one over on us and now this is the price. Never show weakness and never give anyone ammunition on you if you want to reach the top and be considered my son. Dont give anyone mercy." This message from Kina's father has been ingrained in him his whole life. 
Kina's childhood is mostly a blur. No friends or joyous moments just constantly working himself up the cooperate ladder. By his 20s he had been working in his family's corporation. Constantly chasing the goal of having a semblance of respect from his family he looked up to. To deal with the constant stress of corporate life every chance he would get he would spend money on high quality drugs of all kinds. This would increase his tolerance to plenty of drugs.
During his mid 20s he was approached by someone a few steps up that ladder than he was. They expressed an interest in him romantically and sexually. Kina would agree to this person and they began sleeping with each other. Kina played into the part of a partnership with this man before he got enough information. Kina would take recordings that he got of previous conversations of personal life and of their sex life and blackmail his first partner. He held his power over his "boyfriend" to boost himself up the ranks. Eventually when he got all he could and stepped far enough their "boyfriend" wasnt useful to him anymore. He killed them cleaning up the evidence and making it look like they quit and headed out of the country.
In his mid 30s he started to reach his goal. His hair had already started graying with the stress it all. That was until some new papers hit his desk. Straight from the top. He had to handle a job with Arasaka. Everything in it screamed like a red flag but he had no other choice. (I have not fully figured out what this was yet.)  Everything went wrong as he guessed. Arasaka now wanted him dead and was forced to flee. He used his many connections to fake his death. It has seemingly convinced Arasaka for now. He got a new face as an exotic and a new Identity as Kina Mazushī and moved to night city with the Yakuza. Becoming a cleaner for them and using them to get to Night City with as little traceability as possible. He moved into beast side to lay low. Hes been there for a few years now Arasaka and the news still believe him to be dead. And his life of luxury gone to the winds.

sections.Name: Gabriel "Gabby" Torenti
sections.Psychological Profile: Fairly level-headed, tries to be as charming as they can be, offers to work on finding and delivering information for others.
sections.Physical Description:
5ft 10in, 151lbs. Exotic tailoring "Novabeast". White fur with pale lavender fluff. Augmentations give skin and eyes a stained glass look.
🦾 Chrome / Implants
Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2)
Integumentary System: Luminescent Skin (1)
Neural: Neurofilter (2)
Ocular System: SmartEyes (2)
Miscellaneous: GhostTag (1) and VoiceWeaver (1)
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Acts as a "Face" and representative of the Butcher Boys when one is specifically needed. Decently proficient at planning routes and noting potential throughfares in spur-of-the-moment situations. With their own skill and augmentations, they can read people extremely well and have been known to posess a silver-tongue because of it.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Ballistic-Weave Clothing, Plate Carrier, Reinforced Mask, Lever-Action Power Rifle (SOR-22 equivalent), M-10AF Lexington, Survival Knife
sections.Backstory:
Gabby grew up in a more rural part of NC, near the fringes between the outlands and the city proper as the kid to a family that supplied produce used in All Foods' Orgiatic brand of food. The thing that ended up driving Gabby away from it all was their abusive family. Mom couldn't stand up to dad, and dad was far too demanding and forced Gabby to do unreasonable amounts of labor on the farm to the point of illness in some situations. Eventually, Gabriel couldn't take it anymore and left. Trying to find a purpose or means of better life, they took one bad situation for another. Join a gang. At least that way they were treated better by their peers. 

At first it was just being an errand boy for them given how young he was when he joined. Turns out all the excess labor from his family did him some good, and he became a reliable courier and message deliverer between members. As time went on, members noticed how actually friendly and accomodating Gabriel tried to be in most circumstances, and seemed to be pretty charming when doing it! Eventually, Gabriel had to do dirty work, proving themselves with groups involving shakedowns and other less-friendly things. While unremarkable in this aspect, they were able to do what was asked of them. 

These things combined allowed higher-up-the-chain members of the BBs to notice his more specific skillset, and became known as someone who could work on relationships internally and externally for the gang.  Their role was basically set now, functioning as a courier still (but for more risky or precious cargo and messages) as well as a go-between for members and unaffiliated sorts that wanted to do business with the Butcher Boys.

Gabriel is a gang-lifer. Starting as young as they did, it is extremely unlikely that they will ever be "out of the game".
sections.RP Hooks: Diplomat needed for deals or communications between factions or persons. Indirect contact as a "Middleman". Runner. Courier for precious or confidential items.
sections.Additional Notes: Meant to function as a sort of mesh between PC and NPC. The character I played a month ago and continue to play as was just really fun to do and wanted to canonize them a bit ❤️

sections.Name: Lucas Shasta Walters
sections.Psychological Profile: Kind, Caring, Honest to a Fault.
sections.Physical Description: Youthful, Muscular, Heterochromia (Blue left, Green Right), Moustache enjoyer, scars from abusive childhood
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm):
    Auditory System:
    Circulatory & Immune Systems:
    Hands & Feet (2 slots):
    Integumentary System: Dermal Plating [3]
    Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg):
    Neural:Netrunner Suite LV 2 [3]
    Ocular System:Smart Eyes [2]
    Skeleton & Torso Musculature:
    Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail):
    Miscellaneous:Ice Layer [2]
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
Smooth but Honest- Walters is honest to a fault, but smooth with the way he talks. 
Observation- Walters has seen a lot, and will see a lot more. He can tell when something is amiss.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: NCPD gear, Personal Pistol, shotgun, tech rifle. APD Cruiser painted to NCPD colors.
sections.Backstory: Lucas Walters was always a good person. He was born to a Black Lace addict mother, who left when he was too young to remember, and an abusive father, who beat him and his sister to the point of leaving permanent scars. Since they lived in a trailer park, they had no way to escape, until one day, at age 14, he grabbed up his 10 yr old sister, tossed her in their dads run down pickup, got in a fist fight with his dad, leaving the man in a pool of his own snot and blood, but alive, and drove. Lucas stopped driving in Atlanta, raising his sister up with him for 4 years, when he decided to join the APD. He stayed there, learning the ropes and helping get his sister on her feet. When he was sure she was fine, with a husband and son, he moved away from Atlanta, to night city, where he joined the Department to do good by the people. Now he makes it day by day, until one day an incident led to him chipping in.
sections.Known Affiliations: Vanessa and the Sweethearts Cafe, NCPD, Tengu
sections.RP Hooks:
NCPD- Lucas is a cop, thats a pretty big thing in beast side.
Good Heart- He may be a cop, but he's got a heart o gold.
Attempted murder- This happens as soon as the sheet is approved. Lucas is sent on a call to investigate suspicious activity at the edge of beastside, only to be gunned down by Gangers. While he was recovering enough strength to crawl back towards the Beast Side district, he and his bodycam had heard the voices of officers working on behalf of the upper ranks of NCPD to kill a threat to their operations, to kill him. Lucas will try to find these corrupt officers and uproot the corruption that tried to take his life
Hypervigilant- Lucas comes from fear and pain, so he is always on the lookout for anything that could cause it in himself or his  people.
Overprotective- After years of watching his sister be abused alongside him, he cannot stand to see a child or woman be abused. He will act calm at first, but if the pressure is put on for him to leave it be by anyone, the perpetrators may findthemselves under physical or digital attack.
Honest to a Fault- Lucas can't lie. Even when he does, he is a horrendous liar. In interrogations, he either has to twll half truths, or not talk at all, leading to his punishments being far worse. If he tells the truth, and it gets someone hurt, it is absolutely devastating for him.
sections.Additional Notes:
This Sheet will not be implemented fully until Walters is shot to near death and revived by the people who care about him, as he will not have had the cyberware installed yet. His concept is based on the 2020 ttrpg class of Cop/Lawman.
To clarify an in character event involved with the Attempted Murder Hook is what causes this sheet to be implemented.

sections.Backstory:
During the earlier half of the 21st century the polar regions went through massive climate change. The Alaskan local tribes of the Inuit allied themselves with the Nomad clans for protection and survival, marking the end of their traditional lifestyle in favor of a more modern one. Their ancestral familiarity with the region allowed them to barter their services as guides to the nomads, who were seeking to establish alternative trade routes between the continental US and eastern Asia.
Trade routes were valuable for smuggling, which naturally attracted a certain kind of unsavory sort, and before long the tribes were embroiled in territorial disputes between their Snake Nation allies and a Raffen gang that wanted to secure the territory for their own means. Their dwindling numbers threatened the surviving members of the tribe with near extinction. In desperation they sought to make a deal with anyone who would aid them, and Biotechnica delivered. In exchange for their aid in securing the region for their Wildlife Conservation efforts, they would give them modifications and enhancements that would aid their survival in the extreme environment. Biotechnica saw this deal as a win-win, gaining both test subjects for their burgeoning exotics program, and territory for them to experiment on wildlife which would go un-observed by the masses.
Kissi was a part of one such Inuit tribe, though at the time he used another name. He was 12 when the attack happened, and his entire clan was wiped out by the Raffen. His survival was only guaranteed when he was picked up by a Nomad convoy that was hauling materials back from the Russian exchange. He made himself useful by applying his skills as a hunter and gatherer until he was old enough to begin working for the Nomads. He made the eddies to travel to night city by working as a convoy guide and guard. By the time he got to night city he was 34. In Night City. He made eddies by doing odd jobs and was a worker for hire. He worked gigs till he ended up in Beast Side.
sections.RP Hooks:
Optional – He likes to tell stories of his tribe and old stories that he knows from his elders. He will do any kind of work that it's not “illegal.”
He hates Raffen, and Scavs.


Character Notes:
The unity was a parting gift from the Snake Nation caravan Kissi traveled with to Night City.

sections.Backstory: Grief was involved with megacorps from the day he was born in Germany. Corporate contracted parents, corporate housing, corporate schooling, the works. If asked he will tell you his name is the result of his mother having “an extremely German sense of humour”  If he grew up in Night City or the NUSA, perhaps he would have been tempted from this path as he hit his teenage years, but instead he simply excelled in his schooling and was fast tracked into his own contracted employment. He spent most of his early adulthood working in the corporate espionage department of EBM (Euro Business Machines) specializing in netrunning and social engineering, his soul signed away but his bank account comfortably padded. Unfortunately for him, a job that involved infiltrating IEC (International Electric Corporation) went terribly wrong two years ago. EBM of course disavowed him after the failure, so he fled the EEC entirely and has been doing merc work in Night City ever since. He had a full body feline biomod done to evade any potential corporate pursuit, but he still worries about EBM and IEC sending assassins after him. Between the biosculpting and paying the Eurotrasher gang to smuggle him into Night City, he used up most of his eddies that weren’t frozen in corporate tied accounts and had to start over with nothing but the cyberware in his body and the clothes on his back. The title Sündermann started as the Eurotrashers nickname for him, poking fun at his German origin and the fact he needed to smuggle himself out of the country, and eventually stuck as his working name in Night City.
sections.RP Hooks: He’s practically broke and tired of slumming it for over a year now. Wants to regain his old quality of life back but is always worried if he sticks his head out too much his old employer will find him (or perhaps IEC held a grudge).

a larger lad hailing from the frigid lands of Alaska, from a small village once untouched by corprate or goverment, this he was forced into service to sustain for his family who later in his training were killed in what was ruled as a corprate accident when a hidden pipe line that ran under their village detonated due to cheap building, reducing the entire village to rubble

 their death proceded to push him to the brink on insainity but he managed to push through Due to im realising that if he goes down then his team will be dragged down with him.....that and a good chunk of goverment issued drugs helped stint his dive into insainity

after his basic training he accelled at combat encounters allowing him to be noticed by an Operative who recruited him into Militech After a combat accident in which he went MIA from military combat logs while he was brought into Militech as a "Liquidator"

after being brought into Militech, he was equiped with shark based modifications, reason are unknown to most aside from those with autorization to view his files, but some outside of the Militech speculate his modifcations were used to quote "Cause mass Mental distress" in naval forces in the black sea

From there most of his 10 years of service is classified or heavily redacted

The only reason the shark still works for Militech  is the fact they keep him from going over the edge with military grade suppressents and a payment plan that keeps him triving....as tehy say....they bought his silence....and they bought his skill

now his employers have him in Night city on a so called "Standby" operation, once its over....hes done here, back to Alaska to live a life of calm....thats if this place doesnt kill him first

Or Militech for that matter, due to recent actions and recent orders, the shark broke his chains, now hidden from the eyes of his previous employers, he's now being hunted like a dog*

sections.Name: **Ace Tengamee**
sections.Psychological Profile: **Calm, observant, and unnervingly self-possessed. Ace rarely reacts immediately, preferring to let others reveal themselves first. She is patient to a fault, holding grudges quietly and repaying them with precision rather than impulse. Displays high emotional intelligence and an unusual tolerance for stress, hunger, and isolation. Values autonomy over power and refuses dependency—on people, systems, or technology. Deeply distrustful of corporations and anyone who tries to “improve” her.**
sections.Physical Description:
**Petite but solidly built, with a deliberately composed posture that draws attention without demanding it. Movements are slow, intentional, and economical—nothing wasted. Her appearance carries a polished, almost curated quality that contrasts sharply with Night City’s obsession with chrome. Horns curve smoothly from her head, often adorned or styled rather than concealed. Eyes reflect light strongly in low illumination, giving the impression she is always watching, always aware. Skin appears unnaturally pristine despite the city’s grime.**

Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):
**-Scissors (concealed, high-quality steel; kept immaculately clean)**

**-Tailored clothing reinforced for durability rather than protection**

**-Personal analog accessories (cards, chips, lighters, tokens)**
sections.Chrome / Implants: **None. Ace refuses cyberware of any kind. No ports, no internal hardware, no augmentation.**
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
**-Keen Observation: Exceptional at reading micro-expressions, body language, and behavioral tells**

**-Probability Intuition: Preternatural sense for when odds are shifting (no tech involved)**

**-Psychological Pressure: Can unsettle others through silence, eye contact, and presence alone**

**-Endurance: High tolerance for deprivation (sleep, food, pain)**

**-Close-Range Precision: Deadly with small, intimate weapons**

**-Casino Management: Expert in analog gambling systems, security through human oversight**

**-Social Navigation: Comfortable across social strata—from corpo elites to street-level fixers**
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: **Scissors – Used with surgical precision; favors close proximity and control**
sections.Backstory:
**Born into the Tengamee family—an old Night City dynasty that valued preserved flesh over chrome—Ace was quietly deemed a liability. Her appearance and refusal to augment clashed with corporate optics, drawing attention the family couldn’t control. Betrayed internally and removed without public scandal, she vanished into the city’s underlayers.**

**Years later, she resurfaced as the owner of Ace Casino, an analog gambling house operating beneath the city’s predictive systems. The casino quickly gained a reputation for strange odds, unsettling accuracy, and an owner who never touched the cards yet always seemed to know the outcome.**

**Ace no longer seeks restoration of her family name. Night City is her table now—and she plays it on her own terms.**
sections.Known Affiliations:
**-Ace Casino (Founder / Proprietor)**

**-Select fixers, gamblers, and undercity figures (unofficial, fluid alliances)**
sections.RP Hooks:
**-A fixer wants to know how Ace Casino avoids surveillance**

**-A corpo executive tries to pressure Ace into adopting “enhancements”**

**-A high-stakes game where the outcome could shift a district’s power balance**

**-Someone recognizes Ace from her past and shouldn’t have**
sections.Additional Notes:
**-Ace avoids prolonged physical contact**

**-Refuses medical scanners or biometric checks**

**-Never raises her voice**

**-Night City tech fails to categorize her cleanly**

sections.Name: Reva “Letty” Del’rosa:**
sections.Psychological Profile:
Letty is typically an happy go lucky, extrovert who thrives off of feeling useful to others. They typically think about what's the best way to impress someone whilst making moves for themselves.  ** 

* Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone - Letty despite their happy go lucky nature feels like a wolf in sheep's clothing due to their affiliations and departure from Snake Nation and her sect of the Wraiths. Their personality often uses joy, self depreciation, and overall high energy as a coping mechanism to express who they are to others. They are your average gal with skeletons in the closet. As being an ex-member of a party of wraiths that was absorbed into Snake Nation, they feel as if they’ve got a long road ahead in the fact of redeeming themselves. They don’t really believe that they are worth their attempt as they’ve specialized in grave robbing and napping anything that was laying on the ground including bodies out in the badlands. When it comes to violence, they’re accustomed to it to a point where they could be drinking a can of soda while a scav is cutting out someone’s kidney right in front of them. Their mind is consistently in survival mode which means they’ve done nearly anything to keep the eddies going.

An exotic
