sections.Backstory:
Between 4 to 5, a young boy was kidnapped from their world. For near 6 months he was held captive by strangers, along with other children. One day he was take to a strange room and put under, and when he woke up, he was different. They made him an exotic, something he turned out to share with the other kids that shared his new cell. Someday they put him on a transport with 2 other kids, being taken to god knows where. Suddenly however, they stopped, and the children were found by a new group of strangers. They were Nomads, and after explaining so, they would be taken is as newfound members of the family. One of these Nomads would notice the sabertooth-like fangs the boy had, and gave him his name.

     Vamp barely remembered his life pre-kidnapping, not after all the traumatic shit they did to him. Later on he'd learn how the Nomads found them; some random line of text from a random terminal they found in a random facility they raided. The other exotic kids would leave on their own over the years, but not him. He may have looked very different, but they loved him as much as they loved anyone else.  The Nomads were his new life, his new family, simple as that. What happened back then doesn't matter, the past didn't matter, that's what he believed. At least, he used to.

     One day, passing through a small town with the clan, Vamp would hear something that'd catch his ear. Someone at the bar was from Night City, and their niece there had gone missing lately. The circumstances of it specifically, though, felt oddly familiar to him. After a few hour's worth of thinking, he knew it was his turn to leave too. He told himself it's for the eddies, that it's to do good and an excuse to see more out there. Regardless, his family understood, and pointed where to start. Starting his search in Beastside, Vamp is determined to find her. But deep down, he wonders; Is this a coincidence? Or is this the past coming back to haunt him?

sections.Backstory: Born in the NUSA in North Carolina the only child of a corporate secretary and a construction worker, Sarah was always fascinated with the Net and naively dreamed of being a Netrunner like Spider Murphy or Rache Bartmoss. Her early life was happy, showing talent and dedication in her education. When she was a teenager her father was the victim of a worksite accident which the company blamed on him, leaving him unable to work and with crippling medical debt. After that things got bad, her parents becoming jaded and resenting having an extra mouth to feed. Right as she was about to come of age, her parents sold her to Biotechnica in exchange for clearing their debt and she became the subject of medical trials which included her chemskin, horns, tail, ears, and Scent Scanner. Sometime during this period her talent was recognized and they moved her from the trial program into their netrunning school, outfitting her with implants and training her to be a corporate Dweller. Finally getting to live her childhood dream, albeit in a twisted way, Sarah started to adapt to this new life and didn’t mind it for a few years. She even made a friend in the same program named Lucinda. This new “normal” was ruined when corporate execs pushed Lucinda too far on a project and she ended up comatose. The last straw was Sarah discovering Lucinda’s vegetative body being used for medical experiments. She ran away, joining up with a nomad caravan to get as far away from the east coast and NUSA as possible without being tracked down by the megacorp, exchanging her skills as a netrunner for the trip.

sections.Backstory:
Born in Watson, Sammantha was born into this world the oldest of 4 siblings. From a young age she was fascinated by the computers of the world, never managing to get her own until she managed to scrounge up an old broken cyberdeck, She repaired the old thing herself after 2 years at least and a few hundred eddies she spent herself. From then on she thought she was hot shit. Getting herself into netrunning and getting chromed up.


She wound up working quite a few jobs for the maelstrom gang as a low level netrunner. She also managed to get herself into a small group of netrunners that are affiliated with the gang. Ultimately she became a merc, a solo, and took whatever jobs she could to help support her siblings and keep them fed. Even going as far as being a joytoy when funds were low enough. She was desperate but content to a degree. 


One day she took a contract from some corpo bigwig in Arasaka, he made her sign a contract, and she went along with it… the contract ended in disaster, it was way out of her skill range. As a stipulation of her contract she was given a doll chip under the control of the corpo bigwig. Now her will was not entirely her own and she hates it, a piece of eyecandy… an example to be made of what happens if you mess with the corp. She goes on whatever oddjobs her contractor requests of her nowadays, Clearly pushing some minor objectives for Arasaka. Whenever she is in control of herself she will be out acting as a joytoy. Giving herself just a taste of freedom through the one thing she chooses for herself. She dreams of being free of her debt and getting her freedom back.
Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc
sections.Known Affiliations: Old Runner group, siblings she is still providing for. Her contractor an Arasaka corpo. Various regular clients when she acts as a joytoy, Various members of the maelstrom gang.

sections.Backstory:
Raised in Tokyo Bay

Mimi had an abusive father but a very caring grandmother which caused alot of back n forth trauma, being shown love and hate. 

At university, Mimi found herself drawn to networks and infrastructure, to the hidden places where the city held itself together. 

She did work as a covert agent in Japan spying for networks for anomalies. Changes slowly happened over time and came gradually. Color bleeding where it shouldn’t. Purple settling into her vision like a bruise that never faded. Her hair lightened under stress until it turned pale, soft as ash.

sections.Name: "Lior London"
sections.Psychological Profile:
Lior is hyper-aware of power dynamics and control. They instinctively assess who holds leverage in any interaction and adjust their behavior accordingly. This makes them socially skilled but emotionally guarded; vulnerability feels dangerous, even when it’s wanted.
They struggle with autonomy: craving independence while feeling safest within clearly defined boundaries. Lior has difficulty trusting kindness without contracts, and often assumes generosity is transactional.
They are resilient, observant, and a tad bratty. Survival taught them patience over impulsiveness, but beneath that patience is a simmering anger they don’t fully know what to do with yet.

Trauma:
Prolonged loss of autonomy due to enforced DollChip use.


Conditioned responses that sometimes trigger even when chips are inactive.


Severe distrust of “benevolent” figure, fixers, handlers, or anyone offering protection with or without strings attached.


Panic response to restraint.




Behavior & Quirks:
Automatically checks exits, cameras, and access points when entering new spaces.
Keeps their cyberware meticulously updated and encrypted.
Tends to ask clarifying questions even when they already understand, testing for inconsistencies or hidden terms.
Uses humor and flirtation strategically, then abruptly drops it once control of a situation is established.
Sleeps lightly and in short cycles.
Keeps multiple backup IDs and burner agents, rotated obsessively.



Emotional Tone:
 Lior is broken, they are angry, tired, and barely surviving.
They want control more than comfort. Safety more than affection. When they do allow themselves to care, it’s quiet. Lior presents as calm, approachable, and professionally warm, but emotionally distant. There’s a practiced softness to them that never fully lets anyone in.
When threatened or cornered, their affect flattens, voice steady, movements become more precise, emotions locked down. In moments of genuine safety, they become quietly affectionate, almost shy, revealing flashes of tenderness they quickly retreat from once noticed.

sections.Backstory:
Cyrus "Cyr" Jacobs and his older brother Lionel grew up in Night City's shadows, two idealistic kids who joined the NCPD to make a difference. By their early twenties, Cyr was a street-smart patrol officer and Lionel an evidence clerk, but the department's corruption and poverty led them to a desperate choice: they accepted a covert offer from the mercenary powerhouse Barghest. Becoming double agents, they siphoned resources and manipulated cases, telling themselves they were playing a dangerous game for survival and future advantage within the city's ruthless power structure.

This fragile double life shattered when Barghest command, unaware the brothers were their own inside source, assigned Cyr a critical mission: an NCPD insider had stolen a large sum of marked eddies to build a case against them. Cyr was ordered to hunt down the traitor. The irony was a gut-punch. He was being tasked to investigate his own crimes. Paralyzed by fear and paranoia, Cyr and Lionel scrambled to fabricate leads, their bond straining under the immense pressure as Barghest's scrutiny intensified.

The operation culminated at a derelict industrial site near the Badlands. Cyr's squad located the target: a lone NCPD patrol car. With dread coiling in his stomach, Cyr approached and found his brother Lionel slumped in the driver’s seat, murdered by a single gunshot to the chest. The stolen money was gone, but the killer's signature was clear. A Barghest patch was prominently displayed on the windshield. This was no botched theft; it was a brutal message of betrayal and termination from the very organization he served.

In that moment, Cyr's world collapsed. The guilt was suffocating; his complicity had delivered his brother to the slaughter. Without a word, he turned from the grim scene and fled into the night, deserting his squad and his old life. He plunged into the Badlands, a broken man with nothing but his sidearm and his trauma. For days, he was prey. Starving, dehydrated, and evading scavengers. Until he finally stumbled, more dead than alive, into the path of a Aldecaldos nomad convoy.

sections.Name: Jane Doe
sections.Psychological Profile: She is not quiet, curious and obedient. Outwardly compliant,  and inwardly feral. She pokes systems just to see where they squeal, breaks in to explore but not steal. Rules are toys. Authority is a puzzle box she enjoys opening the wrong way. There is a constant hum of playful defiance in her, a gremlin energy that leaks out in small ways. Taking the long route just because. Standing too close. Smiling at the wrong moment. She delights in micro-chaos as long as it does not threaten the leash she knows is still there.

# {BAWS Light Assisted Combat Personal Armor: Fenrir}

A Light ACPA moderately increases the survivability and strength of a PA Trooper. A trooper can deadlift 50% of their suit's maximum weight capacity and carry up to 25% maximum weight capacity with no noticeable encumbrance

Light ACPA are powered by a combined fuel cell/battery unit that lasts 48 hours and can be replaced in the field. All Light ACPA are considered watertight down to 30 meters, and have a filter/rebreather system that allows for 1 hour of sealed operation. The filter system also works on dry land.

sections.Backstory: Born and raised in the smuggler city “Stateline”. Being a smuggling hub due to the city being the metaphorical bridge for both Northern California and Southern California. She fought for her and her family's survival against gangs, smugglers and for air to battle the toxic smog clouds that occasionally blew through the area from Southern California. But she still found a modicum of hope within the community that didn't try to sell each other out. As the states declared independence, Melissa felt compelled to keep what freedom they had and with a mix of smugglers, gangs and honest people. And at the age of 21 she joined the militia to protect the messed up home she grew up in. After showing a high aptitude to combat tests and sabotage, she was trained in a special operations unit. Her unit conducted various missions out east behind enemy lines and clashed with NUSA, Araska and Militech forces throughout the war. Once the war was completed and she returned to her home in Stateline, she returned to her normal life and picked up a job as a bouncer for one of the bars in town. A smuggler whom she befriended “Grave Dust” told her that he knows someone that is looking for someone with her set of skills and thus she was introduced to the syndicate. She saw what they offered; an escape from Stateline and something akin to true freedom.

sections.Backstory: Ryder Pridemore was born in Heywood and lived most of his early life with his sister, Zoey Pridemore, and very sick mother, Pearla Pridemore. While Ryder’s sister was a Loudmouth hothead solo who always seemed to be causing issues for eddies, his mother was soft and sweet, always reaching a hand to his sister even when she would push away. Ryder never understood his mother, always asking why? Why help someone who has only caused issues and pain? His mother responded “Ryder, before you can judge someone you must try to understand their own issues and pains.” She explained that Zoey was forced into the Merc life to support their family once their father was killed by The Animals. Ryder, finally understanding all the weight placed upon his sister's shoulders, decided to help in any way he could. Starting with household chores and general maintenance, he eventually convinced his sister to let him work with her so they could pay for their mothers medication. After a few months of training, he was finally able to be of help to his family, taking some of the burden off his sister, but it couldn't last. Over time their duo gained them some fame, they were asked to take to their biggest job yet, Stealing Hightech Corpo Weaponry. Zoey told Ryder to stay back, but he insisted on going, stating that they are a team and whatever they do, they do together. After a long time of convincing, Ryder was successfully brought into the job. The job went suspiciously well, but Ryder's optimism kept Zoey’s mind off the dreaded feeling of a trap. When they went to complete the job, they were taken by The Animals. After they awoke, they found themselves disarmed, surrounded, and outnumbered. It was a trap from the start, the fixer got his weapon, while the gang got the chance to get rid of the duo. Using her skills as a solo, Zoey broke themselves free leading to a firefight. With their teamwork, they were able to hold the Animals back, but then a stray bullet hit a propane tank. Realizing her brother would be hit by the explosion, she took the dive, protecting her brother by any means necessary, even sacrificing her own life. Later wake up in a hospital, Ryder was all alone. asking a doc the situation, she explained that Ryder had a trauma team membership, leading him to be taken to the hospital, but only him. His sister sacrificed not only her pay to get him trauma team support, but also her life. After he was let out he returned home, his mother hugged him, crying in his arms for he was the only one to return back to her. A few weeks later, she passed, and left him a small amount of money from what should have been used for medication so he could start a new life somewhere far away. So with nothing left, he started his new life alone.

sections.Backstory:
Iris was once a junior braindance technician for a mid-tier medical corp that specialized in “memory therapy.” Over time, her work shifted from healing trauma to erasing inconvenient truths including deaths, accidents, and corporate misconduct. Unable to live with what she was asked to remove from the world, she fled and now operates independently in Beastside, offering illicit BD edits and emotional reconstruction for those desperate enough to pay.

Her implants let her recall everything she’s ever seen, but that same clarity is slowly unraveling her ability to separate real memory from curated narrative. Iris now seeks one thing above all. The truth of her own past, and who might have rewritten it.

sections.Name: Manolo Costazuela, aka “Manny,” aka “El Toro de Sangre”
sections.Psychological Profile: Charismatic, calculating, calm.  A man who despite his early life and namesake does not act out of anger or emotion.  Every move is a well thought out Chess play.  A gambit that he has thought through multiple times through multiple outcomes.  Soft spoken, and highly empathetic but to the ends of manipulation typically.  Rarely when his temper does boil over, it is a rage that is nearly uncontrollable.  Only calmed when the realization that his well crafted facade has broken finally hits him through the fog of red.
sections.Physical Description: A man done up in an exotic job to look like an Angus Bull.  Built like a bodybuilder, and imposingly tall.  Cyberware lines are gold plated, as well as his horns.  His piercing blue and gold cyber eyes spin in clockwork rhythm, as if to accentuate his calculating nature.

sections.Backstory: Originally from the NUSA, Georgia to be specific, Luna left her home town to come to Night City to explore new possibilities. When she first arrived, she struggled to make ends meet, constantly breaking the bank with her charity in giving food to the homeless. However, one day, she was approached by a well dressed man who offered her a job. When she went in for the interview, she found herself in the Biotechnica builing, interviewing to be subjected to genetic testing. it paid extraordinarily well, and came with a lifetime allowance for visits to Biotechnica psychologists. Her Implants, however, even though they were organic, still required maintenance with immunosuppressants and ripperdoc visits. Now her regular income is from being observed by biotechnica scientists to ensure they understand how the implants are functioning with her body. otherwise, she is just living her life.

sections.Name:
**
Jesse "Fawn" Snowmoon
sections.Age:
**
Late 20's - They stopped keeping count a while ago, and aren't reminded often.
sections.Pronouns:
**
any (they see themselves as fluid), they take any pronouns in stride, as a clue; it helps them understand how they are being perceived by others
sections.Occupation:
**
Techie - Gear and Cyberware repair and design
sections.Psychological Profile:
**

Very reserved and mousy, they are outwardly very quiet and prefer to go unnoticed; when approached, they are very friendly yet guarded.

In the rare occasions where they find themselves around people they deem trustworthy (or when they are drunk) they explode into a bratty, playful and joking attitude.

They prefer to keep to themselves and not inconvenience anyone, they are deeply apologetic and mindful when burdening others. They will always assume their company is undesired, and will give others' space unless explicitly requested otherwise.

Fiercely independent in a very reserved way. They never assume others  will come to their aid nor do they factor the help of another in their plans. Contradictively, they desperately long to be taken care of and protected, seen and understood.

The loss of their Nomad tribe makes creating new bonds and attachments very difficult, due to fear of another loss. Their approach to bonding and relationships is from a place of hopelessness. They see all bonds as something that will be inevitably lost.

They have little sense of belonging if at all, intentionally keeping themselves at the margin of everything and everyone; yet contradictively desire nothing more than to belong.

At any given moment interacting with another, they will be assessing and analyzing their speech, microexpressions and body language to make a psychological profile of them. They seek to understand deeply, both for their own protection and the benefit of others. They usually have a very quick and easy grasp of any person's wants, needs, preferences and limits a few minutes into conversation.
They see themselves as unimportant and expendable; if they could have given their own life for their tribe to have survived, they would have. They see themselves as sacrificial and wish for another opportunity to make a difference in someone else's life.

They take themselves and everything VERY SERIOUSLY when acting from their outer shell; in confidence, and when intoxicated, they are VERY RELAXED about everything.

Their gender identity shifts depending on occasion and company.

As a techie, they are also a bit of a gun nerd and enjoy time at their braindance gun range.

They like to remain a mystery, and enjoy keeping secrets and not being figured out... forever, if possible.

Low pain tolerance and muscle mass, they are very easy to incapacitate.
sections.Physical Description:
**

1.71m, slightly unfit but able bodied, cervine, male yet remarkably missing their expected male deer antlers, they dress in a comfy manner. They often dye their hair and wear contact lenses.

From an outsider's view, they seem "untainted" by Night City. The mystery lies in the possibility of this being simply an outward shell or a real character trait.

Despite being male, their body is somewhat feminine. Their voice is naturally deep (much to their enjoyment when surprising others).
sections.Chrome / Implants:
**

Fawn is VERY AFRAID of implants and body modification. They're somewhat purist regarding their own physical body; they do not judge other cyberwear users, though they do wince lightly when overanalyzing others' chrome.

sections.Backstory:
**  
- Grew up as a Watson slummer. Mother taught him how to use his hands to get what he wants, Father taught him how to use his mouth to get away with it. Around 16yrs, his slums were visited by Arasaka, who were recruiting for an “Experimental Initiate Program”; in which the people were pitched with: “Your chance to explore the world’s unknowns and have your name be known by the world.” His parents let him go after he begged to let him prove himself.

- Cyberware Experiments were performed on him and his batch—most resulting in the subjects ending braindead or simply dead. Some grew extreme boons that were deemed “too volatile to nurture” and were disposed of. In his case, he was right in the middle. Stronger, faster, and most importantly, willing to prove himself useful, but with a hidden cost unbeknownst to him…

- Arasaka rewards this by giving him a consistent job as an essential Bloodhound, to hunt Runners who oppose Arasaka. In exchange, his parents were given a letter of success and a small check of “Emotional Compensation”. They would see their son a whole lot let less now. His current alibi/cover job is part of the Night City Police Department as an Undercover Detective.
sections.RP Hooks:
**  
- Charismatic, but almost too showy. 
- Willing to get into compromising positions to further his progress with a Target.
- Seemingly a street dog turned Corpo Bloodhound, but with an innate desire to find a real family and no longer be treated as an Asset.
- A possibility for him to betray Arasaka if other characters provide the means for a better gig so he can keep supporting his parents back
- `I’m REALLY interested in the unique player to player interactions that can occur with a Hunter vs Hunted lens. The slower the burn the better. I want to help facilitate Netrunners’ stories by giving them a Player Cast Antagonist.`

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Oxytocin “musk”; she has built-in hormone glands, which can release a red haze when her heat (period) gets close. She smells like lemons and oranges with a hint of spice due to hormones changing her smell.
sections.Backstory: When growing up, Ophelia was lucky, having political parents. She had a good home in Westbrook, a rich neighborhood. Growing up, she had the topline of everything, clothes, eddies, education but she didn’t know much about Night city itself. Her parents did not like when she went out alone. After graduating high school, she was getting ready to attend a university and planned to follow in her parents footsteps. To celebrate, a group of her friends dragged her out for a night in the city. They had been on Japan Street, a little buzzed and having a great time before chaos broke out ahead of them as a cyberpsycho was attacking. Ophelia was too scared to move, stunned in her spot as she witnessed this man kill at least six people, and two cops before finally being shot down by MaxTac. After that, she tried not to spiral from her own mental health, confused and traumatized from being so heavily sheltered. Her parents had to get her therapy when they realized she wasn’t getting better. It helped her get better over time, and even encouraged her to take on being a therapist to make a change in Night City. Her parents supported her fully, paying for college, program classes and her certificate. She decided to get bunny exotic modding done to be an “emotional support” person, along with small other modifications to be more mellow and friendly towards aggressive actions. She dreams of making Night City better, even if it's her parents' money.

sections.Physical Description:
Frankie shares both masc an fem features. Preferring to having to have changed their physical appearance to that of a woman. However they still respond to “He” or they. Frankie is lean built and well cut from the endurance of running through back allies and having to brush knuckles against skin when their guns and tech fail. However a freakish accident or what Frankie believes was a zero attempt occurred where most of their front face was blown off. With a combination of friends within NW and dumping their life savings they managed to get what is essentially a new head or rather…a helmet for a head. Within the clear glass surface of the helmet is a single yellowish glow which moves in accordance with what Frankie is looking at and can even display when they are drunk or hyped up on drugs.

sections.Name: Carl “Stinger” Nemo
sections.Psychological Profile: A severely traumatized  and deranged young man from a life spent in the ranks of Maelstrom.  Kidnapped as a teenager, augmented against his will, and drugged up for months. He’s not all there.
sections.Physical Description: Chromed to all hell.  Like any member of Maelstrom it is all custom made or scavenged.  His head’s not much more than a metal helmet, a brain bucket.  A mouth like a bear trap, and no visible eyes.  Like someone welded a full combat headset to his bonce and let him run wild.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Note: All of Stinger’s Chrome is repo’ed or back alley jobs like most of all Maelstrom’s chrome.
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Mantis Blades, real old models.  Probably back from when they used to call them “Wolvers.”  Not much more than sharpened spikes that shoot out from his wrists.  At 18 inches in length, each, they’re very lethal in the right application.  Activated by specific motions of the wrist, he doesn’t have total control.  They’re a “reflex” more than anything at this point.
 Auditory System: Noise Dampener, part of the custom head case he’d been “gifted.”  Prone to glitching, and bad quality as a result.
  Circulatory & Immune Systems:
 Hands & Feet (2 slots): 
 Integumentary System: Sub-Dermal Plating, standard issue for a Maelstrom Pit Fighter.  Under his palid synth-skin it don’t feel natural no more.
 Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg):
 Neural:
 Ocular System: Flash Visor, part of the custom head case he’d been “gifted.”  Sometimes can be triggered by bright lights inadvertently and blind him.
Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Neo Fiber, arms and legs, the Maelstrom rippers really did a number on Stinger with this job.  Sure he’s stronger, but the chop job has left him with a lack of feeling and tactile feedback.  Often doesn’t know when that strength kicks in.  Required the old Maelstrom “synth blood” special to keep cool enough for use in a human.  He bleeds the milky off white synth blood of many Maelstrom gangers.
Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail):
Miscellaneous: CUSTOM - “Bear-Trap Jaw” -  1 Point - Part of the custom head case, Stinger’s mouth isn’t much more than a maw full of sharpened metal blades.  His voice is projected by an old repurposed audio system.  He sounds like an old radio that was scrapped and salvaged a few times over.  Also, it required the old Maelstrom “synth blood” special.
sections.Total Cyberware Points: 9 without custom approval, 10 with custom approval.
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Stinger is a Maelstrom Pit fighter, so he knows how to fight hand to hand, but it’s not graceful.  He’s something of an urban hunter/tracker from years running the north side alleyways.  He’s got survival skills to match those years of running and living hard.  He knows his way around a gun, but it’s the effectiveness of a veteran grunt.  Don’t ask him to fix it beyond simple cleaning.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Since most of Stinger’s weaponry is built into him, he really only tends to carry a gat when needed.  An old NUE he took a rattlecan of red paint too that he calls “Black Dog.”  He’s partial to a fancy Machete he took off a Valentino he killed to earn his freedom, and wears it more as a trophy, but it makes a good weapon in a pinch.  It’s just a machete though, nothing special.  He keeps a few spare airhypos and inhalers for recreational use, and medications.  Like most Maelstromers he packs and travels light.  A spartan existence.

sections.Backstory:
Drift nations are a fun time, get to learn plenty by being in right places in the right time as a child. You make a couple of friends and then one night in your teens, They just vanish, gone. The dude saved your life dragging you out of a firefight between some old poser gangs hoping to relive glory days. and by god you’re not going to let him just disappear.

So you investigate, you find some ties to biotechnica doing sketchy things and now your doors getting knocked down by men in suits.

So you stow away on a cargo ship. Working odd jobs as the radio man alongside mechanics repair. So what does a fresh off the boat investigator do? make enough friends to set up a radio station and now your spinning records on by night. Some post rock earned some credibility with Maelstrom and you get a couple of requests by gangers looking for the true news and not the paid for, cash fed slop the paparazzi spit out.

the day though? During the day you’re scrounging around looking for more information on that corpo and hopefully… your friends still alive.

And as a hobby? You’re finding old records and songs, wanting to make sure the corporations can’t stain the legacy of some of these bands.

Being hunted by a Corpo for some information of a person that shouldn’t be around anymore

Radio news, bringing out the true lights of events that happen, for missions. Mayhaps being the cause of one of these events.

Tracking down old songs and records, wanting to keep the information.

sections.Backstory: Before Blair was even born, her father, James Murten was an ex-scientist at Biotechnica, one who was known to force exotic for sick reasons and was fired due to those reasons. Her mother was an unnamed victim to this experiment. The woman was impregnated, and 27 weeks later gave birth to a 13 pound premature baby, the woman passing not long after. Blares' beginning life was a blur, training, cages, pain. Everyday she was fed the same thing, a disgusting pink drink. Everyday. She hated it, but she had to get used to it, fighting the nausea and the sickness she suffered. She grew fast, and she grew really big and for years she listened and barely questioned her surroundings or situation. As she neared 21, she became curious, she wanted to leave, she wanted to see outside. Never having seen an exotic or people other than her father. So, she snuck into her fathers study to look for the keys, but instead of that, she ended up finding a file. The file went into morbid detail on what he was feeding her, on WHO he was feeding her. People. Exotics. Her body reacted first, making her start to puke involuntarily. Its pinks. She went into a heavy psychosis episode. She barely remembers, running, getting out of the lower level of the facility. She ran straight into her dad- and then there wasn’t much left of him when she came back to reality, she was covered in blood. She fled, being shot at by the turret system, and suffers heavy wounds before managing to escape. In a state of shock from blood loss and her reality and delirium, she managed to accidentally make it to Beast side.

sections.Name:
Asha 
 Merc names: Phantom, Hound, Zara, Tala, Scar, Sable, Calamity
sections.Occupation: Former Military Unit: NUSA 6th Urban Suppression Battalion. Currently: Solo Mercenary
sections.Psychological Profile:
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone.
Ash learned early that the military doesn’t want people.
It wants tools.
She enlisted at eighteen, chasing structure and clawing her way out of Pacifica. The exotic conversion came two years afterwards, "voluntary" in the way orders are voluntary when refusal ends your career. The canid frame was designed for urban pacification: heightened hearing for crossfire zones, reinforced limbs for breach work, and a threat profile that made civilians comply before shots were fired.
Pinned ears were part of the training.
Instructors drilled it into them: ears back, posture tight, face hard. It cut sensory overload, kept them locked in combat mode, and projected dominance. Relaxed posture meant mistakes. Mistakes meant body bags.
Ash never relaxed again.
Her unit was deployed on internal actions. riot suppression, corporate protection, deniable raids where the targets were labeled “hostiles” and never mentioned again. She followed orders until the day command rerouted her squad to cover a withdrawal that never came. When extraction was called off, the message was simple: acceptable losses. After her crew was wiped on a botched extraction and Trauma Team stepped over her dying body, something settled into place and never moved again.
So the anger stayed.

sections.Backstory: Orphans were selected to become exotic upon exotics, Promised a better life under Beatrice Collins. Extremely sheltered and heavily guarded and with only a Homeschool education. After getting fitted with new cybernetics, Beatrice informs him of his new life, sold to the highest bidder. Soon after guards came to get him ready to be transported but he refused. Pushing past the guards he ran and ran until he found one of the automated Vehicles, and with no time to lose, he jumped in and started the Autodrive systems. When the vehicle finally stopped he was in a new place he's never even dreamed of, Night City. With newfound curiosity and weariness from the long Journey, he sets out on his new life. Taking a look around he found people and exotics similar to himself, in all shapes and sizes, just like out of the stories he’s read! After asking around he learned about the world, learning that it is not unlike the stories he has read but much more gruesome and cruel. Seeing his weariness of Humans, an exotic tells him about the Eastside, a home to an abundance of Exotics Similar to himself. Thanking the kind exotic, he wandered some more until found himself at the Ripperdocs. They explained to him his cybernetics and how to use and maintain them. With all the new information he's acquired, he sets out to Eastside to start his new life on his own terms.

sections.Name: Kayla
sections.Psychological Profile:
Humor-masking, always joking or entertaining. Avoids serious subjects, sometimes joking at very inappropriate times to try and lighten the mood.
She keeps a tight lock on the part of her brain that questions who she is, where she came from, why she’s here. When asked, she has canned responses.
“I’m Kayla!”
“I’ve always been here!”
“This is where I’m meant to be!”
Not easily flustered but knows how to fake it for prospective clients.
sections.Physical Description: 5’4, hour-glass build, mildly fit, pink medium length hair and pigtails, dog ear and tail biomods
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Internal Storage
Allows for storage of small objects up to the size of a hot-swappable Mr. Studd™.
Hot-swappable Midnight Lady™ and Mr. Studd™.
Enhanced sensations due to custom internal texturing, vibrations, and increased stamina. Default in Midnight Lady™ mode.
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: Basic hacking and lock picking - mainly used for petty theft.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Lockpick set
sections.Backstory:
Kayla was kidnapped while coming home from school in her adolescence by a sex-trafficking ring and DollChipped. She barely got to experience the innocence of youth before finding herself in strange rooms clothed one second, then naked or disheveled the next. She also found herself unable to speak, unsure if she physically couldn’t or was facing some mental block. Over time, and possibly due to a DollChip malfunction, her memories of before were lost. The only memory she has is a faceless figure, probably her mother, complimenting how pretty she looks in her new dress.

Eventually Kayla met Eve, and was often paired with her. Eve became a caring hand to Kayla, helping her make sense of everything and slowly restoring her self-worth. Kayla never cared for what she wanted, never thought of hopes and dreams, never even had time between the endless cycle of strange rooms to even think of such things. Eve, having no DollChip, was able to make sense of the confusion for Kayla. By Eve’s lead, the two were able to escape the sex-trafficking ring and Kayla’s DollChip was removed.

Now, with no memory of her past and little idea of how to even function in the world, Kayla finds herself in Night City. She was anxious at first, but now looks at the world with childlike-wonder. Having been kept in dark, dimly-lit rooms for most of her life, Night City feels like a beautifully fucked up paradise. She does what she has to survive and loves it, grateful to be living her life on her own terms. She learned basic hacking and lockpicking to get by on petty theft, but when she found out she could make money just having sex, she was all in.
sections.Known Affiliations: Eve Starly (played by GooeyPancake) - Partner to Kayla, the two met while caught-up in a sex trafficking ring, were often requested for together as “twins”. They learned to look out for each other as a result, and now have an unbreakable bond between each other.

sections.Backstory: Terrance wasn't always a runner, but he wanted to be. Studied in school, never acted out, once he was out of that wretched place, he got to experiment, slotted cyberdecks he had only dreamed of in school, saw parts of the net only textbooks had given him sight of, sooner rather than later he knew he wanted to do work with some of the biggest names out there... if they'd let him. His expertise was accessing corporate databases, personnel files, you name it, and yeah, sometimes it got him in trouble with the law, he had spent a combined 5 years in and out of prison for crimes the unauthorized access of corporate data, but he kept at it. Eventually he was finding odd jobs running where he could, breaking ICE, scraping the net to make ends meet. Something felt missing though, he now finds himself sitting in his home, hoping for a job that'll give him a purpose, something to thrust him into the big leauges, make a name for himself.

sections.RP Hooks:
First Responder in regards to active policy holders or police requests. Reliable Ripperdoc with a low failure rate on her record for routine maintenance and augmentations. Has even worked with some Exotic/Custom installations. Need to make sure the Joytoys are alright? She can check them out. Can't afford a high-end netrunner or elite hacker? Gidgit can still get the job done at a slower rate, unless the job is a person, then she's an Ace. Slow day at the club? She knows she has assets. Maybe she can help fill a dancer roster if the eddies are good enough. She isn't afraid of getting her hands dirty. She can definitely do regular jobs where the job could use another gun and/or medic.

sections.Backstory: Damion was born in Ontario Canada, to a extremely poor family. He never got to know his family, because at birth he was sold by them to Militech where he was experimented on, turning him into a tool of combat, an operative paired with Slimon(not his name at the time) Together they completed every mission assigned, both were treated terribly by Militech... The lack of family, and being raised as nothing more than a slave for missions lead Damion to never learn proper emotions, causing him to have psychotic and sociopath tendencies... Eventually Damion and Slimon broke free of Militech when Damion brutally killed their overseer and the guards of the facility holding them... On the run they became Edge runners, performing various dangerous Jobs, Damion also delved into, eventually they had to split up to lay low, the heat had grown too hot, everyone wanted them, now Damion reunites with the only family and friend he knows, once again, ready to work night city for every Eddie it can offer.

sections.Backstory: ** Thunder runs from a troubling past, having moved to Night City recently, still holding an emotional grudge against Biotechnica for their unfinished work: himself, which they considered "incompatible" to Exotic standards. This is because of the fact that Thunder wasn't suitable for many of Biotechnica's high stakes cybernetics for full Exotic conversion, however Thunder himself believes that they were just siphoning him for eddies. Feeling ripped off that he didn't receive the full transformation treatment, Thunder demands Justice against an untouchable corporation. Now entering the mercenary game, Thunder is content on proving that even "rejects" can make it big in Night City, only taking gigs for those in need (or even those on his "good" side). Maybe Thunder *wants* the reputation to show them off, or maybe he has ulterior motives. In anyone's eyes, he's a vigilante wildcard. He ensures his "victory" is bad guys not receiving the satisfaction, regardless of the outcome.

sections.Name: Eve Starly
sections.Occupation:
Joytoy / Club worker at N1RVANA (new hire)
Secondary role (informal): “floor first-aid” - de-escalation + stabilizing overdoses/minor injuries
sections.Psychological Profile:
Core drive: Independence + safety + “I’m not property.”
Core want: Wants to earn her way onto Trauma Team someday - not just to escape, but to be recognized for saving people. She craves a real name, a real badge, and someone saying she mattered.
Core contradiction: Loyal and sweet, gives too much - actively trying to become hard enough to survive.
Emotional tone: Polite warmth on the surface; cautious hypervigilance underneath.
Surface behavior: soft-spoken, attentive, apologizes too fast, reads rooms instantly.
Under stress: 
Freezes for 1–2 seconds, then snaps into EMT mode: calm, directive, practical (“Breathe. Sit. Pressure here.”).
Cannot convincingly lie to authority figures
Trauma tells:
Flinches at sudden hands / raised voices.
Pet-conditioning phrases sometimes slip (“I’m good-good girl-” then she flinches and corrects herself).
Loyalty: if someone protects her once, she remembers forever and will overextend herself to repay it.
Current growth edge: learning to say “No” without explaining, negotiating boundaries like logistics.
Behavior quirks:
Counts exits every time she enters a space, disguising it as “admiring décor.”
Always carries a tiny roll of medical tape as a grounding object/reminder of the life she wants (as an EMT).
sections.Physical Description:
Height: ~5'4"
Build: lean/soft athletic
Notable features:
Exotic BioMods: animal ears + fluffy tail (BioMod, forced “pet” branding from captivity)
Two small scars near the collarbone: marks from a tracker/shock patch implant removal
General vibe: “gentle bedside manner” energy that turns razor-practical when someone’s hurt. Looks new to the club scene, but not naïve. more like someone trying to look normal.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
Note: Eve’s chrome is intentionally low-key and utility-focused, not combat.
Slots / Systems (1 implant per slot unless noted)
Miscellaneous (unlimited):
Exotic BioMods: ears + tail (BioMod / aesthetic)
Internal Storage
Use: meds, burner, lockpick, emergency cash
Tradeoff: maintenance cost; paranoia about being searched
(Removed): tracker + shock patch implants (scars remain)
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
EMT trainee fundamentals: airway/breathing positioning, bleeding control, shock recognition, overdose response, calm under pressure
De-escalation: reads tone/body language, uses positioning and calm voice to prevent fights from escalating
Street survival routines: exit scanning, threat assessment, keeping a “safe route” in mind
Social tactics: polite deflection, redirecting predatory conversations
Basic lock awareness: not a full infiltrator-just enough to survive (knowing where staff doors usually are, which locks stick, etc.)

sections.Backstory:
* Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc

Jack (given name being “Ashton” at the time, AMAB) was born in Heywood, living the early teenage years as a street rat. When she became of age, she went to work for Militech, being excited and motivated with the notions of “glory” and “seeing the world”. While working for Militech, she volunteered for an Exotic program to allow for soldiers more fitted to specific roles, hers being a scouting role. In this, she was transferred into having the body of a feminine humanoid Raptor to allow for quicker speeds. Ultimately, the project was a failure and while she is slightly quicker than Humans, it’s nothing notable. Pretty early on, she had experienced gender dysphoria before joining Militech, so the new feminine body actually helped her with that in the long run. She kept the body after her contract was terminated and now she works as hired muscle for clubs and gangs, not affiliating herself with them, but occasionally throwing in with the Animals as competition.

sections.Name: Nyx Calder
sections.Occupation:
Freelance Artist
    Nyx creates small-scale art: mostly photography, mixed-media prints, hand-modified holo-posters, and short looping animations sold to bars, clubs, and private buyers. Sometimes commissioned. Art doesn’t pay well, but it pays better than nothing, it makes them happy.
sections.Psychological Profile:
Nyx is quiet, observant, and emotionally reserved. They’re not chasing fame or a following, art is how they live and thrive in the city without letting it break them down.
They have a habit of seeing beauty in things most people ignore: broken signage, flickering ads, abandoned apartments.
Trauma:
Long-term instability growing up


Watching friends burn out, disappear, or sell pieces of themselves to survive


Constant anxiety about rent, relevance, and being erased


Behavior & Quirks:
Sleeps odd hours to avoid crowds and rush hours


They tear down their own work if it gets too much attention


Hates explaining their art, prefers people just feel it


Emotional Tone:
 Muted, introspective, soft-spoken. Not hopeless, just realistic.

Has no worries about Withered Rose Corps due to them tossing her out like trash, unlikely to come looking for her.

sections.Backstory:
Jinx grew up in Heywood, surrounded by parents desperate to claw their way into corporate favor. Disgusted by their constant attempts to appease corpos, she walked away early, determined to chase something that felt real to her.

Braindances became that obsession. With her own struggles related to memory and perception, anything that altered the mind fascinated her. VR, shards, neural tech, anything that bent reality just enough to feel different drew her in deeper.

Socially withdrawn for much of her early life, Jinx struggled to form meaningful connections until she met Ivy Walker. The two clicked effortlessly, and since then, they’ve been moving together toward Beastside in search of new opportunities and business growth, at least as far as Jinx knows.

sections.Backstory:
Ivy Walker grew up in Watson to a family well off for the area. Finding little interest in the local activities she spent most of her time on the net. Through forums and general browsing she learned of Brain dances, determined to save up enough for her own equipment to experience them first hand.

Shortly into adulthood she realized that Watson is not the place to be and journeyed towards Heywood in search of making it big. With little effort she found a company willing to hire enthusiastic but novice brain dance editors/enjoyers. She spent 2 years learning everything she could and started making a small name for herself along with interesting contacts. Through some of these contacts she learned of the world of XBDs. Gaining morbid curiosity she used her contacts to get a job working for a low level corporation creating XBDs. At first it was simple stuff, recording and editing torture, murder, etc XBDs but it accelerated quickly into her performing the torturing herself. After several years of doing this she started to enjoy the job. 

Due to her continued dedication to her craft she was offered an addition to her line of work. She began actively spying and recording on other companies local to the area, direct competitors. She would work for the competing companies for a few months gaining an inside look and direct recording of their techniques and products, spending time after work infiltrating directly into locked down areas of these companies she worked in. Then editing BDs of what she witnessed along with her primary jobs XBDs into advantages for her company. After sometime it took a serious toll on her health both physically and mentally so she resigned. Wanting to give back for the damage she caused she decided that she would help people with BDs. 

While Heywood is nice it was very expensive to open up a proper shop, her old company that she was employed for may also not like her opening nearby. She was actively looking for opportunities to leave and check the net for locals who may be in a similar boat. She found someone named Olivia More, whom she hit it off with. Spending some time searching good areas they found Beast side, a potential good location to potentially open something up. With a new friend and some direction she felt more confident with moving over to a new location to open a business.


Known Affiliates:
Olivia More - Friend
Former employer(Up to DMs who is the owner of said company) - Neutral

Jackson has schizophrenia so he sometimes sees stuff and hears things. (feel free to aod this as it would be funny) 
Jackson was always seen as a role model for Leo. Jack always took care of his brother and was the person who dragged Leo out of his car when his brother had the accident.
After the accident Jack took some time investigating the wreckage. What he found is it was arasaka who cut Leo’s brakes. He decided to confront the agent Leo got the race deal from. He is very prideful about his tribe. Loves talking about his brother and sharing stories of their antics.

They cut his brakes because he lost to Malstorm. Competor got first and Leo got second. Saka put 500k eddies on the line for this race and losing pissed them off. 
The bounty i understand. Lets label it as this instead “Due to him investigating into the accident and going public with his findings some executives are still a little salty” 
The exotic makes sense as Native Americans sometimes used animals as figures of gods. Giving Leo and Jack an animal body is a sign of high praise and respect.

sections.Name: Jabbles Katan
sections.Psychological Profile:
Slight emotional detachment through via Trauma Bonding from time in Service, often mistaken for stoicism. Generally unnoticed as he keeps things light hearted so the good times mask the bad. Used Disability Compensation to fund being an exotic. Now uses it for food and basic living. Overall, Jovial with mostly positive outlooks and chill. "Embrace the suck" and "It is what it is" with a smile. Acts Dumber than he is, uses this as a social manipulation rather than a defense mechanism.

Specific Strengths:
Cool Under Pressure - Same Shit, Different Day. Let's get to work.
Compassionate Leadership - You've been working like a  Dog, take a break.
Silver Lining - Always see's the light in the dark

Specific Flaws:
Used to Brevity - Does not handle "Explaining every little bit of why something needs to be done" well.
Shoulder Impingement Syndrome - Has full range of motion of arms, pain at end of range of motion.
Emotional Detachment - Understands it's sad your Mom died but doesn't get why it's keeping you from functioning

sections.Backstory: Growing up, Jabs always looked to the skies. Growing up in New York, he wanted to join NUSAF, but was forced into college. Studying in Cyber Security and Computer Forensics, which he found an interest in, he found he preferred a more hands on approach. Abandoning his studies and going against his own parents wishes, he enlisted into the NUSAF. He found himself with the hands on work he wanted, but also learned the muck and mire that came with being engrossed in politics. For over a decade, he worked on various Aircraft, specifically focused on Power Generation and Distribution before finally deciding to call it quits. The Political climate, a fresh start, and the want to find something new drove him West. Of course, Night City has its own form of politics that Jabs is sure to find may not be as glamourous as he hoped. As part of his own wants to start a new life, he made the decision to, essentially, reinvent himself from the ground up.

Makes enough from Disability Compensation for basic Rent and Food. Uses it for food, and does best to bank the rest. Couch Surfs/Sleeps in Tent as needed. Used initial banked funds and payouts to finish Cosmetic Procedures.

Emotional detachment to those not Trauma Bonded with. Gets along with prior Enlisted. Easily able to bond with "battle siblings".

Knows he doesn't feel empathy. It's alongside his used to brevity. Doesn't care too much about it seeing as he keeps most people in good spirits. Easier to work with a happy team than try to deal with a depressed one.

People like Dumb Funny guys. Not a defense mechanism, a social manipulation.

sections.Psychological Profile:
Rook keeps things short, sweet, and to the point. She prefers to keep most people at arm’s length, though it’s unknown to her if that’s because of her profession or because of her childhood. That’s not to say she’s cold and cruel, she does have a favorite client or two, but she prefers a solitary life. Despite the scrappy rock look she wears, Rook is detail-oriented. Each part of her appearance is intentional, from the choppy locks of pink hair on her head to the scuffs on her boots, she cares about the impression she gives. However, only those closest to her will ever know that.

While she’s capable of locking into a task, she tends to fidget. Bouncing a leg, tapping her nails, cracking her knuckles… whatever it is she’s doing, she’s got a lot of energy and this is her way of expelling it. She speaks quickly, but with a dull voice.
sections.Physical Description:
Short and lithe, small bust and average hips. Her skin is pale from years spent indoors working on clients. Messily-cut and styled pink hair, usually tied back in some way to keep her workspace sterile. Black sclera and pale green eyes, glowing from her SmartEyes implant, but a bored expression most of the time. 

Usually seen wearing some sort of “Rockerboy” inspired ensemble, lots of black leather and silver jewelry. She prefers layered outfits, but she’ll wear minimal layers while working to keep things clean. She always carries minimal first-aid supplies in one of her belt-bags.

sections.Backstory:
Roselyn “Rose” once operated in the upper tiers of Arasaka’s legal machine—an elegant predator in tailored suits, crafting arguments sharp enough to bury scandals and reshape public narratives. Her specialty wasn’t litigation; it was containment. She managed high-risk data leaks, silenced whistleblowers, and drafted contracts that kept entire divisions in line. She was valuable, feared, and—most importantly—trusted with secrets worth more than lives.

But Rose had a flaw: she liked to know more than she was supposed to. Her need for stimulation and her grandiose self-image pushed her to dig deeper into sealed databases, side channels, and black archives “just because she could.” That’s how she stumbled onto the wrong file.

Buried under encryption, she uncovered a series of internal memos tied to Project HOUND, an experimental augmentation program using unwilling test subjects—employees, street kids, migrant detainees. The canine exotics she now carries were born from that project. She recognized the procedures, the signatures, the timeline.

She hadn’t volunteered.

Her “executive wellness retreat,” billed as a corporate perk, had been a covert trial phase. She was supposed to forget it—neurologically scrubbed, memories chipped out—but something in the process failed. Her body changed, instincts sharpened, and fragments of what happened clawed back through the cracks.

When Rose confronted her superiors, they didn’t deny it. They simply marked her as a risk.
The first assassination attempt came the next morning.

Rose escaped only by leveraging her nascent netrunner suite—half-installed, unstable, and not designed for someone under fire. She fled the corporate district bleeding, shaking, and laughing at the absurdity of being hunted by the very people she once defended.

Night Watch found her collapsed in an alley. She expected them to kill her, or worse—send her back. Instead, they offered a deal: protection in exchange for expertise. A net-savvy ex-corpo lawyer who knew corporate procedure, black ops patterns, and internal architecture? She was a goldmine.

She took the offer immediately.

Now Rose serves as Night Watch’s resident consultant, twisting her exec knowledge against her former world. She tracks corporate abuse, exposes hidden experiments, hunts blackbag teams, and helps the Watch navigate the tangled legal and digital hellscapes of the megacorps.

She says she wants justice.
She claims she’s protecting Night City.

But deep down, Rose is driven by something much more personal:

She wants to make the corpos feel hunted.
She wants them to know she remembers.
And she wants revenge to feel earned.

sheet.preamble:
Juno Kelner (Valkyrie)
28
She/They
Medtech (based on Cyberpunk red class
although she came to night city to help people in the beginning, the years taught her that it's not a realistic goal to be doing that anymore. Now she is willing to help people for the right eddies, although her prices are fair and take advantage of her old Trauma Team contacts. 
Juno is a Vulpine exotic with a blade in her hands and a dream in her heart. She is cold and calcualted on missions but otherwise is fairly amicable. She is also quite the menace with a D8 Copperhead if she can get her mitts on one again. Fur as dark as the city and a toned body that really shows what she can do.
She has Enhanced Ears, Biomonitor, internal storage, SmartEyes, and nano stitch skin
total Cyberware points 8
skilled with a sword, general firearms knowledge, and especially good as a surgeon
currently has a ballistic chest plate, and a two handed sword
Juno Kelner hailed from the Denver region, coming to Night City to pay off her tuition with Trauma team. as soon as she was able to pay that off she quit the force and now works as a freelance medical professional for anyone with enough eddies...as long as they aren't a complete douchebag about it. 
She has known affiliations with Trauma Team
Juno started her life in rural Colorado with her parents her mother from japan and her father who served overseas, eventually finding her calling in surgery and medical care. in order to pay for the schooling however she took a job up with trauma team. Her mother had ties to the corporate world in Arasoka and was able to suggest going with trauma team.
She started working under the Codename of Valkyrie, which was given to her by her trauma team squad for her almost death wish tendencies. (because it seemed that she wanted to go to Valhalla very badly) 
after a good while with trauma team and working high paying contracts with Arasoka she was deployed to a call where she was to save an exectutive from the company that was in a AV Crash. Given that she was bound personally by the Hippocratic Oath she saw that the Man daughter was also in the car along with her. the coverage did not extend to the daughter and she was going to need surgery to have a shrapnel shard removed from her neck. the man was in much better shape and was able to make a full recovery, but when he screamed at Juno for not saving his daughter it snapped a final twig in Juno's mind. Hearing the cries of a man that was desperately clutching to the bloody cross around his daughters neck and begging for Juno to "keep the last reminder of his late wife alive" caused her to grow cold and distant from the people she operated on. which was a regret that she carried through her career.

Monroe was born in Heywood, spending a lot of her younger years volunteering at centers with her parents. There she learned some basic medical aid, and with the young light of life still to her, she looked to become an actual doctor to help those in Heywood and Watson that may need it. Unfortunately, due to the sheer cost of going to medical school, Monroe had to take out multiple loans in order to finish her schooling. She also interned at a Biotechnica medical facility, witnessing the disgust of treatment towards those of lower class by corpos, along with her own levels of abuse she had to take in in order to complete her degree.

Having graduated, she was unable to find a job willing to take her, either due to her lack of experience in the medical field, or where she's from with lower-class standing. This has resulted in her having to work a job always open to women: Escorting, in order to start paying off her debts. Though on the occasion, she does fall behind.

sections.Backstory:
Gary Mueller wasn’t handed his place in Militech — he fought for it. Born in Dallas to corpo parents who worked themselves to death for the company, Gary swore he would never be another disposable cog. From a young age, he threw himself into Militech training programs, tactical sims, and wargames, always the last to leave, always pouring blood, sweat, and tears into rising above the rest.

While his lack of raw aggression nearly derailed his career, he carved out a role as a planner — the one who ensured convoys weren’t stranded, units weren’t ambushed, and no detail slipped through the cracks. He earned the respect of Viktor “Maverick” Sterling during an assignment, the two forming a bond as a field-brains duo: Maverick leading in combat, Rooster ensuring the pieces never fell apart.

By 2076, he earned his codename “Rooster” for being the first awake, the last to leave, and the one always triple-checking the plan. Now stationed in Night City, Gary is a die-hard Militech believer, seeing the corporation as humanity’s only true future. His dream is to rise high in the ranks not for wealth, but to cement his philosophy of precision and planning as the Militech standard.

* Viktor "Maverick" Sterling – Trusted ally and field partner

sections.Name: Murphy
sections.Occupation:
Dancer (Night Club Performer / Entertainer)
Occasional bartender and part-time freelance companion or guard for trusted clients
sections.Psychological Profile:
Personality & Trauma:
Murphy grew up in a harsh military household in the Federal Republic of Australia, where affection was conditional and expectations absolute. Her parents wanted a son to follow her father’s path in service; instead, they treated her as a disappointment and cast her out when she was still a teenager.

Years of surviving through abusive relationships taught her to forget in order to survive — her mind walls off memories that cut too deep. She carries no bag, no keepsakes; she travels light, like she’s ready to disappear at any time. Beneath the trauma, she’s kind-hearted, eager to help others, often putting their comfort above her own.

Behavior Quirks:
Forgetful, fidgety, sings softly when nervous, shakes her leg when overwhelmed, avoids prolonged eye contact, brutally honest, dark humor as a shield. Her memory lapses are selective — she forgets pain, but remembers kindness.

Emotional Tone:
Murphy lives moment-to-moment. Usually shy and cheerful, yet when threatened or reminded of her past, a colder, detached side emerges — the survivor who learned to lie, run, and fight.

Nuva:
Depth- a calmly collected person who's goal is to usually get what they need when possible. Tho procrastination is something she dwells in, they always remain steadily eager. 
Flaws- asides from the procrastination, they dont frow attached to many people easily. Only certain gems can get on their good side, and their distrust blinds them from objectives. This distrust also comes from the schizophrenia that the cyber ware that derains in them. 
Personal-theyre abit cold at first but warmth goes along with trust. They like their main "tool" passed down by their father and would do anything to keep it close. 
Hook- theyre involvement with things counters their cover, and they tend to question and involve themselves into things they have to part of. But almost any other time theyre silent and in a corner of the room.

sections.Backstory:
Nuva was a engineer at a electrical powerstation for a high end company of ZetaTech. The the core that the facility had been making had a collapse and nuva was one of the very VERY few that made it out. They had to have major reconstructive surgeries and some minor chrome to the brain to keep them alive. Tho after they refused to continue working for zetatech, after the incident. Zetatech had tried 'convincing' them to keep working for them. But inevitably failed, nuva wiped their name from the database, and with their father dead, they have almost no one. With nuva being their new name, niley now dead, they remain hidden from their past to try and make do for their future. They now run through as a hired merc, that will take a job from almost anyone. Aslong as the price is acceptable.

Chrome- they have crome for their limbs, mi or strength, more for basic movement and agility. And intermediate to near advanced hacking tech as a bribe from zetatech. But it comes with paranoia schizophrenia, illusions, and heavy migraines and heart aches.

sections.Backstory:
Born on a PMC base out in the Free States, Clive was never really exposed to the world outside of it. This did not mean that he was starved of worldly experiences, however. The term "It takes a village" was never more true and most of the employees on the base took a shine to the young boy learning about the world he had been born into as they shared stories of their own homes, families, experiences and cultures.
In time, Clive took an interest in the medical profession, helping treat the injured contractors that came back to base after particularly difficult assignments and was trained by the head nurse on base, lovingly nicknamed "Ferryman".
Since his education was not formal by any means, he struggled with the basics such as injections and blood draws without causing undue pain or misses leading to the bestowment of the callsign "Prick", since he was never able to stick them enough times and would "Prick" them dry.
Following an assignment where members of the Blue Dragon Syndicate wound up in the med bays at the base, Clive, now employed by the company he was born into, impressed one of their brass well enough that he had his contract bought out by them and now serves as one of their mobile RipperDoc "On Retainer", being granted direction over a small MedJet in their fleet, whilst free to otherwise practice as he wishes.

sections.Backstory:
Project SoulNet: Started 2063 in an effort to expand on Soulkiller and its possibilities. An undisclosed number of people were taken off the street of Japan, or brought from volunteering. The goal of this project was to see the limits of editing Soulkillers engrams, and to create “mobile” Netrunners. These prototype Netrunners bodies were made of durable synthetic materials, and lab-made platinum. Dr. [REDACTED] learned it was possible to take an engram from Soulkiller and essentially brainwash the subject, leaving us with a completely blank slate. Subject 427 transfer into the body was successful but when presented with the first task of using a basic hack on a living “participant.” The subject was exhibiting behaviors of locking up, and having almost a “Blank stare” as described by Dr.[REDACTED]. This subject was put down Due to defunding and lack of success; The subjects were terminated and disposed of.

    May, 2077; Scrouging the junkyard I ended up finding a layer of dead robots that had’ve been around here for at least twenty years, but most of them were weathered down. I ended up finding one that wasn’t exactly damaged, but had a bullet in its head. I didn’t get it back into working condition until 2078, but its chipware socket was too severely weathered, and it seems to have some kind of biochip inside that's unremovable. But, the cyborg still seems to be in functioning condition enough to boot up. 
-Reven Reed.

sections.Name: Ren "Echo/Batto" Makoto
sections.Psychological Profile:
Task-driven when on the job, but prone to losing his cool quickly when in crews with talkers. Has happened once while on a mission with a crew. Set up his ears and the gonk wouldn't shut up...

"You know what?! Fine. If you can't stop running your gonk-ass mouth, then you can find out what's behind the door. . . boom"

Otherwise, when he's not actively doing something that's very likely to get himself killed, he embraces the fact that he's a bat exotic, and acts like most any normal choom, though maybe a bit more distanced due to his specific line of work. His focus during his work and getting those results are what keeps him humane. Another job well done. Another paycheck. Time to upgrade, then time to party!

He usually sticks to nicknames. Kang Tao corpos gave him the nicknames "Echo" and simply "Bat" or "Bats", but never "Batsy". People in Japantown called him "Batto" (just "bat" in Japanese), but never his real name unless they are his closest chooms.

Echo is a spy for a living. Most of his jobs include some form of recon, theivery, and/or assassination. He is very valuable in crews for being able to point out how an area/room is going to look before even opening the door, even with no cameras to look through- but that requires the crew to understand that you need to shut the fuck up when he is using his ears. Need a door open? Lock picked! Any traps on the door? The "Bat/バット" ears may be able to detect them if they have a subtle hum to them (ie. laser mines)

sections.Name: Lorenzo Harper
sections.Psychological Profile:
Lorenzo is a bright spark in the grim slums of Night City — happy-go-lucky, caring, and creative. He thrives on bringing comfort and smiles to others, whether through tinkering with tech or offering warmth and affection.
Beneath his playful nature, lies quiet trauma from being forced into choices he didn’t make for himself. Despite that, he embraces life with open arms, believing every body — chrome or flesh — deserves love.
Naive at times, but genuine. A little crazy, but deeply kind.
sections.Physical Description:
Short, thick, sturdy, and curvy — Lorenzo carries himself with a natural confidence. His wool is soft and well-kept, often doubling as a pillow for clients who need comfort more than company. His bright eyes glow faintly with digital light, and his holograms project around him from those eyes.

sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
• Exceptionally creative; can craft gadgets, gizmos, and quick-fix devices from scrap.
• Empathetic and nurturing — loves making people feel safe and cared for.
• Skilled joytoy; emotionally and physically attentive.
• Terrible flirt; always ends up being more cute than seductive.
• Handy with cyberware repair — especially small malfunctions or system bugs.
• Can weaponize scrap, tools, or junk into something deadly.
• Surprisingly destructive when cornered.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
• Scrap Electro-Magnetic Machine Gun — a rapid-fire launcher built from junk.

Requires constant scavenging for batteries and scrap or fuel to function.
sections.Backstory:
Lorenzo Harper was born into the Harper Nomad Clan, a family of mechanics, wanderers, and dreamers who traveled the highways between cities. His early years were filled with warmth, laughter, and the hum of engines — raised by his mother, father, and abuela, who taught him that kindness and craft go hand in hand.

That peace shattered when a Biotechnica convoy intercepted their caravan. The Harpers were coerced into servitude — their skills exploited by a corporate branch running a project that turned select individuals into “designer companions.” Lorenzo was chosen as a prototype, modified against his will with advanced holographic tech meant to enhance emotional connection and advertisement.

At first, he hated what he’d become — a product, a brand, a body sold under flashing lights. But over time, he realized that who he is cannot be taken by chrome. He learned to love himself in every form, choosing to bring warmth and joy to others, not because it’s his job, but because it’s his nature.

Now free but still carrying the ghosts of that past, Lorenzo wanders Night City as a joytoy and techie, balancing softness with sharp tongue at times, metal with wool, and machine-made light with genuine human warmth.

sections.Backstory: Roland “Trapper” Grant is a street kid from the Burroughs of New York City. He grew up in Brooklyn getting in and out of trouble with a local gang called The 34th Street Rikers. Throughout his teens he worked for/with them selling weapons, drugs, and just about anything else the Rikers could get their hands on. Additionally he worked for them as an enforcer, intimidating or taking out the myriad of targets they gave him. Eventually the Rikers would draw NUSA’s wrath, getting hit hard from all sides by the FIA. A mentor of Trapper’s, would die ensuring he escaped. He’d spend the next few months on the run, slowly but surely making his way towards the Western Free States. Trapper saw this as an opportunity to get out of the gang life, joining up with the Blue Dragon Syndicate for access to their tech, opportunities to make money, and protection. He would also begin mercenary work on the side as a side hustle using the gear that the syndicate gave him.

sections.Backstory: Stella was born in Northern California but moved to Night City as a young child. In her early years, she was exposed to the sex work in the city early, due to her parents living in Japantown, near Jig-Jig Street. Over time, she became uncomfortable in her own body, causing her to seek out and transform herself into an exotic. Seeing the abuse of these girls and boys growing up caused her to grow a sort of estranged attachment to protecting them. Eventually, this caused her to join the Mox as soon as she turned 18, leaving her mother. She became a JoyToy in the Mox and recorded BDs for them. All things come to an end, however, and eventually she became exhausted with her work. Stella started to become more interested in contract work, eventually landing herself a few gigs as a Solo for fixers around Night City. During a job gone wrong, the Backstreet Butcher Boys zeroed the gang that assaulted her and invited her to join up with them. She still keeps a passive eye out for other JoyToys, and will help out if they are being mistreated.

sections.Backstory:
race car driver who was getting good enough in the league he got a sponsorship deal from Arasaka. 
When he took the deal it was amazing for awhile until one day he lost a big race to a rival competitor.
The next race he’s on the big straight pushing 200 mph when suddenly his brakes stopped working. 
The accident which followed left him in critical condition but luckily he lived.
Now he has mechanical arms and legs with 6 mechanical vertebra in his upper spine.
It’s nothing special but just enough to keep living.
He now works in a hobby shop he started and enjoys running a secret business in the back where he illegally modifies cars for criminals so they can escape the law easier.
Because of the accident he has formed a deep hatred towards Arasaka. He also gets shaky when driving higher than 100 mph from the PTSD.

Hooks: 
He actively drives a modified Nissan Sentra from 2016 and loves showing it off. (Can modify year if an issue)
Loves working on cars 
With happily race you but prefers keeping it to the track.
sections.Additional Notes:
Prefers to not go do anything too dangerous anymore. 
His car business makes him most his money. 
Prefers to not kill but will if necessary

Think of a woman who has lost home, family, and has not much going on in life other than being forced into an industrial job to get by. She gets sloppily drunk, and is moody. Often she cries when alone, and was a black sheep amongst her now basically dead community for being far to head strong.
