sections.Psychological Profile:
Moose is a product of betrayal, exploitation, and resilience. Taken at 18 by a gango he owed debts to, Moose was sold to an unlicensed ripperdoc specializing in fetishistic biomechanical mods. Against his will, Moose was reshaped into a hybrid — a stylized anthropomorphic persona — and implanted with joytoy cyberware. Treated like a possession, he endured months of degradation until his “owner” tossed him aside for a newer experiment.
Scarred but not broken, Moose now works in the shadows of Night City’s pleasure district, using his role as cover while gathering eddies and intel. His goal is singular: track down the underground ripper rumored to reverse cyberware transformations — and reclaim his original self.
sections.Physical Description:
Anthropomorphic, wolf-hybrid appearance with vivid, neon-swirled fur patterns.


Lean but athletic build, striking cyan-blue eyes with synthetic pupils.


Tattoos on arms and shoulders — a mix of biomech designs and roses.


Wears tight suspenders over dark slacks, often shirtless to maximize client appeal.


Expressive body language, calculated poses for allure and control.
⚙️ Chrome/Implants:
Mr. Studd™ – Male performance-enhancement implant.


VoiceWeaver – Real-time vocal modulation for client preferences.


DollChip – Behavioral override unit; partially disabled by Moose for autonomy.



🛠️ Skills/Abilities:
Persuasion & Seduction – Trained to manipulate and disarm with voice and body.


Urban Survival – Familiar with back alleys, black markets, and safehouses.


Basic Ripperdoc Knowledge – Learned through necessity; understands cyberware risks and basic maintenance.


Acting/Subterfuge – Can convincingly emulate emotions, roles, and personalities.



🧨 Weapons/Armor/Equipment:
Hidden Switchblade in belt buckle.


Knockout Inhaler (non-lethal, for escaping rough clients).


Reinforced Clothing with limited anti-cut fibers.


Datachip Bracelet – stores key client data and blackmail insurance.
📖 Backstory
Moose was just 18 when the debt collectors came. Alone and vulnerable, he was taken from his apartment by a local gango boss and handed over to an unlicensed ripperdoc experimenting with biomechanical modifications. He was transformed—without consent—into a furry, implanted with joytoy cyberware, and enslaved as a personal plaything. Months passed before he was tossed aside, discarded like broken chrome.
Now working the backrooms of a Jig-Jig club, Moose hides in plain sight, serving customers while quietly gathering eddies and information. His dream? Finding the mythical ripperdoc “Switchback”—rumored to have the tech and skill to reverse bodymods and override cyber-behavior chips. Moose won’t stop until he reclaims the self that was stolen from him.
sections.Additional Notes:
Keeps a hidden journal under his mattress, filled with sketches of what he remembers of his old self.


Has a growing contact list of rogue techs, NCPD turncoats, and disgraced medtechs.


Secretly addicted to Braindance replays of pre-modified memories, though it makes the longing worse.

Umbra Solutions operative / Hyperion Dominion Systems asset.
Functions as a sniper, covert exfiltration leader, and executive bodyguard.
Her presence in Night City is part liaison, part deterrent: HDS sends her where subtle terror speaks louder than words.

Overview: Mission-focused but fractured. Violence isn’t just a tool for Ivana, it’s a ritual performance she can’t live without. She believes herself to be a valkyrie of the modern age, choosing who dies and who lives, sometimes with eerie tenderness.
Personality: Calculating, unnervingly calm until the switch flips. Finds humor in moments where no one else does. Smiles at corpses more often than at people.

Collects small trinkets from kills (dog tags, teeth, jewelry), keeps them in a labeled case.

sections.Name: Leon ||Draeven|| aka: Watcher
sections.Occupation:
Vigilante Edgerunner, former Militech black ops liaison

⸻
sections.Psychological Profile:
Leon is a paradox — a towering, intimidating predator who moves with deliberate patience and restraint. On the street, he plays the role of a cold, gravel-voiced enforcer of his own brand of justice. Off the street, in rare moments of privacy, his tone softens, revealing a calm, almost soothing presence.

He believes himself beyond redemption for the deaths he caused during his Militech years and the blood he spills as a vigilante. Instead of seeking forgiveness, he accepts the role of a necessary monster — killing those who prey on the innocent so others never have to.

Trauma defines much of his emotional distance: betrayal by a girlfriend who used him to sabotage his father, sexual assault by a high-ranking corporate woman that was covered up, and the moral weight of civilian deaths on sanctioned ops. He has a deep mistrust of women and avoids intimacy entirely.

His only private outlet is poetry — verses he writes in a battered notebook, sometimes bleak, sometimes yearning, never shared with anyone.

⸻
sections.Physical Description:
•    Height: 6’10”
    •    Build: Toned, athletic, imposing
    •    Species / Exotic Mods: Wolf–Fox hybrid exotic — foxlike facial structure with canine musculature and bone build, black fox muzzle markings, icy blue eyes, dark grey fur with muted brown/orange streaks, dirty cream underbelly.
    •    General Vibe: Towering and fearsome in public, quietly reflective in solitude.

sections.Backstory:
Sierra was born on the east coast, spent her youth in Militech training program with the intent of molding her into grunt in the corpo army. When she excelled at stealth training and marksmanship she was transferred to a special forces career path and trained as a sniper. Equipped with a light combat frame, and a rifle, she was routinely dropped into enemy territory with one instruction, kill the target. Her talents were used to great effect during the unification wars, and after the treaty was signed, she maintained her combat presence in Texas until 2075.
During an operation in Sherman, where she was tasked with eliminating an asset in the SDC, she had the distinct pleasure of watching through a rifle scope as her NCO sold her out to defect. As she sat in her sniper nest, Sergeant Major Ellis stepped out of the car where she was expected to paint the target in the yard for Sierra to eliminate some time later. Instead, the marker shone up the hill and directly into her nest, and a split second later a targeted drone strike dumped several rounds on Sierra’s position.
What happened next, for Sierra, was a blur of confusion and chaos. With three bullets buried in her back she ran off into the desert, her cover blown and her Militech status burned she weas as good as dead, this must have been enough for the assailants, since once they saw her collapse on the sands they left her to rot. That would have been that, but for lady luck, as she was scooped up out of the sand by the Aldecaldos. The debate between leaving her for the sands and taking her gear, or helping her, was postponed long enough for her to recover.
“Patch her up, if she lives, she can pay us back. If she dies, we keep her gear and leave her to the vultures.”
Despite the severity of the damage done to her lungs she didn’t succumb to the fever that set in after the surgery, she recovered, slowly. The day she started walking again, she hobbled over to the community cooktop and sat at the table with the Nomad’s, silently. Quietly several handfuls of eddies changed hands as it became clear that some bets had just been settled.
“What were my odds?” She asked the nearest winner.
“Three to one against. I just made a hundred eddies thanks to you. Fortunes favor strikes again, if I hadn’t spotted you out on those dunes I’d have had to pay for this beer with my own money.” The nomad grinned, sliding a beer across the table and sitting down across from her. She had shoulder length pink hair, a great tan, and a synthetic leather racing suit emblazoned in the flaming horse skull that showed off all her curves. “The name’s Kit, but
you can call me Lucky, all my friends do.” Sierra grinned at her laissez-faire attitude and winning smile.
“Well, you ain’t wrong, you’re definitely lucky.” She says, clinking beers with her and grinning. “If you hadn’t spotted me out there, I’d be coyote crap by now.”

sections.Backstory: Terrance was born in the summer of 2037 in Night City. Both his parents being part of a gang, Terrance grew up around the gang life. His parents did everything they could to avoid him becoming another lost soul in city. As a child his parents homeschooled him teaching him about the street and his family heritage. He was very fascinated with his great grandfather who co founded a infamous gang in Los Angeles during the 1970's. At the age of 16 he lost both his parents who were getting killed during a police raid. With nowhere to go he joined the 6th Street Gang in his neighbourhood of Rancho Coronado. At first he thought the gang is there to help the already impoverished neighbourhood. But the glory was just an facade of what was really going on in the gang. When Terrance turned 20 he left 6th Street behind with connections and knowledge. After he left the gang he tried to go legit as a construction site worker in Pacifica. In 2062 Terrance helped the incoming wave of Haitians in Pacifica and met Philippe Oreste. Terrance had it rough trying to be legit and he found himself in a life of crime again. For a few years he worked as a hitman operating out of Pacifica for various fixers in the city. In 2070 while on a job back in his old neighbourhood in Rancho Coronado he met old friends from back in the day in 6th Street. They told him about how worse the gang got over the years and how they left the gang with no oppertunities. Terrance at first tried to help them out but later on he and ex 6th Street members formed their own gang. At first they did gigs for various fixer but over a timespan of a few months they became indiepended. A new oppertunity opend in 2076 when he learned about the infighting within the Valentinos he took the chance. He went to Heywood with some of his people and recruited several members from the Valentinos to his own gang. On that day the Grapes Street Gang was founded.
sections.Known Affiliations: 6th Street (formerly), Vodoo Boys (the ones that still exist),

sheet.preamble:
**>>NCRP CHARACTER SHEET<<**
**[Name]** Alexi "Northstar" Klar
**[Age]** 24
**[Pronouns]** He/Him
**[Occupation]** Doll + Informant
**[Role]**
__Primary__ - Techie (BDs, Cyberware Mods, and Network Devices)
__Secondary__ - Netrunner (Coding and Spyware)
**[Psychological Profile]** 
*"The Dragon - A symbol of wealth, strength, and courage... Yet everything can be corrupted by the night."*
- While on the streets, he tries to maintain a more open and inviting personality. He takes any opportunity he can to get more clients.
-# *"Aw... Why such a lonely face this beautiful night? Could you use a little company~?"*
- Compared to his doll work, he's meticulous with his technical work and often shows more care to his craft.
-# *"Hmm... A millimeter off... Give me a second."*
- Due to the nature of his job, he lies a lot, though it's really easy to tell what he is passionate about.
-# *"I have no idea what you are talking about, officer."*
-# *"The stars are so beautiful out tonight... Wow."*
**[Physical Description]**
__Exotic?__: Yes - Nardoragon
__Height__: 5'11"
__Weight__: 180 lbs
__Build__: Slim + Muscular
__Description__:
Alexi has removed his humanity in place of a fluffy, slightly toned dragon-man. His fur coat and skin appear surprisingly biological despite its synthetic nature. There are noticeable markings across his body resembling the night sky.
**[Chrome / Implants]**
__Auditory System__: Enhanced Ears* [2]
__Hands & Feet__: Cybernetic Claws [1]
__Ocular System__: SmartEyes* [2]
__Miscellaneous__: Dollchip* [2]
__Miscellaneous__: Modded Mandibles [1]
__Miscellaneous__: Mr. Studd [1]
__Total Cyberware Points__: **9**
*Two things:
1)The description for a Dollchip on the excel sheet seems incorrect: it does not make sense for a doll to have only one person to issue commands, as dolls will typically have multiple clients issue commands.
I am following this for the Dollchip:
Description: "Import data from systems, have clients steer your behavior in-session, and wipe your memory after each and every session."
Side Effect: "You are completely unaware of what happens to you during the session, giving clients absolute freedom and discretion."
2) Alexi has modified his Smarteyes, Enhanced Ears, and Dollchip to automatically and subtly scroll sessions into a BD. This is transferred to an external storage bank via an encrypted link before the memory wipe.
**[Skills/Talents/Abilities]**
- Expert - Deception
   * Lying
   * Hiding Information
- Proficient - BDs
   * Scrolling
   * Editing
- Proficient - Hacking 
   * Writing/Modifying Code
   * Creating/Using Spyware
   * Data Encryption
- Proficient - Cyberware
   * Non-Standard Modifications
- Ability - "The Fine Print" Spyware
   * Alexi spiked the Interface Port on his Mobile Doll Setup- As a user jacks in, the tracker slips in, well hidden within the messaging and documentation he gives his clients before a session.
**[Equipment/Armor/Weapons]**
- Equipment
   * Cyberdeck
   * External Storage Banks [Encrypted devices used to store BDs from his doll sessions and client data from his setup.]
   * Mind Scanner [Easiest way to explain this is a toned-down version of the scanner in Clouds during the "Automatic Love" Quest in 2077. It is used to gather data to make a much more suitable personality for a doll. Most, if not all, systems will flag this scan, and this device cannot function without the Mobile Doll Setup it is connected to.]    
   * Mobile Doll Setup [A compact server setup disguised as a luggage bag with two external devices: A hand-held Interface Port and the Mind Scanner. It has all the necessary functions to create a personality and export the data to a dollchip and (secretly) an external storage device through an encrypted link. Data is deleted off the server after a session to conserve its limited storage space. It must be stationary and have a sufficient power source to function.]
- Weapons
   * Silenced Unity

sections.Backstory:
Asher was born and raised in Watson, back when the district was still choking on the fallout of the 4th Corporate War. cramped apartments, gang violence in the alleys, and neon signs never intended for children. His family was desperate, his father a dockworker, his mother doing whatever side hustles paid the rent.
From an early age, Asher developed a duality to survive: tough enough to keep the local gangs from seeing him as prey, but soft enough to keep him from standing out too much.
When he was old enough to clock in, Asher took the first stable option available: Arasaka Waterfront warehouses. He was strong, reliable, and didn’t complain. That earned him steady work lifting crates, running inventory, and keeping shipments moving.
Asher kept his head down, learned the rhythms of the place, and earned a quiet reputation as a worker who didn’t buckle or ask questions. He wasn’t ambitious enough to be noticed by Arasaka brass, but not sloppy enough to be cut loose.
Now in his late 20s, Asher is getting frustrated with monotony. Living life in the middle felt a slow death. With the savings he has left it was time to move on and figure out something new.
sections.RP Hooks: Worked well with Leon on a few gigs in the past.

sections.Backstory:
A decorated night-A decorated night-shift police officer loses his son to random street violence. Once a believer in the justice system, he discovers that the city’s institutions are too weak, too compromised, and too slow to prevent tragedies like his. The courts dismiss cases, politicians cut deals, and the streets keep claiming victims.

This realization transforms him. He understands that crime is not a disease that can be cured—it is the lifeblood of the city. Every gang, every hustler, every syndicate is part of its pulse. If you try to wipe it out, it resurfaces stronger somewhere else. But if you control it—if you decide where it flows and who it touches—you can shape the city’s heartbeat.

So he begins to operate in the shadows, using his badge as a mask while pulling strings that keep order in his own way. To civilians, he is still a protector. To criminals, he becomes a force of fear—an arbiter who decides what is allowed to thrive and what is crushed.

But as he dives deeper into this role, the lines blur. The more he controls crime, the more he becomes part of it. Allies begin to question his motives. Enemies see him as no different from the syndicates he manipulates. And at the heart of it all is his grief: is he honoring his son’s memory by sparing others his fate, or is he betraying everything his son believed in by turning justice into control?
sections.RP Hooks: Pragmatic Morality/Moments of Humanity/Personal Tragedy Everyone Knows About/Aura of Authority

sections.Name: Ashton "Ashy" Stripes
sections.Psychological Profile:
- Overall Disposition:
  - Highly personable, naturally inclined toward optimism, though this often masks a pragmatic survival instinct. He thrives in social settings, using humour and charm as both genuine connection and tactical tools. Appears easy-going, but reads situations quickly and adapts to avoid unnecessary conflict. A Sunshine character!

- Core Traits:
 - Adaptive Social Operator: Years of performing and later gathering intel have honed his ability to adjust tone, body language, and speech depending on the audience.
  - Optimism as Armour: Maintains a sunny demeanour to protect himself and others from the underlying reality of danger. This outward cheer can make him underestimated.
  - Survivor’s Pragmatism: Understands when to push against authority and when to step back; not driven by ideology alone anymore, but still retains personal moral lines.
  - Loyal, Selectively: Bonds deeply with those who earn his trust, but rarely gives away his full truth — even to close friends — due to years of covert work.

- Strengths:
  - Charismatic and disarming, making him an effective information gatherer.
  - Reads social dynamics quickly, able to defuse tension or redirect focus.
  - Creative thinker with a talent for improvisation in high-pressure situations.

- Weaknesses / Vulnerabilities:
  - Struggles with feelings of compromised integrity from working for a corporation, leading to quiet self-doubt.
  - Tendency to avoid direct confrontation about his own emotions, preferring to distract or joke.
  - Occasionally underestimates the long-term consequences of small compromises.

sections.Name: **  Xiao Min
sections.Occupation: **  Private escort/joytoy (for singular person) who has lost their way.
sections.Psychological Profile: ** Xiao Min is a very kind person; it’s almost a miracle they’ve survived this long in this city, but given how insulated and sheltered they have been (in a way) it worked. They tend to not want to ask for help, as this always comes at a steep price in their world, but find it difficult to not lend a hand to others who genuinely seem in need. They dislike when they perceive others as taking ownership over them, except those contracted to do so. Xiao Min feels both excited to have this newfound amount of freedom, and also terrified to have to make their own decisions. They get lonely easily, and are unused to specific kinds of violence, like gunfights, but have plenty of experience with torture.
sections.Physical Description: **  A mildly modified exotic, Xiao Min’s ears and tail mirror that of a pine marten- a type of weasel. They are around 5’5”, with brown hair and pale skin, and carry themselves casually, if a tiny bit nervously, especially when not around people they explicitly know and trust.

sections.Backstory:
Publicly declared deceased in 2071 following a failed assassination attempt orchestrated by a Lazarus splinter faction, Dr. Riva Kaelen’s neural engram was extracted under extreme conditions and secured within Project Echo Alpha. However, Lazarus lacked the stable infrastructure to complete full mind-to-body integration at the time. Unlike the Relic Project pursued by Arasaka, Echo Alpha remained fragmented, dormant a contingency held in digital limbo.

For seven years, Riva was not dead, but incomplete. Her influence continued subtly via encrypted ghostframe protocols and override systems used only by Lazarus' inner circle. She watched. She waited.

In 2078, Spliced Rebirth reached operational viability: a top-tier exotic frame engineered specifically for cognitive stabilization and long-term autonomy. Riva’s return was swift, silent, and surgically deployed into Beastside a fractured district ripe for influence.

She’s the quiet whisper behind high-value tech movement, organ procurement, and blackclinic referrals. Her ties to Eclipse are simple by surface claim: "I helped her get on her feet when she arrived." But the truth runs deeper, Eclipse is both a shadow and anchor, a tether to her past and a backup should Lazarus require something more.

Only the highest-clearance Lazarus personnel know the truth:

**Riva Kaelen never died.**
***She simply waited to be reborn.***
sections.Known Affiliations:
Lazarus BioSystems (CEO, blacklisted)

Eclipse Diagnostics (Cover Support)

Unnamed Embedded Operatives

Possible Historic ties to Arasaka
sections.RP Hooks:
A fixer with resources nobody should have

Knowledge of the old world, and the price of surviving it

Can supply illegal biotech, memory scrubbers, and designer bodies
sections.Additional Notes:
Cannot be detected via standard biometric scans

All signals rerouted through dummy nodes and relays

If killed in Beastside, an Echo Transfer Node can reactivate a backup within 72 hours.

**  

Was recruited into the NUSA where Brian ranked through the infantry with his partner Astrid Falk who was usually the one taking charge. This was his downfall, always following behind her, loyal to no end, throughout their time in the infantry Astrid has let her mental state drift away. Brian was always watching her back, had her safe, made sure she got out alive, anything that would get her court martialled he would cover for her, succumbing to her psychotic ways. They were discovered, showing signs of mental unstability, relieved of duty, medically discharged due to mental instability and as such would be left without a job to support any kind of mental help nor 9-5 job he could seek while trying to keep an eye on Astrid. She suggested moving to Night City, better work and for him especially with keeping that warfare feeling, it'll give the two the same thrill they once had. Of course he agreed and readied himself for what's to come.

sections.Backstory:
**  
* "I hardly remember who I am anymore... I know at one point I had memories. Friends and family whom I always had around... but, if I try to recollect those thoughts... I just draw a blank. I feel like I'm a different person now. Every time I wake up on the street I'm met with the same haze, few memories, only gut feelings and the familiar sensation of my skin on my palms.. I've died, I think. More than once. Sometimes I'll walk by someone who stops me with an expression on their face like they've seen a ghost, they talk to me as if they know me, but when i say I have no memories of them they look upset and let me go. I think this must have happened a few times, at least. Each time I lose all my memories of Night City, but I remember the layout of these alleyways, back streets, roads. Some places give me a worse gut feeling than others. I think it's been a couple weeks now since my last awakening, and from what I'm putting together, I think I keep dying. Arasaka seems to keep bringing me back, but... why? I hardly understand it myself, but ever since the last assault on Arasaka Tower there's been this new technology advertised to preserve one's life so they could life forever, Relic or something like that. All I know is that I've been reassigned to something called Project SHORYU... but most of the files on the project are redacted. Above my paygrade. It's worrying... Am I still who I used to be?"
sections.RP Hooks:
**  
* Part of Project SHORYU. Can work together with other Arasaka agents, as well as those affiliated with them, for work related to the project. Might be a great way to make some new friends... or potentially find some answers?
sections.Additional Notes:
**  
* Unbeknownst to Klumen, he's a test subject for Project SHORYU - not an Arasaka agent assigned to the project. Arasaka copied his engram to a relic chip around the time of V's raid on Arasaka Tower, as he had originally volunteered to have a copy of his brain stored as an engram for use in the project. He was never supposed to die before he had a chance to watch his engram be used in testing, but V's raid changed everything when a bullet to the brain zeroed the original Klumen. Now all that's left is his engram, a copy of a copy in a stranger's brain, taken and placed into a synthetic FBC body. Only a replica... but is his soul still in there?

sheet.preamble:
🌐 Night City Character Profile
🪪 Name
Melody “Mel” Jackson
🎂 Age
21
🏳️ Pronouns
She / Her
💼 Occupation / Role in Night City
Groomer / Barber
 Training Bartender at Club N1rvana
🧠 Psychological Profile
Personality: Happy-go-lucky, super talkative, charismatic, optimistic, and understanding
Trauma Triggers: Excessive violence, family issues, isolation
Behavioral Quirks: Leg bouncing, constant fidgeting, energetic bouncing
Emotional Tone: Typically uplifting and joyful; becomes quiet and reserved when triggered
🧍 Physical Description
Height: 1.60m (5'3")
Build: Short and stout; fit but not toned
Cyber Features: Exposed hardware around the eyes for quick access to cyber optics
Species: Human
🦾 Chrome / Implants
Each implant follows the one-per-slot rule, except for Miscellaneous.
Smart Eyes – Slot: 2
Biomonitor – Slot: 1
Ice Layer – Slot: 2
Netrunner Suite (Level 1) – Slot: 1
Nanostitch Skin – Slot: 2
Total Slots Used: 8
🧰 Skills / Talents / Abilities
Struggles to read the room but excels in conversation
Naturally uplifting with a de-escalation mindset
Energetic and socially disarming presence
🧱 Equipment / Armor / Weapons
None
📜 Backstory
Melody Jackson was born into the cold luxury of a Militech household—strict, pristine, and devoid of warmth. Her parents were high-ranking corporate operatives, obsessed with status and control. Childhood was structured, emotions were liabilities, and softness was weakness. Laughter was monitored, and vulnerability was punished. Mel learned early on that obedience was survival—but it suffocated her.
At 18, she broke free. No plan. No backup. Just a stolen jacket, her father’s emergency cash, and the soft, unspoken hope that someone out there might actually see her. She wandered into the chaos of Night City like a spark in a storm—vibrant, but unprotected. Her only tools were what Militech gave her: survival knowledge, firearm familiarity, and tactical instinct. Tools she never wanted to use.
When a turf war exploded between Maelstrom goons and a rival gang, Melody was caught in the crossfire—wrong place, wrong time. She hesitated to pull the trigger, and that moment of mercy nearly cost her everything. She remembers the blood pooling near her side more than the pain. The screams fading more than the bullets. And the worst part? The silence afterward.
Dr. Raelyna Rhineheart found her in that silence. Not just bleeding out, but paralyzed by a guilt that hadn’t even fully formed. Rae didn’t just save her life—she gave Melody permission to feel again. To breathe. To laugh without consequence. To touch soft things. For the first time, Mel wasn’t punished for being gentle. She was embraced for it.
Now, Melody grooms hair and fur not just as a job—but as a form of healing. Every snip, every brush stroke is a reclaiming of tenderness once denied to her. She's cheerful, talkative, and vibrant—not because life has been kind, but because she refuses to let it take anything more from her. Still, remnants of her past linger: the shaking leg, the fear of being alone, the silence that creeps in when the memories do.
She keeps her chrome accessible—not flashy, not hidden. It’s a subtle rebellion against her past: practical, honest, and hers alone.
Though she tries to avoid violence, the world around her won’t always let her. And deep down, there's still something unspoken left in the alley where she almost died—a memory, a hesitation, a truth she's not ready to face.
But one day, she might have to. But not now. Rae gave her a new opportunity and at a Night Club out of all things? Score!
🏷️ Known Affiliations
Dr. Raelyna Rhineheart
Club N1rvana

sections.Backstory: John Nolan was born in the great state of Pennsylvania and was raised by a mother who was a pathological liar who manipulated him and his father into thinking she was always the one who was the victim. His father walked out on them soon after. John was a pretty average student until all the way up to high school when he met his girlfriend. The eventually broke up and John found a new girlfriend who he was happy with until his previous girlfriend came back to tell him she was pregnant. John decided to raise the baby with his Ex and eventually got married. John started his own construction business to help with his new born son and realized that he a real passion for construction and fixing things. They lived simple happy lives until Hennery, Johns son, turned 18 and she divorced John. John was going to put his valuable items from his marriage in a lock box when the bank started getting robbed. John distracted the robbers long enough for the cops to arrive and arrest them. He knew at that moment that he wanted to be a cop. He moved to night city and became a rookie cop at the age of 41.

sections.Psychological Profile: Analytical, Intelligent, Professional, Posh, and Vengeful.

sections.Backstory:
Born in the corporate city of Norfolk Virginia. A young Tequila was the 7th daughter to the Wolf family household. A dedicated house to the Militech corporation, and the NUSA government. With Tequila herself attending an extensive Militech academy. In her schooling she showed great technological prowess. Excelling in most fields. Soon after she began college studies abroad with top grades in Germany. After completing her PHD in Psychology she began the trip home. However, sadly she returned in time for the beginning of the Unification wars.

During the build up to the ensuing conflict, a fresh faced Tequila due to familial pressure signed on with the FIA receiving her first upgrade in true military grade cyberware, and training. Her tenure in training was arduous, and tedious. With her specialty soon growing in espionage, data retrieval, psychological warfare, and asymmetrical combat. Her first deployments as a field agent against free states, and the Texas Republic solidifyed her status as a top tier Netrunner, spy, and combatant. 

With years of experience Tequila has taken up assignments around the world, and NUSA. Adopting herself to multiple cultures, clans, gangs, and guises. Her loyalty to the NUSA is without question, and will follow all operations to the letter. Her only goal is to demolish the enemies of the NUSA, and finish her missions with relentless efficiency quietly, and without a mess.
sections.Known Affiliations:
NUSA, FIA, Militech, Snake Nation, Mexican Government, German government, Texan Republic, Southern California.
RPHooks: Tequila is a prissy princess of a rich girl. Enjoying the fine things in life, and having a general disdain for most things not “Of pedigree”. Albeit despite her upbringing, she is ruthless, cold blooded, and prides herself on not failing her missions. Be ready for a woman who knows she's better than you, and will act like it.

sections.Backstory:
**  
* Riley grew up like any other relatively well-off kid in the NUSA. He dreamt of becoming some kind of hero, like the ones in the movies of the Fourth Corporate War. His parents had other plans. At age 17, he enrolled in college early, pressured and convinced by his parents that further education is what he needed. At age 22, he finally graduated with his bachelor's degree in hand. He started his career by attempting to join Militech's combat division as a contractor, but flunked out during basic due to "psychological issues". Dejected, he eventually wound up being hired by NUSA as an Intelligence Analyst. Hoping to finally make a difference, he put his all into his career, hoping to brighten the world even if his praises were never sung by the people he endeavored to save. 

* During this time, he met his now-wife, Kyuu, during a joint operation with Militech, and they fell in love. Soon after, the pair were reassigned to Night City, and Watson was formally let go by NUSA to pursue his deep cover operation as an independent operative within the city. Highly skilled, yet flawed in his empathy, Watson has been doing his best to provide for his wife and fulfil the orders given to him. He and his wife have been running the Nultide Detective Agency, a private investigation agency that the two of them formed a few months after they arrived. Watson is one of several active NUSA Agents within Night City, gathering intelligence on behalf of his government and doing odd jobs to appear to be "staying afloat" in the meantime, but he has doubts about the righteousness of his work. Zetatech have been contacting him recently, and he's starting to foster doubts about his true allegiances...

sections.Name:
Alice Martinez
DOB: 12/19/2053
sections.Pronouns:
She/Her
##💼 Occupation in Night City
Trauma Team EMT / Paramedic

## 🧠 Psychological Profile
Personality: Adaptable, genuine, sarcastic, caring. Fairly reliable and organized. Hypervigilant, calm under pressure but emotionally withdrawn. Rational.
Trauma: Minor PTSD and lingering flashbacks from a mass casualty event in Watson involving a cyberpsycho attack during a patient recovery.

## 🧍 Physical Description
5'10", fairly toned. Maroon-red eyes and short, wavy maroon hair. Arctic cross fox exotic. A scar crosses her right eye. Often wears black or red makeup. Tattoos include a crescent moon with cherry blossoms on her neck, a koi fish with blossoms on her right forearm, and a Samurai on her left shoulder. Gives off a chill, approachable vibe—often lost in her own thoughts, music, or tunnel-vision focused on a task.

## 🦾 Chrome / Implants
  * Biomonitor (1)
  * Ghost Tag (1)
  * SmartEyes (2)
  * Dermal Plating (3)
    Total CWP: 7
###  🧰 Skills / Talents / Abilities
Field medical treatment, situational awareness, high stress tolerance, decent marksmanship, educated, skilled negotiator, physically strong, passable cook, functional weapons/vehicle knowledge, basic botany.
### 🧱 Equipment / Armor / Weapons
   * Kang Tao G-58 Dian
   * Militech M10AF Lexington (Pistol)
   * Combat Knife
   * Trauma Team Armor (on duty)

## 🏷️ Known Affiliations
## Trauma Team
### 🤝 RP Hooks
   * Trauma Team contact for med RP
   *  Has history with Ayrn — unresolved emotional fallout
   *  Wounded vet with trust issues — easy to befriend, hard to get close to
📜 History / Backstory
Alice Martinez was born and raised in Japan Town, Westbrook, to a nurse and an NCPD officer. Her childhood was quiet and structured—decent grades, good behavior, and a clear path toward a medical career. She enrolled at NCU to study emergency medicine, determined to follow in her mother’s footsteps.

In 2073, just a month before graduation, her father was killed during a shootout with a group of armed suspects. Alice graduated top of her class that same year at age 20. Her mother, devastated, fell into alcoholism. Alice joined Trauma Team not only to pursue her career but to help cover her mother’s therapy and medical costs.
In late 2075, her mother was killed in a fatal car crash while driving under the influence. Grief hardened into silence, and Alice buried herself in work. The chaos of the job was easier to face than the quiet of loss.
Then came March 30th, 2078.

A mass casualty incident in Watson called for two Trauma Teams to assist injured Militech agents in a firefight with Maelstrom. NCPD claimed the area was clear, but one gang member survived—and went cyberpsycho. Within seconds, multiple officers and Trauma Team personnel were killed. Maxtac was deployed and neutralized the threat, but only a few wounded officers, Alice, and one teammate made it out alive.
During her mandatory leave, Alice met a joytoy named Ayrn. His presence was unexpectedly grounding. For the first time in years, she let someone in. They spent a night together. The next morning, he was gone. No note. No call. Just another disappearance in a life full of them.

She returned to active duty soon after, assigned to a new unit in Beastside. These days, she stays focused on the job, emotions tightly sealed under trauma armor. Friendly, but distant. Capable, but guarded.
She's not sure what she wants anymore. But for now, she survives.

**.
Salem can be very to himself, it’s rare that he speaks but once he feels somewhat comfortable around that said person, he make speak. Body language is the main thing to look for with him. He has some harsh trauma due to him running away as a child. He was abused by both his parents causing him to go silent from the age of 14 to how old he is now.

sections.Backstory:
**  

Salem grew up in a small town just a bit from nightcity. He had two parents like everyone usually does…. Both parents were very abusive. it was chaotic in the family almost every single night. Salem usually did not get to sleep, but he got a few hours if he tried his best to just close his eyes and forget what always happened. he was about 14 at the time when he decided to run away from home hence why he now has the name as runaway child a week before he left his home and decided to venture out his father did more than abuse that one night with the help of his mother him and his father, unfortunately took his left arm, leaving him to venture out and in pain his parents, then slowly throughout the entire week before that one day that he left decided to try and build him that one cyber arm, they found bits and pieces all over the road and alleyways and abandoned places and eventually built his cyber arm, so he would have an arm just like other people but not in the right way.. by the end of the week, Salem had to leave from his home he ventured out for a few days, eating what he could find drinking the water as close as healthy as he could he then came across of night city he snuck through one of the alleyways snuck his way onto a roof and looked over as he saw the night city there was lights people walking around he couldn’t believe what he had found. He kept quiet he kept hidden and kept to himself. say never told much about himself nor did he want to ever since that one day before he left his home or could he even call that home? he allowed to always keep quiet and never speak a word so none of that would ever happen outside of what that frightful nightmares place that he grew up in. Salem found his way dancing a few weeks in learning after this wonderful club that was within this night city he watched the dancers snuck way through and watched as they just danced around each one of their lovely men. He learned to be just like them. throughout a few weeks, Salem slowly settled in to this place called night city sleeping on the streets, sleeping in the alleyways keeping head and keeping away from people and keeping to himself like he always learned to. to be continued……

sections.Occupation:
** Trauma Team Operative | Part-Time Club Security
---
sections.Psychological Profile:
**
Adam generally presents as friendly and helpful. On duty, he becomes significantly more reserved and focused. He takes considerable pride in maintaining peak physical condition and being mostly unaugmented (he views his ears and tail implants as purely cosmetic). Interestingly, he harbors no prejudice against heavily augmented individuals—instead, he's fascinated by the artistic and design elements of their chrome. Adam isn't naive but firmly believes that life could—and should—be better for everyone.
---

sections.Backstory:
**
Born into a fairly successful corporate family with parents working in Militech middle management, Adam showed remarkable physical prowess from a young age, excelling in sports and outperforming many augmented peers. As corporate instability became evident near his graduation, his family encouraged him to seek opportunities beyond Militech. Adam quickly set his sights on joining Trauma Team but was repeatedly rejected due to a lack of experience and augmentations. Determined and unwilling to accrue debt for unnecessary chrome, Adam intensified his training and began taking mercenary contracts to build his resume. Eventually, after relocating to "Beastside," his perseverance paid off, and he was accepted into Trauma Team as a security specialist. He also works part-time security at the Ni1rvana club.

sections.Backstory:
**  
* Kyuu was born a traveler of the great wastelands of what humanity has chewed up and spat out. She lived a nomad upbringing within the walls of a van that was totally not stolen from someone at sometime that history forgot. She lived amongst the dust and decay of what the earth had become, but you can’t miss what you never knew. Her childhood was that of adventure, excitement and discovery. She had her family, but closeness was never valued between them. They survived, they stole, they cheated. They made deals that went rogue and took sanctuary in moral ambiguity. But it was not a time of grief or hardship. It was how life was. And Kyuu enjoyed the uncertainty and thrill of the life of a nomad. She grew up independent of the world. By the time she was a teen she had already seen most of the wastelands of America. But then something horribly tragic happened… she got bored. She got bored of the ruggedness and constant scrolling scenery. So she stuffed her pockets with 6th Street loan shark money and joined a Militech academy, and Night City became the first place she ever stayed still in. From there, she gained her position as an intelligence agent, transferring to Washington D.C. The stillness was a gradual change for them, but one that enabled her to have time to actually interact with another soul: a fellow Intelligence Analyst that she had been assigned to work with - an FIA asset known by the codename TWILIGHT.

It occurred to her then that this was the other side of life. Not just the desire of self fulfillment, but the warmth of human connection. They’ve kept each other warm ever since, and eventually began working alongside one another. But then the sharks swarmed back to claim their catch, bleeding money in her wake. Repayment would never be enough. There was always more interest, pending favors, they kept biting but a shark can regrow their teeth as many times as it takes. So she disappeared. She was no longer, she became an exotic and adopted her new identity. Disappearing in the starlight of Night City. And hidden she remains.
sections.Known Affiliations:
**  
* FIA Agent Team, Militech, FIA Field Operator TWILIGHT (Riley Watson)
sections.RP Hooks:
**  
* As a known Private Investigator, Kyuu is heavily involved in the goings-on of Beastside. Bubbly and outgoing, she's always happy to chat. Like her husband, she's working with Militech and the FIA behind the scenes.

sections.Name: 終那 Hato (meaning "end that one")
sections.Psychological Profile:
Cold. Calculating. Emotionless. Fearless.

Hato is the model employee who never allows personal thoughts or emotions to cloud her judgment. She maintains no romantic attachments due to the nature of her work, possessing unwavering loyalty to Arasaka. She views aspects of her job involving assassination and torture purely professionally and takes pride in her ruthless efficiency.

Both of Hato's parents are alive. Her father still works in the Bioweapon R&D section responsible for the dojo where she learned martial arts. Hato never discusses her true occupation, instead telling others she works in accounting. She loves classical music and often listens to it during combat to enhance her focus. Hato has a cat named Moochie that follows her around at home, whom she leaves with her parents while on missions.
sections.Physical Description:
Short at 153 cm (5’0") with a slender build, Hato has short, practical blackish-gray hair to avoid interference during missions. From a distance, she appears to be a typical Japanese woman in her early 20s, but up close, subtle signs of Arasaka augmentation become apparent.

She wears basic black clothing, primarily bodysuits, shorts, skirts paired with jackets or tops. Her wardrobe is entirely provided by Arasaka, though she specifically requested fishnets. When questioned by her handler, she simply stated, "They'll help me blend in socially with people my age," although privately, she wanted them due to her father's previous prohibition.

Chrome/Implants:

Targeting Optics (Level 2)

Enhanced Ears (Level 1)

Cyberlegs (Level 2)

sheet.preamble: Name Lilly Raptor aka Lil Raptor

sections.Psychological Profile: An EX NCPD Detective, turned private eye Raptor having been inspired by their dad (a well known officer) to join the NCPD however their sense of justice is slipping as they try to survive in night city. To cope they built a hobby up of collecting and maintaining retro and old tech and cybernetics fantasizing that maybe night city wasn't always as bad as it now.
sections.Physical Description:
Raptor has a feminine build standing at around 5’8 their right arm is an almost antique cybernetic that has a mount to store a small single handed firearm. Their hair is straight maroon and long past that goes past their back. They are normally in some form of suit with an old but well maintained trench coat. They have a form fitting purple mask with a built -in respirator and a heads up display.
Chrome/Implants: Most of Raptors chrome and implants are at least a generation old but have been kept and maintained to a surprise degree of skill. Their Subdermal Grip is built into their right arm and was intended to help with reducing recoil well firing as well as useful as a tool to crush things. The Cyber fingers are built into the end of their right arm normally used to open locks and quickly access computers. The Flashvisor is one of the few things not out of date having had to replace their organic eyes after a nasty flash bang incident well on the job as a patrol officer.
sections.Total Cyberware Points:
3 
Skills/Abilities: With their time in the NCPD they picked up a number of skills which included Investigating and info gathering, basic firearm training and data gathering as well as lockpicking and forceful entry. They also are capable of some basic cybernetic maintenance but most of their knowledge is in older models.
Weapons/Armor/Equipment: The weapon they carry is a Revolver tho the gun itself is new the design is fairly old. They tend to have some form of protective vest under their clothes mainly intended for stopping up to something such as a small rifle round. In their Mask is a in built respirator that can filter out commonly found hazardous gasses a heads up display that allows access to the net as well as file storage. In that storage is also some of their NCPD files and ID they were able to secure before being discharged.
sections.Backstory: Lilly Raptor grew up on stories from their mum about how Raptors’ Dad time in the NCPD how he died in the line of duty and how he was a hero. This inspired them to join the NCPD at a young age trying to live up to what they believed their farther was like they attempt to be a hard working and dam good cop however as they rose through the ranks and spend more and more time working in and for night city it became clear that many of the stories they heard was nothing more then make believe. However they wanted to keep up holding a form of justice and try and protect those just trying to get by they gained a rep as an honest cop but this gained a lot of scorn from their peers going against the overall corrupt culture and social norms in the station they were assigned after a few transfers and a number of promotion they became a detective and was working on a case which involved 10 missing people who dissapered at roughly the same time and location. Raptor got close to finishing the case just as all signs pointed to a high standing Militech corpo they were discharged on misconduct and corruption charges. Since then they had to tech to the streets as a Private Eye and sometimes working as a merc in hopes to try and gain enough influence to finish up the case one way or another.

sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Ghostdeck Mk.IV — Custom-built, ultra-mobile cyberdeck. Blazing fast, heavily encrypted, built to be wiped or detonated if cornered.,
Signal Cloak — Cloak lined with nanofiber mesh that disrupts scans and tracking signals, rendering him a glitch in the system.,
Spider Drones — Tiny autonomous drones for bypassing locks, disabling cameras, or planting bugs. (Affected by EMP, low battery capacity),

Mono-Edge Knife — Razor-thin blade with a mono-molecular edge, easily hidden on his forearm for quick, silent take downs.
sections.Backstory:
Zehl0 is, in truth, Zion Kade, the child of Zetatech scientist Charles Benicio and renowned netrunner Zoe Kade, known in the shadows as Zero-Ko.

Both were part of Zetatech’s clandestine Black Night initiative — a rival to Arasaka’s notorious Blackwall project. Where Arasaka kidnapped orphans, Zetatech used their own employees’ children: born and raised to become Ghosts of the Net, these prodigies were trained from infancy to breach corporate fortresses, steal data, and vanish without a trace.

But Zion’s parents grew sick of watching their son pushed past his limits — risk after risk, dive after dive. One brutal netrun left Zion’s mind fractured by a hostile Arasaka counter-hacker. Memory wiped, name lost, Zetatech deemed him broken and expendable.

His parents had other plans. In a single desperate move, they rigged his escape — planting trails, forging clearances, and wiping logs. Zion fled into the neon abyss of Night City with nothing but the clothes on his back, his cyberdeck, and the voice of Zero-Ko — the mother he no longer remembers, guiding him from the dark net as a ghost of his past.

🎯 Goals & Motivation

Once an experiment, now a ghost in the system — Zehl0 hunts secrets, manipulates the powerful, and bleeds corps dry for profit, leverage, and the rush. He lives to breach the unbreachable, push limits, and keep moving — always one step ahead of the corps that discarded him.
sections.Known Affiliations: Zero-Ko — The ghost in his feed. An anonymous voice feeding him intel, tips, and digital lifelines — secretly his own mother, watching over him from the shadows he can’t remember.

sections.Backstory:
Khatun – The Silent Horn of Night City
⸻

“I don’t bark. I bite. Quietly.”

⸻

No one saw Khatun arrive in Night City.

She slipped in through the freight tunnels below Watson — alone, dirty, bleeding through her coat. No passport, no eddies, no friends. Just one name burning in her brain:

SinoDyne Industries.

The corp that called her family “collateral.” That signed off on the drone strike that leveled her clan’s camp in the Wastes. Her people were Nomads — herders, traders, off-grid ghosts who lived free. SinoDyne wanted the lithium beneath their land. So they erased the surface.

She was sixteen. Out hunting when the sky turned to fire.
By the time she made it back, there was nothing left to bury.

⸻

Now she walks the alleys of Night City with blood under her fingernails and purpose behind her eyes.
She’s looking for work — bar work, quiet work. Something to keep her close to the streets.
People talk when they’re drinking.
And Khatun listens harder than most people scream.

She’s short — just 1.43 meters — and moves like someone who’s learned to vanish. Chrome horns arc from her temples like twisted bone. Her Chameleon Skin mod glitches faintly under neon light, distorting her silhouette like smoke. Her voice, when she speaks, carries a raw Mongolian accent — sharp-edged, deliberate, unbroken by the city around her.

⸻

She doesn’t trust anyone.
Except Andre.

He found her half-conscious in an alley her first week in the city. Didn’t ask questions. Just patched her up, fed her, 


Andre is the only reason she’s not dead.
The only person she trusts to watch her back.
But she doesn’t call him friend. That word means too much to use lightly.

⸻

Strapped to her thigh is a hacked-up cyberdeck she scavenged off a dying netrunner in Pacifica. She doesn’t fully understand it — can barely boot it without frying the interface. But she’s learning. Slowly. Patiently. Whispering through old terminals, breaking into off-grid vending machines, watching how the Net pulses like a living thing.

Because she knows the truth she wants is locked behind firewalls.
The names. The logs. The files that prove who gave the kill order.
Someone in SinoDyne signed that document.

And she’s going to find them.

⸻

She’s not here for justice.
Justice is slow. Justice is bought.

She wants revenge.
She wants to look them in the eye — and make them remember the faces they tried to erase.

No gangs. No crew. Just her. A glitchy cyberdeck. A stolen blade. And a long memory.

Khatun is small. But grief made her sharp.
And now, she’s hunting.



⸻

“I used to chase stars. Now I chase silence.”
“Pour your drink. Tell your story. Just don’t lie to me.”

sections.Name: ** Ciren Xiangyu (aka The Puppeteer, The Golden Lady, Source)
sections.Occupation: ** Street Ripperdoc, Netrunner, Former Doll, former Lazarus BioSystems Employee
sections.Psychological Profile: Charming yet cold-eyed. Calculated kindness conceals trauma. Highly controlled, carefully managing interactions and loyalties. Trust and genuine connections are scarce commodities—smiles always come with hidden calculations. Operates protectively, almost parentally, within her community but rarely lets anyone get close.
sections.Physical Description:
* **Height:** 5'11"
* **Appearance:** Cyber-sleek and surgically precise. Skin reminiscent of porcelain. Elegant, graceful, doll-like but haunted presence.
* **Cyberware Features:**
  * SmartEyes (Blue, facial recognition, zoom, AR HUD)
  * Subdermal black alt-plating
  * Blade-like nails
sections.Chrome / Implants:
* **Neural:** Netrunner Suite (L1) – basic hacking, cyberdeck access
* **Ocular System:** SmartEyes – enhanced visual functionality
* **Miscellaneous:** Doll Chip (Lazarus Proprietary Control Chip) – originally believed to be a normal doll chip, secretly designed to remove bodily autonomy and enslave users.
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities:
* Black-market surgical operations and cyberware installation
* Netrunning (basic hacking, data tracking, and intel acquisition)
* Social engineering (misinformation, manipulation, mind games)
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
* Medkit and portable cyberdeck
* Shotgun and small handgun (personal defense)
## 📜 Consolidated Backstory:
Ten years ago, Ciren Xiangyu was forced into sex work, implanted with a "Doll Chip" under the pretense of standard industry practice. Unbeknownst to her, this was actually an experimental control implant created by Lazarus BioSystems, stripping users of bodily autonomy and turning them into corporate puppets—aware yet helpless.

Five years after escaping the Doll life, Ciren, desperate and needing resources, unknowingly joined Lazarus BioSystems to capitalize on her cyberware knowledge. In a grim twist, she found herself developing and refining the very control chips that enslaved her years earlier. Realizing the nature of her work, Ciren fled Lazarus and took refuge in Night City, seeking freedom, redemption, and a chance to reclaim autonomy.

Now settled in Night City, Ciren operates as a street-level ripperdoc affiliated with The Mox, offering black-market medical aid, cyberware installations, and trauma support to those in need. Despite her escape, the Lazarus chip remains embedded in her body—impossible to remove without risking ego death or severe brain trauma. Officially, she is still legally bound to Lazarus via the exploitative Terms of Service hidden in the chip's activation clause.

Though she has regained significant control of her daily life, the threat of Lazarus reclaiming her body lingers. Every interaction, every shadow, every digital whisper could mean her past catching up with her once more.
sections.Known Affiliations:
* **The Mox:** Joined at its founding. Offers ripperdoc services and supports victims of exploitation.
* **Former Employee:** Lazarus BioSystems, specifically involved in Project Puppet (secret Lazarus initiative involving mind-control cyberware disguised as doll chips).

sheet.preamble:
# 🔒 LOCK (Message 1/2)
“UNLOCK” (when things go sideways)
    Role: Solo (Combat Tech / Infiltration)

sections.Age:
28 | Pronouns: He/They | Height: 6’2”
    Faction Ties: Freelance (rumored Mox ties, ex-Despoilers)
    Street Rating: Clean-6
    Status: Active Operator
##🧍‍♂️ Appearance
Encased in a black reflective mask with pulsing orange data stripes. His frame is sleek—almost synthetic—with chain-wrapped limbs used for neurostabilization, not fashion. Pants are tagged “UNLOCK,” like a sealed weapon waiting for release.
   * A walking locked file—silent, secure, deadly.
## 🧠 Psych Profile
Personality: Cold. Cryptic. Code-precise.
Quirk: Tracks time down to the second mid-combat.
Inner Conflict: Wants autonomy. Fears it. Still bound by glitchy corpo code.
Emotional State: Trained to delay emotion under pressure—but it always comes back, alone, later.
##🧬 Backstory
LOCK was engineered in a Biotechnica blacksite (Rook Node) to test biometric obedience—human loyalty baked into brain chemistry. His obedience was reinforced by a neural implant: the Obedience Lockchain.
Mid-mission, a memory broke through. The loop glitched.
His handlers labeled him: UNRECOVERABLE. No team. No cleanup. Just ghosted.
Now he works Night City freelance, proving one thing:
    “They made me a weapon. Now I choose the target.”
### 🗓️ It’s been 6 years since he broke.
## 🦾 Cyberware Loadout (CWP: 6.0 / 6.0)
• Recoil Dampers – Steadies firearm recoil (→ joint clicking)
• Thermal Control Skin – Erases heat sig (→ skin repels touch)
• Biomonitor – Tracks vitals/stress (→ false alerts, hyper-aware)
• GhostTag – Scrambles facial ID (→ hard to recognize)
• Voice Modulator – Glitched voice masking (→ cracks under stress)
• Cyberoptics (Low-Light) – Night vision (→ faint red glow)
### ⚠️ Psychosis Risk: Low – side effects narratively rich, not overpowering.
## 🔫 Weapons & Gear
### Primary: K-VECTOR Smart Gun
    • Smart/regular fire modes
    • Suppressor toggle + HUD scope swap
    • Matte black / orange trim
    (Training-only infinite ammo mode)
### Sidearms: Dual custom pistols
    • Semi/full auto toggle
    • 20-round mags, suppressors
    • LED-themed, ergonomic CQC tools#
### Utility Loadout:
• EMP Ping Tool
• Vibro-gloves (melee shock dampening)
• Tactical harness + LED mags
• Chain-wrapped limbs (support + lore)
🛠 Skills & Talents
### TECH // “Plugless Netrunner”
• Hardjack Override – Manual probes/tools for security bypass
• Basic Comms Scanner – Unsecured radio intercepts
• Deadhand Hacking – Physical lock cracking (no net)
### INFILTRATION // “Ghost Walk Protocol”
• Silent Ops Movement – No sound, no trace
• Tactile Entry – Lockpicks, vents, breach tools
• Field Recon – Reads exits, layouts instantly
• Visual Suppression – Masters cover, darkness, and chaos

[The Vampyre](https://cyberpunk.fandom.com/wiki/Vampyres) is a mandible mod that effectively gives you fangs, and can be poisoned.
sections.Backstory:
Growing up she was exposed to the darker side of humanity when her family paid for passage across the NUSA, their convoy was ambushed by Raffen, and she watched as dozens of her fellow travelers, family, and friends were harvested for cybernetics and organs. When her sister was chosen to go next, she went feral, she ripped herself free of her bindings and mutilated her captors. Ever since, she has been slightly unhinged and talks with a cavalier attitude about horrible violence when she is challenged.
She, her sister, and her older brother, were rescued from the Raffen camp by nomad family, the White Eyes clan of Snake Nation, who took them in and raised them. Her siblings remain with them now, but her cyberization after the attacks made it unsafe for her to stay in the badlands without access to decent facilities, so she became a static for the clans. When they stopped in Night city, she stayed and became a merc, doing all kinds of jobs for all kinds of people and occasionally providing information to her Snake nation contacts or procuring what they need from the city.
Eventually she became their go to fixer for the needs of Snake Nation, and thus began building crews and assigning work for other mercs, recently she’s moved into Beast Town in search of the right crew for the job she has in mind next.
sections.Known Affiliations: Snake Nation[The White Eyes], The Aldecaldos[Local Fixers and Mercs], Sixth Street[Dealers], The Animals[Biz relations].
sections.RP Hooks: Specialized in Crew assembly and Acquisitions. Frequent contact with Nomads.

sections.Name: Thomas "Double T" Tchekov
sections.Psychological Profile: Jaded, Focused, He keeps his head down when not on the job, Shopping at all the local places, He's a good soul at heart, but has been burnt too many times for a trusting friendship to build quickly. Loyal to money otherwise, will always do his best to complete his job, and save lives. Unless they shoot at him first, then they bleed out for all he cares.
sections.Physical Description: Tall, Well built, Slightly Asian descent, Possibly From northern Chinese descent, or Mongolian. Short shaggy Black hair, Barely  maintained.
sections.Chrome / Implants:
-Smart eyes
 -Chemical Analyzer
sections.Skills / Talents / Abilities: High First aid and Med-Tech knowledge, Basic Surgery Knowledge (Trauma Closure, Mostly) , High SMG skills and Unarmed combat (defencive, Using Armor for defections and Absorption.) Mid range Shotgunner skills.
sections.Equipment / Armor / Weapons:
Heavy Trauma Team Armor (Trauma Team Insignia Roughly Removed) Including helmet, Med-tech Kit, Including Several Doses of common drugs and treatments, Including antidotes and Painkillers, Stabilizers and Quickseal bio foam. (No specialized stuff, like Immunosuppressants,)
Smart SMG, Basic Pump action shotgun, Several Loaded Magazines for SMG, about 30 Shells of Buckshot for his Shotty
sections.Backstory:
A Young man travels to a big city, Enrolls in Med school, Wants to make a difference, After finishing his med-school, He grew impatient and Signed on for Trauma team, Worked for a few years elsewhere before being transferred to NC Division, got a lot of work, and built up a good rep in the company.
Then He ended up going on a mission to save a big boss, long story short, Entire team but him dead, Boss over shoulder, AV Refused to land, Got blamed for the entire mess.

Got fired, disgraced from the company, coat tail rider, All but a few, people who knew him, They are still in contact, and supply him with the tools of his trade for fair price, It is the gray market after all. Main contact is Dr. Ferdinand, (NPC) 

His goal is to either get Back in good graces with TT, or Make it on his own, and Become a big named Underground Medic. A Legend if you will
sections.Known Affiliations: Dr. Ferdinand, Trauma team. Local ripperdocs, (Drop offs and Fixers),
sections.RP Hooks:
"Hurt? Call Double T, He'll Fix you up, If you've got the Eddies."
Need a bit of extra muscle, or anticipating a fight, Its always good to have Double T on your Side.
That large guy at the bar nursing a whiskey with a thousand yard stare, He glances towards you and gives a sly smirk, He knows what you are, A paycheck eventually.
sections.Additional Notes: Owns a townhouse on the outskirts of NC, and a basic four door sedan, The house also should contain a basic lab for creating simple medicines from what he can get a hold of.

sections.Name: Judith Steele
sections.Psychological Profile: Judith varies in different situations with how she reacts to them. While any OBVIOUS threat would cause her to panic, and she would get intimidated by someone directly threatening her, a lot of the time she's too stupid to recognize things. This applies to things such as common sense, innuendos, and anything subtle. She has a kind enough heart to help someone who might need it, but is highly gullible. She isn't completely helpless though, as given the opportunity to defend herself or escape from a bad situation she will do so.
sections.Physical Description:
Judith is approximately 5'4 tall with a lean frame. Her hair is dark grey and her eyes are brown. She can usually be seen wearing comfortable clothing like hoodies, sweatpants, or just techwear overall.
Chrome/Implants: Judith has the basic implants that one would expect of a civilian and can connect to any regular port, but doesn't have anything specialized.

Features internal electronic systems to dampen recoil. The gun is also trimmed/plated with EMI shielding to protect it from ElectroMagnetic Interference
sections.Backstory: Judith was originally a shut-in who would do nothing but sit at home and play video games, and do BrainDances (BDs). Eventually, either via her parents getting sick of her shit or the landlord- she was kicked out. She is currently looking for work but has no idea where to start, and no life skills outside of video games or pop culture knowledge.
sections.Additional Notes: Easily corruptible/influenced, and has room temperature IQ.

    Weapons/Armor/Equipment: Just her trust iron passed down by her Gramps. An old war style 44 magnum revolver
sections.Backstory: Have fun reading this. So Gramps is one of the head chairmen to the clan and the head mechanic, he is the one I lived with all my life and learned from. My dad died fighting off a rival clan and my mom lives with the other side of the clan. The clan will be based out of 2 locations. One where I am and one where mom is, my clan primarily focuses on travel and trade work. Going from place to place picking up new equipment and doing odd jobs for people. Only a select few of the dogs could take on blood contracts. The blood hounds where not special, just those who knew what they where doing and already took a life, easier to take a life when ur hands are already bloody. I was never part of the blood hounds as my gramps forbid it, but I have taken life before. Mainly from a gunk who tried to snatch my ride. At the time it was a treasure to me, but I lost her due to a fire fight. Rouge missile was coming for Paws truck. Him and 3 other dogs where driving the Gun & Runner and I couldn't let them perish. So I lit some flares and drove Infront to grab it's heat signature and then delta'd out only to watch her get hit and be sent to the fires beyond......

sections.Name: Biella Brecken
sections.Psychological Profile: struggles with emotional control, grieves for the loss of her student and a fellow squad mate, seeks atonement through righteous acts of reckless abandon and self sacrifice, breaks down at unnecessary loss of life and loses her control when someone gets zeroed for no reason, often butchering the perpetrator with her claw gauntlets
sections.Physical Description:
6'5, sleek but well built, toned, exotic

Chrome/Implants: cybernetic claws, enhanced ears, subdermal grip, targeting optic, combat wired reflexes, mr.studd/midnight lady
sections.Total Cyberware Points:
9

Skills/Abilities: krav maga, jiu-jitsu, muay thai

Weapons/Armor/Equipment: cyber claws that cover most of the hand and act as gauntlets, kevlar jacket and pants for light protection and flexibility
sections.Backstory: Biella Brecken grew up in the streets with a rough life as a delinquent, struggling to survive day by day, once she came of age she signed up for the military, wanting to make a difference in the world so no-one had to go through the hell she did growing up, where she was augmented for combat and she was changed into an exotic, was taught the ways of martial arts for close quarters combat, after being dishonorably discharged for disobeying orders and getting a squad mate killed she attempted to open a martial arts dojo, but found her temper couldn't handle teaching after she accidentally killed one of her students, she sold the dojo and left, carrying the weight of her mistakes along with her, now finding herself in the streets of night city doing jobs here and there for whoever pays right, mostly body guard jobs for snobby rich assholes, once the job is done she distances and disassociates from people, afraid of hurting them like her long dead student and lost squad mate
